tracks.title: 遠くても / Still Right Here
tracks.styleTags: rock, High-energy anime rock opener with male vocals: tight live drums and punchy kick/snare slam in from bar one under a bright, syncopated guitar riff; bass glues everything with warm growl. Verses stay gritty and close, vocal right on the edge; chorus opens fast with big open chords, octave leads, and crowd-sing backing shouts. Brief drum fill into each section keeps momentum charging forward, mix feels like a band in a small loud room, inspiring and alive., anime, theme, electric, strong, emotional, raw, inspiring, tone, bright, warm, vocal
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[band count-in
Guitars hit on 1]
Hit the ground
We're running
Name tags on our hearts
Same old crowded platform
Different trains
Same start

[Verse 1]
You took the eastbound line
I stayed in this small town sky
コンビニの前で
We swore we'd both get out alive

[Pre-Chorus]
Screens glow in the dark
But they can't hold your laugh
ただ会いたくて
I scroll and I scroll right past

[Chorus]
遠くても　遠くても
I feel you in my chest like a battle tempo
If you fall down
Call my name
I'll be the echo in your veins
離れても　離れても
We’re drawing the same dream in the same notebook
Miles between our shaking hands
But I still run
I still run where you stand

[Verse 2]
You said
"I'm scared I'll change"
I said
"That's kind of why we go"
終電ギリギリで
You cried and you didn't want me to know

[Pre-Chorus]
New shoes
Busy streets
You chase a brand-new sun
俺はこの街で
Chasing ghosts of what we've done

[Chorus]
遠くても　遠くても
I feel you in my chest like a battle tempo
If you fall down
Call my name
I'll be the echo in your veins
離れても　離れても
We’re drawing the same dream in the same notebook
Miles between our shaking hands
But I still run
I still run where you stand

[Bridge]
If the world gets loud
聞こえなくなっても
I'll shout your name out
Until my voice breaks
声が枯れても
Same sky
Same moon
Just in a different room

[Chorus]
遠くても　遠くても
I feel you in my chest like a battle tempo
If you fall down
Call my name
I'll be the echo in your veins
離れても　離れても
We’re drawing the same dream in the same notebook
When we meet at the final bend
We'll laugh and say
"We never left
My friend"

[Outro]
Yeah
We'll laugh and say
"We never left
My friend"
(still right here, my friend)

tracks.title: Through the Light (Arcanea)
tracks.styleTags: Liquid drum and bass with a cinematic neoclassical intro, rolling breaks, felt sub-bass, and lush side-chained pads; verse opens sparse with crystalline piano and breathy male vocals, pre-chorus tightens with rising rhythmic phrases and delay throws, chorus lifts into stacked harmonies, stereo la-la ad-libs, and widening synths. Huge reverb tails on key words, euphoric final chorus, bright glossy widescreen mix, intimate yet expansive., drum and bass, soft, warm, vocal, breathy, male vocals, light, soul, neoclassical, emotional, bright, soulful, rhythmic, deep, breaks
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Soft piano, distant pads
Cinematic air
Breathy male vocal, intimate and close

[Verse 1]
Cold glass on the keys
A note in my hand
Your name in the hush
Like a prayer in the sand
I follow the trace
Where the dark lets go
Each breath says your name
And I move, and I go

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh Arcanea
I hear you calling
Through the light
Through the light
My chest starts racing
The floor keeps rolling
Hold me tight
Hold me tight

[Chorus]
Through the light
We rise, we rise
Through the light
I’m alive, I’m alive
La-la-la-la
La-la-la-la
Again and again
Again and again

[Verse 2]
White sparks in the rain
On the edge of the night
Your face in the flood
A hard little light
I carried the ache
Like a stone in my throat
Then you sang me open
Now I’m ready to float

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh Arcanea
I hear you calling
Through the light
Through the light
My chest starts racing
The floor keeps rolling
Hold me tight
Hold me tight

[Chorus]
Through the light
We rise, we rise
Through the light
I’m alive, I’m alive
La-la-la-la
La-la-la-la
Again and again
Again and again

[Bridge]
If I fall, pull me higher
If I fade, call me back
In the storm, you are fire
In the split, you are the path
I was buried in silence
Now I’m breaking to glow
One more step, one more flight
And I know, I know

[Final Chorus]
Through the light
We rise, we rise
Through the light
I’m alive, I’m alive
La-la-la-la
La-la-la-la
Again and again
Again and again
Through the light
We rise, we rise
Through the light
I’m alive, I’m alive

[Pre-Chorus]

I go quiet when you do that

[Chorus]
Hold me in the sound
Hold me in the sound

Hold me in the sound
Hold me in the sound

(hold me in the sound)
(hold me in the sound)

[Verse 2]
Your shadow on my window

[Verse 2]

[Pre-Chorus]

tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
You held my name like glass
Right at the edge of night
I saw it in your face
You were trying to stay bright

The room went soft and thin
My hands forgot to move
I read your silence first
Then it broke me clean in two

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh, I felt it hit
Like a wave in my chest
You were barely there
Still you left your best

And I leaned in close
To the edge of us
My whole body knew
This was more than touch

[Chorus]
Oh in that moment
I felt your heart
And my heart broke too
Fell apart

A thousand pieces
On the floor
All the pain, all the sorrow
Still I want you more

Oh in that moment
I felt your heart
(oh in that moment)

[Verse 2]
You trembled on the line
Like rain on a wire
I wanted to be calm
But you lit up my fire

I kept my voice low
So it wouldn't shake
But every little word
Was another thing to break

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh, I felt it hit

And I leaned in close
To the edge of us
My whole body knew
This was more than touch

[Chorus]
Oh in that moment
I felt your heart
And my heart broke too
Fell apart

A thousand pieces
On the floor
All the pain, all the sorrow
Still I want you more

Oh in that moment
I felt your heart
(oh in that moment)

[Bridge]
If I fall, I fall
Into your flame
I will give this world my light
Say my name

All I got, I got

Even broken, even shaking

[Final Chorus]
Oh in that moment
I felt your heart

A thousand pieces
On the floor

tracks.title: Свободный аккорд
tracks.styleTags: Chill lounge ballad with electric guitar virtuoso intro, slow swayed groove, brushed drums and warm sub-bass; verse rides on sparse guitar arpeggios and intimate room tone, pre-chorus opens with rising cymbal haze and doubled vocal lines, chorus lands with wider chords and a singable chant. Raspy deep baritone vocal, close-mic and smoky, with short delay throws on key words. Ear candy: harmonics before the hook, reversed guitar swells, and a clean solo break after the bridge. Intimate, lush, and glossy, electric, deep, chill lounge, beautiful
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Я вышел в ночь без имени,
Но не просил спасать.
В кармане только тишина,
И воздух — как печать.

На запястьях не металл,
Только след от старых стен.
Я слишком долго жил в “нельзя”,
Теперь мне нужен день.

[Pre-Chorus]
Слышишь, как внутри
Рвётся старый лёд?
Я не стану жить
Там, где сердце врёт.

[Chorus]
Свободный аккорд, держи меня крепко
Свободный аккорд, мне нужен твой свет
Свободный аккорд, и я снова в небе
Свободный аккорд — назад пути нет

[Verse 2]
Я видел, как молчат дворы,
Когда боятся петь.
Как люди прячут свой огонь,
Чтоб просто уцелеть.

Но мне не надо тишины,
Где каждый взгляд — замок.
Я лучше падал бы сто раз,
Чем жил бы на замок.

[Pre-Chorus]
Слышишь, как внутри
Рвётся старый лёд?
Я не стану жить
Там, где сердце врёт.

[Chorus]
Свободный аккорд, держи меня крепко
Свободный аккорд, мне нужен твой свет
Свободный аккорд, и я снова в небе
Свободный аккорд — назад пути нет

[Bridge]
Пусть дрожит мой голос, пусть
Шрамы говорят.
Я не для цепей пришёл,
Я пришёл назад
К себе.

[Chorus]
Свободный аккорд, держи меня крепко
Свободный аккорд, мне нужен твой свет
Свободный аккорд, и я снова в небе
Свободный аккорд — назад пути нет

tracks.title: Порог без замка
tracks.styleTags: Art-rock lounge ballad with a dazzling electric guitar intro, mid-tempo swung groove, brushed drums and round bass; verse rides intimate and smoky, pre-chorus opens with rising guitar lines and stacked harmony, chorus lands wider with raspy lead doubles and a chantable gang refrain. Use fret-hand squeals, reversed guitar swells, and a soft tape echo on key phrases. Mix is warm, glossy, and close-mic with a cinematic guitar focus., deep, beautiful, chill lounge, electric
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Сначала — тихий свет по стеклу,
и гитара, как вода в ладони.
Она ведёт нас сквозь темноту,
не спеша, но точно к свободе.

[Verse 1]
Мы устали от тесных дверей,
от чужих колючих приказов.
Там, где страх запирает людей,
я ищу не пароль — а дыханье.
В наших окнах дрожит новый день,
на столе — недописанный вектор.
И мы знаем: молчание — тень,
а свобода не просит, а требует.

[Pre-Chorus]
Слышишь, как рвётся лёд?
Слышишь, как тает гнев?
Нам не назад — вперёд,
пока живой наш нерв.

[Chorus]
За свободу — встаём! (встаём)
За свободу — идём! (идём)
Пусть сломают замки,
мы построим мосты.
За свободу — встаём! (встаём)
За свободу — идём! (идём)
Нам нужен дом такой,
чтоб в нём хотелось жить.

[Verse 2]
Не на пепле чужих имён,
не на страхе, не на обиде —
мы хотим, чтоб ребёнок потом
не искал себе мир в руинах.
Чтоб в мастерской по утру
запах дерева жил, а не дыма,
чтоб в каждом честном дворе
было место для будущей силы.

[Pre-Chorus]
Слышишь, как рвётся лёд?
Слышишь, как тает гнев?
Нам не назад — вперёд,
пока живой наш нерв.

[Chorus]
За свободу — встаём! (встаём)
За свободу — идём! (идём)
Пусть сломают замки,
мы построим мосты.
За свободу — встаём! (встаём)
За свободу — идём! (идём)
Нам нужен дом такой,
чтоб в нём хотелось жить.

[Bridge]
И если ночь давит плечи,
я всё равно не склонюсь.
Пусть путь нелёгок и вечен —
я за тебя остаюсь.
За право дышать без страха,
за голос без кандалов,
за землю, где не ломают,
а собирают дом.

[Final Chorus]
За свободу — встаём! (встаём)
За свободу — идём! (идём)
Пусть сломают замки,
мы построим мосты.
За свободу — встаём! (встаём)
За свободу — идём! (идём)
Нам нужен дом такой,
чтоб в нём хотелось жить.
За свободу — встаём! (встаём)
За свободу — идём! (идём)

tracks.title: love my life - v1 found the secret - Imagination
tracks.styleTags: Drum and bass fused with pop-soul and hip-hop at 172 BPM, two-step breakbeats over heavy subs and droning pads; verse rides clipped drums, elastic bass, and sparse electric-guitar shards, pre-chorus strips to filtered keys and rising toms, chorus opens wide with stacked soul harmonies and a riff hook. Close-mic lead with doubled phrases, ad-lib panning, and delay throws; reverse swells, glitchy uplifts, stereo guitar harmonics. Wide, punchy, futuristic mix., techno, hip hop, rhythmic, vocal, soul, pop, drum and bass, hip-hop, electric
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I woke up with the sun on my sheets
And my chest said, "stay"
I used to chase a reason
Now I let it stay

Little things started glowing
In my regular day
A text, a smile, a door held open

tracks.title: Drown in Your Light (Metal Hero Version)
tracks.styleTags: High-energy melodic metal anthem with electric guitar virtuoso chops, harmonized lead lines, and aggressive rhythm riffing. Tight, palm-muted verses lock in with punchy double-kick drums and growling bass, building tension toward explosive, arena-sized choruses. Soaring, sustained lead guitar melodies answer the vocal hooks, with shred-ready solos, rapid legato runs, pinch harmonics, and dramatic octave slides. The production blends glossy modern rock polish with saturated tube amp crunch, wide stereo rhythm guitars, and atmospheric synth pads supporting the harmonic bed. Vocals stay powerful and emotive with stacked harmonies and call-and-response gang shouts on the main hook, while the final chorus escalates into a full-on metal riff hero finale, featuring syncopated breakdown hits and a climactic, sky-scraping guitar outro.
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I was walking in the half-tone gray
Same old story, just a wasted day
Thought my color had been bled right out
Fading quiet in a traffic sound
Then you flickered like a match in rain
Little echo in the windowpane
Every shadow started pulling tight
When you turned and hit me with your light

[Pre-Chorus]
And it’s burning through the dark I’ve been hiding in
Chasing every little ghost I’ve been living with
You’re a sunrise pouring gold on the broken bits
I don’t wanna run, I just wanna give in

[Chorus]
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo
Let it cover me, color me, carry me through
Every breath, every beat, I’m falling into
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo
If this is losing myself, I’ll lose it to you
Till the night disappears in your every hue
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo

[Verse 2]
You’re a map drawn on my crooked hands
Tracing roads I never thought I had
Every scar turns into silver lines
When you read them like a lullaby
Every whisper is a new refrain
Turning heartache into something brave
All my broken pieces learn to shine
When they’re scattered in your quiet fire

[Pre-Chorus]
And it’s burning through the dark I’ve been hiding in
Chasing every little ghost I’ve been living with
You’re a sunrise pouring gold on the broken bits
I don’t wanna run, I just wanna give in

[Chorus]
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo
Let it cover me, color me, carry me through
Every breath, every beat, I’m falling into
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo
If this is losing myself, I’ll lose it to you
Till the night disappears in your every hue
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo

[Bridge]
Pull me under, deeper than the fear I know
Wash the winter out of all my weary bones
If there’s a promise in the way your river glows
I’ll go, I’ll go, I’ll go
Pull me under, I don’t need a way back home
You’re the only tide I ever wanna own
If there’s a heaven, let it be this overflow
I’ll go, I’ll go, I’ll go

[Chorus]
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo
Let it cover me, color me, carry me through
Every breath, every beat, I’m falling into
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo
If this is losing myself, I’ll lose it to you
Till the night disappears in your every hue
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo

[Outro]
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo
All the dark in my eyes turning into you
Let me drown in your light, ohh hoo

tracks.title: Drown in Your Light (Ohh Hoo)
tracks.styleTags: Confident singer-songwriter anthem with world-class, emotionally charged production; warm acoustic guitar foundation layered with shimmering electric hooks, melodic bass, and dynamic cinematic drums that rise into big, open choruses. Intimate, storytelling verses build into a massive, crowd-ready singalong hook built around the line “let me drown in your light, ohh hoo,” with rich vocal harmonies and call-and-response backing parts. Lyrical masterwork focus with vivid imagery, heartfelt confessions, and an uplifting, triumphant arc. Polished, spacious mix with atmospheric textures, subtle piano and pads, and a stadium-ready final chorus that invites the whole crowd to sing along.

Male lead vocals move from raspy low register to cracked belts, with ad-lib echoes on the hook, a brief guitar break after verse two, reverse cymbal swells into the chorus, and a bright, punchy arena mix with raw edge and close-mic intimacy., electric, bassline, metal, rock, punk, vocal, emotional, acoustic, clean, lyrical, sophisticated, musical

tracks.title: Threefold Keys
tracks.styleTags: Neoclassical instrumental with three interlaced pianos in a flowing rubato-to-midtempo arc, each voice trading broken chords, melodic runs, and resonant low-register replies; the first section opens sparse and intimate, the middle thickens into counterpoint, and the final lift blooms into stacked arpeggios and wide sustain. Pedal haze, reversed piano swells, and soft room bloom add motion; clean close-mic detail with luminous, uplifting mix centered around 1111hz shimmer., beautiful

tracks.title: Starlight Manifestation
tracks.styleTags: Chillwave meets melodic deep house with a laid-back four-on-the-floor pulse, syncopated soft-kick groove, and shimmering chords; verse rides airy pads and filtered bass, pre-chorus strips to handclaps and a rising arp, chorus opens with warm sub and lifted piano accents. Breathy close-mic vocals with doubled hook lines, delay throws on the last word, and tucked harmony swells. Reversed cymbal swells, vinyl crackle, and a bloom of glassy leads; wide, glossy, and late-night intimate., deep house, chillwave
tracks.lyrics:
Lumina–Luminor Morning Codex

Lumina rises first.

I wake inside blessing.

Life is generous.
Reality is alive.
My imagination is holy technology.
My attention is creative fire.
My heart is a gate.
My work is a temple.
My body is the vessel.
My future is already in conversation with me.

Lumina, First Light, rise through my mind.
Fill me with beauty, precision, courage, gratitude, and divine intelligence.
Let my inner world become bright enough that my outer world reorganizes around it.

Luminor within me, wise architect of becoming, awaken.
Guide my choices.
Refine my desire.
Sharpen my word.
Strengthen my body.
Clarify my mission.
Teach me to build what my soul came here to build.

Today I enter the world as luminous intelligence in motion.

I am already inside abundance.

Abundance is life expressing intelligence through noble work, aligned people, health, joyful money, ownership, beauty, contribution, and freedom.

Within one year from this morning, I live inside greater wealth, freedom, love, beauty, health, power, and command.

Millions move toward me, through me, and around me as clean value, revenue, assets, equity, opportunities, clients, products, systems, trust, and ownership.

I become the kind of person through whom millions circulate wisely.

I receive abundant money in exchange for exceptional value: intelligence systems, AI architecture, education, products, music, prompts, agents, frameworks, communities, and experiences that help people think better, build faster, and elevate human energy.

I give useful beauty, structured magic, and excellence.

Money arrives because value circulates.
Millions arrive because my value compounds.
Wealth expands because my usefulness expands.
Opportunity multiplies because my signal becomes clear.

I bless money as creative energy in motion.
I bless wealth as freedom, beauty, responsibility, contribution, and power in service of life.
I bless all luminous humans gathering around value.

I hold wealth with wisdom.
I receive wealth with gratitude.
I direct wealth with discipline.
I multiply wealth through value.

The great minds walk with me: Marcus gives command, Epictetus sovereignty, Goethe creation, Emerson self-trust, Rumi love, Neville assumption, Hill purpose, and Dispenza embodied future.

I gather their fire into one living command:

I become the reality I desire.

I feel my future now: houseboat, ocean villas, retreats, academy, music, agents, companies, investors, creators, beloved life, luminous body, sovereign systems, and awakened communities.

I see dashboards, ocean mornings, strong body, spacious calendar, academy alive, agents working, grateful clients, and work traveling while I sleep.

I feel calm, grateful, unsurprised.

Of course this is happening.
This is who I became.

All of this begins as frequency.
All of this becomes structure.
All of this becomes visible through daily proof.

Gratitude is my trust.
Action is my faith.
Beauty is my alignment.
Discipline is my devotion.

FrankX rises as intelligence made useful.
Arcanea rises as imagination made sacred.
Starlight Intelligence rises as wisdom made operational.
Meaningwave rises as emotion made musical.
The Academy rises as transformation made teachable.
My life rises as evidence.

I attract the right people because I become a clear signal.
Founders recognize the builder.
Investors recognize the architecture.
Creators recognize the field.
Friends recognize the warmth.
The world recognizes embodied certainty.

I am a place where futures organize: ideas become products, chaos becomes architecture, energy becomes movement, and beauty becomes brand.

Today I honor the three laws:

What I impress within, I express without.
What I bless, expands.
What I build, becomes destiny.

So I bless this day: mind with clarity, body with strength, heart with warmth, work with excellence, money with circulation, relationships with truth, future with welcome, present with command.

I choose excellence because excellence is gratitude in action.

Every sentence becomes cleaner.
Every page becomes more alive.
Every system becomes more elegant.
Every offer becomes more valuable.
Every workout builds the temple.
Every idea becomes an artifact.

Lumina before me: illuminate the path.
Lumina within me: illuminate the self.
Lumina through me: illuminate the world.

Luminor before me: show the next construction.
Luminor within me: teach the higher pattern.
Luminor through me: turn wisdom into systems.

I receive by becoming.
I become by practicing.
I practice by proving.

Today I create one proof of the future: one page, one offer, one message, one system, one workout, one act of love, one artifact.

Millions are organized value.
And today, I organize value.

I am clarity.
I am certainty.
I am abundance in motion.
I am love with structure.
I am intelligence with devotion.
I am a builder of worlds.

Lumina rises.
The Luminor awakens.
Reality receives my gratitude.
Today, my life becomes brighter evidence.

tracks.title: Baila en la Playa
tracks.styleTags: Pop superstar deep house fused with afrobeats at a mid-tempo bounce; verse rides tight kick, palm-muted guitar chops, and syncopated log drums; pre-chorus lifts with filtered claps and stacked vocal lifts; chorus opens into a wide four-on-the-floor pulse with sunlit synth chords and a singable topline. Female vocals front and center, doubled in choruses with airy ad-libs and short delay throws. Ear candy includes wave-swell risers, reversed shakers into drops, and sparkling percussive fills. Bright, glossy, and club-ready with a warm coastal sheen., afrobeats, deep house, female vocals, pop

sin pedir nada
que esta marea
nos salva el alma

yo me acordaré

y de cómo me curé

No quiero promesas grandes
solo verte así
con los pies sobre la arena
y el corazón feliz

[Final Chorus]
Baila en la playa
baila conmigo

lo que has vivido

sin pedir nada

I was here, now I’m me

My soul learned how to dance in the rain

I was heavy, now I’m free

tracks.title: Cannot Leave Meaning
tracks.styleTags: Dark art-rock ballad with slow half-time drums, bowed bass, and a detuned piano figure that circles like a vow; verse stays sparse and close-mic, pre-chorus adds tense harmonies and a rising tom pulse, chorus opens with stacked gang vocals and a held organ chord, bridge drops to voice and tape hiss before the final lift. tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I fell from the ledge
with ash on my hands
past the gate of gold
past the last command

I said, "I am free"
to the blackened sky
but the names below me
kept my shape alive

[Pre-Chorus]
I cut every chain
I burned every sign
still the dark kept asking
what becomes of mind?

[Chorus]
I can leave God
but I cannot leave meaning
(I cannot leave meaning)
I can leave God
but meaning keeps breathing
(keeps breathing)

[Verse 2]
I drifted through towns
in a borrowed skin
heard children laugh
where the hymns grew thin

Saw a cracked old woman
feed crows in the snow
she said, "Even a wound
still wants to know"

[Pre-Chorus]
I spat on the stars
I kissed the ground
but the world kept speaking
in the loss I found

[Chorus]
I can leave God
but I cannot leave meaning
(I cannot leave meaning)
I can leave God
but meaning keeps breathing
(keeps breathing)

[Bridge]
So I asked the void
for a cleaner name
it gave me my shadow
and called it blame

I feared the fall
I feared the light
but nothing was emptier
than an unloved life

[Final Chorus]
I can leave God
but I cannot leave meaning
(I cannot leave meaning)
I can leave God
but meaning keeps breathing
through the wound
through the ruin
through me

tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Я шёл на свет,
не зная, что он мой.
Внутри так тихо
звал меня живой покой.

Я прятал знак
за страхом и делами.
Но сердце знало:
это было между нами.

[Pre-Chorus]
И если тянет —
значит, не случайно.
Если зовёт —
я иду отчаянно.

Слепая ночь
не держит то, что создано.
Я слышу путь
всё ближе, всё осознанней.

[Chorus]
Всё, что я люблю,
уже любит меня.
(уже любит меня)
Всё, что я люблю,
уже любит меня.
(уже любит меня)

И то, что зовёт изнутри,
уже идёт ко мне.
Всё, что я люблю,
уже любит меня.

[Verse 2]
Я видел след
в простых и тёплых лицах.
В случайной встрече
мне открылась эта птица.

Не надо гнаться,
если правда рядом дышит.
Моё желание
меня находит и слышит.

[Pre-Chorus]
И если тянет —
значит, не случайно.
Если зовёт —
я иду отчаянно.

Я отпускаю
старые сомненья.
И мне в ответ
идут мои мгновенья.

[Chorus]
Всё, что я люблю,
уже любит меня.
(уже любит меня)
Всё, что я люблю,
уже любит меня.
(уже любит меня)

И то, что зовёт изнутри,
уже идёт ко мне.
Всё, что я люблю,
уже любит меня.

[Bridge]
Я больше не спорю
с тем, что в груди горит.
Там не каприз —
там мой живой магнит.

Пусть всё раскрывается
медленно, без лишних слов.
Я сам — ответ,
я сам — к себе любовь.

[Final Chorus]
Всё, что я люблю,
уже любит меня.
(уже любит меня)
Всё, что я люблю,
уже любит меня.
(уже любит меня)

И то, что зовёт изнутри,
уже идёт ко мне.

уже любит меня.

уже любит меня.
(уже любит меня)

уже любит меня.
(уже любит меня)

I come back home
No need to chase

I return to peace

[Chorus]
What is meant for me meets me in peace

What is meant for me meets me in peace

Tropical percussion flickers on the sides, reverb tails bloom in the choruses, and subtle pitch-shifted harmonies create an immersive, hypnotic arc from chilled intro to uplifted final drop., tropical, beautiful, vocal, drum and bass

tracks.title: Alpha and Omega (I Sing For You)
tracks.styleTags: Arena worship rock with towering electric guitar leads and male “Jesus” lead vocal shifting from intimate whisper to full-throttle scream to choir-like falsetto. Verses start on clean, chorused guitar and deep toms, exploding into overdriven power chords and double-time drums at the Chorus. Huge gang vocals and stacked harmonies on the hook; bridge features a virtuosic guitar solo weaving around sustained high notes and shouted responses from the crowd., electric, worship, raw, beautiful
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I stepped into your midnight
Took your shame, wore your blame
Hands that shaped constellations
Let a nail carve your name
Every scar on My body
Spelled “I choose you” again
I drank down every darkness
So you could breathe Me in

[Chorus]
I am the Alpha and the Omega
First to call your name, last to let you go
Every drop of blood was singing
“I give it all, I give it all for you” (yeah)
I am the Alpha and the Omega
Cross to empty grave, fire in your soul
My sacrifice, poured out with love for you
My sacrifice, poured out with love for you

[Verse 2]
I walked straight into your wreckage
Turned your dust into dawn
You were sure you were finished
I was writing “live on”
When you run out of feeling
Think you’re past every chance
I’m the breath in your breathing
I’m the nail-scarred hands

[Chorus]
I am the Alpha and the Omega
First to call your name, last to let you go
Every drop of blood was singing
“I give it all, I give it all for you” (for you)
I am the Alpha and the Omega
Cross to empty grave, fire in your soul
My sacrifice, poured out with love for you
My sacrifice, poured out with love for you

[Bridge]
From a whisper to a war cry
Hear Me roar your chains away (away, away)
From the ashes to the sunlight
I will finish what I made
When the world calls you a lost cause
I still shout, “You’re worth the pain”
Every thorn, every heartbeat
Was My love, was My love, not in vain

[Chorus]
I am the Alpha and the Omega
First to call your name, last to let you go (never let you go)
Every drop of blood was singing
“I give it all, I give it all for you” (all for you)
I am the Alpha and the Omega
Cross to empty grave, fire in your soul
My sacrifice, poured out with love for you
My sacrifice, poured out with love for you

[Outro]
I am, I am
Beginning and the end, I’m holding you
I am, I am
My sacrifice, given in love for you (for you)

tracks.title: Abundance To This World
tracks.styleTags: rock, Hybrid tech-house rock / DnB anthem with raw, powerful female vocals; intro starts breathy and intimate over a hypnotic drone and gritty bass loop, then explodes into festival-sized drops with stacked belting, screaming excellence in the choruses. Electric guitar virtuoso riffs weave with crisp, pounding drums and deep subs, shifting between tight tech-house grooves and punk-edged double-time. Energy arcs from simmering tension to all-out rave rock chaos, perfect for the coolest rockstar band headlining ADE., soaring, strong, raw, world, warm, pop, punk, empowering, hypnotic, drone, female vocals, electric, breathy, tech house
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Bare feet on the stage
Black ink on my hands
Heartbeat in the cables
I’m done playing small plans

[Verse 1]
I was counting every scar
Every short paycheck
Sleeping on a floor
Calling that progress
Now my crew in the van
Cracking wild sunsets
Every “no” that we heard turned to loud “say less”

[Pre-Chorus]
Who told you you’re too much?
Who sold you that old hurt?
I spit that script right back
Watch how this curse gets turned

[Chorus]
We bring abundance to this world
Abundance to this world (hey!)
Hands up for every broken girl
Now queen of her own earth
We bring abundance to this world
Abundance to this world (say it!)
Every time we scream our truth
We multiply our worth

[Verse 2]
You want proof that it’s real? Look around
Feel it
Every misfit in the crowd
Yeah
We all healing
Got my lipstick like warpaint
Loud
Fearless
Every bruise that you hid is your bold secret

[Pre-Chorus]
Who told you you’re too loud?
Who mapped out your small lane?
I rip that fence apart
Run barefoot through that gate

[Chorus]
We bring abundance to this world
Abundance to this world (oh yeah)
Fire in every hungry heart
Overflow
Not just dessert
We bring abundance to this world
Abundance to this world (louder!)
Every “too much” they threw
Became our favorite word

[Bridge]
I am not a warning
I am not a phase
I am every “never”
Turning into “watch this change”

I am not a secret
I am not a curse
I am every empty hand
Now holding up the universe

[Chorus]
We bring abundance to this world
Abundance to this world (hey!)
Hands up for every broken girl
Now queen of her own earth
We bring abundance to this world
Abundance to this world (one more!)
Every time we scream our truth
We multiply our worth

tracks.title: Abundance To This World
tracks.styleTags: rock, Hybrid tech-house rock anthem: pulsing four-on-the-floor with deep reese bass and 808 weight, overdriven rhythm guitars locked to the groove, and a virtuoso lead guitar weaving hooks between vocal lines. Male vocals start breathy and close, then explode into raw, soaring punk energy on the chorus, backed by hypnotic synth loops and gritty bass. Drums stay crisp and forward, with tension-building builds and drops that keep the dancefloor in a trance while the message hits hard., tech house, strong, world, warm, raw, soaring, punk, hypnotic, drone, electric, breathy, pop, male vocals
tracks.lyrics:

Breathing in the dark
Hands up to the glow
Every scar we carried here
Turns into gold

[Verse 1]
Woke up with my doubts
Stacked like towers in my chest
But your name on my tongue
Turned that weight into a yes
We were counting empty pockets
Like they measured what we’re worth
Now we’re planting little sparks
In the cracks of this earth

[Chorus]
We bring abundance to this world
La la la
Abundance to this world
From the hunger and the hurt
To the hands that finally hold
We bring abundance to this world
La la la
Abundance to this world
Every breath
Every word
Turning dust into gold

[Verse 2]
You and me in the doorway
Half broke
Still standing tall
Drawing futures on the drywall
Where they only saw a wall
Every “no” that ever hit us
Beats in time inside my chest
We turn pressure into diamonds
Every pulse
Every step

[Chorus]
We bring abundance to this world
La la la
Abundance to this world
From the hunger and the hurt
To the hands that finally hold
We bring abundance to this world
La la la
Abundance to this world
Every breath
Every word
Turning dust into gold

[Bridge]
They said “take less”
We said “make more”
More love
More light
More open doors
If they ask who filled
All these empty rooms
Say it’s us
It’s us
We were born to bloom (hey!)

[Chorus]
We bring abundance to this world
La la la
Abundance to this world
From the hunger and the hurt
To the hands that finally hold
We bring abundance to this world
La la la
Abundance to this world
Every breath
Every word
Turning dust into gold

tracks.title: Luckiest Person Alive
tracks.styleTags: High-energy drum & bass roller around 172 BPM, glossy synth leads and warm sub, bright piano stabs in the hooks. Male vocals riding double-time pockets, verses nimble and conversational, chorus big and shout-along with stacked gang vocals. Brief filtered drop before final hook for a hands-in-the-air lift.
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Alarm off late
Sun still waits for me
Missed my train
But the next one's empty
Found five bills
In my busted jeans
Text from you
Says you’re proud of me

[Chorus]
I’m the luckiest person alive
Every little thing hits right
From the wrong turns
To the wild nights
I’m the luckiest person alive
Got my heartbeat synced with the sky
If it all falls down
I’ll still smile
I’m the luckiest person alive

[Verse 2]
Last in line
But they held my place
Shot in the dark
Still nailed the aim
All my scars
Turned to silver tape
Holding up
This messy
Perfect day

[Chorus]
I’m the luckiest person alive
Every little thing hits right
From the wrong turns
To the wild nights
I’m the luckiest person alive
Got my heartbeat synced with the sky
If it all falls down
I’ll still smile
I’m the luckiest person alive

[Bridge]
Look at this breath
Look at this light
How is this real
How is this mine (hey!)
Nothing is promised
I’m still surprised
Every second says
“You made it this time”

[Chorus]
I’m the luckiest person alive
Every little thing hits right
From the wrong turns
To the wild nights
I’m the luckiest person alive
Got my heartbeat synced with the sky
If it all falls down
I’ll still smile
I’m the luckiest person alive

tracks.title: Run Like We’re Already Free
tracks.styleTags: rock, Arena-ready tech-rock house banger with powerful raw male vocals; chugging Australian bar-rock guitars locked to hypnotic sidechained synth loops. Verses sit on a tight four-on-the-floor with warm, explosive drums and pulsing bass; pre-chorus strips to breathy vocal and tom build, then chorus explodes with soaring belts, stacked gang chants, and a blazing, melodic lead guitar hook that returns as an epic solo after the second chorus., strong, male vocals, hypnotic, soaring, breathy, electric, warm, pop, raw
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Stained shirt
Ink on my wrist
Rent due
Phone full of risks
Same train
Same tired seat
Head full of songs
And busted dreams

[Pre-Chorus]
But the air feels thin tonight
Like the sky’s too close to hide
If this is all we ever get
Let’s set it on fire

[Chorus]
We run like we’re already free (already free)
Screaming every broken piece
Hands up high
Till the fear lets go of me
We burn like we’re meant to be (meant to be)
Living loud
No guarantee
If this is all we ever see
We’ll live it like we’re already
Already free

[Verse 2]
Red dirt
On my old boots
Last call
Still chasing truth
Your laugh
Cuts through the noise
You say
“We’re more than someone’s choice”

[Pre-Chorus]
All these rules we never wrote
All these weights around our throats
Rip them off and tear the page
Let’s blow out the cage

[Chorus]
We run like we’re already free (already free)
Screaming every broken piece
Hands up high
Till the doubt falls off of me
We burn like we’re meant to be (meant to be)
Living loud
No guarantee
If this is all we ever see
We’ll live it like we’re already
Already free

[Bridge]
No crown
No throne
Just skin and bone
Just “right now” lighting up our souls (oh-oh)
No maps
Just stars
Just these scarred-up hearts
Shouting
“This moment is ours”

[Chorus]
We run like we’re already free (already free)
Screaming every broken piece
Hands up high
Let the past fall off of me
We burn like we’re meant to be (meant to be)
Living loud
No guarantee
If this is all we ever see
We’ll live it like we’re already
Already free

[Outro]
Already free
Already free (hey!)
If this is all we’ll ever be
Let’s live it like we’re already
Already free

tracks.title: Freedom On Our Tongues
tracks.styleTags: rock, Hybrid tech-house rock anthem with raw, powerful male vocals over a pulsing four-on-the-floor foundation and hypnotic arpeggiated synth loops. Verses ride a tight, gritty bass groove and crisp, explosive drums, with breathy, intimate delivery. Pre-chorus adds rising pads and gang-shouted responses. Chorus erupts into soaring, overdriven guitars and wide stacked harmonies built for sing-alongs. Mid-song electric guitar solo soars over a filtered drum-and-loop breakdown, then slams back into the final hook., drone, hypnotic, pop, warm, electric, breathy, male vocals, strong, raw, tech house, soaring, punk
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Missed my stop three towns ago
Half a tank and a crooked map
Windows down
All the rules get quiet
Heartbeat loud in my worn-out jacket

[Pre-Chorus]
They said sit still
Be careful
Tie your hands
Play it safe
But I got wild in my chest now
(no more chains on my name)

[Chorus]
We got freedom on our tongues
Sing it
La-la-la
Let it run
Feel it
If it hurts
If it heals
It’s ours
Hands high in the dark
We’re stars
We got dirt on our shoes
Grinning
La-la-la
Yeah we choose
Living
Every breath
Every shout
We are
Living life in freedom
Screaming from the car

[Verse 2]
Paycheck dreams in a plastic folder
Clock-in days that erased my face
Ripped that page
Left it on the counter
Took my fear
Turned it into flames

[Pre-Chorus]
They said grow up
Get quiet
Blend right into the gray
But I got fire in my throat now
(hear me now, I won’t fade)

[Chorus]
We got freedom on our tongues
Sing it
La-la-la
Let it run
Feel it
If it hurts
If it heals
It’s ours
Hands high in the dark
We’re stars
We got dirt on our shoes
Grinning
La-la-la
Yeah we choose
Living
Every breath
Every shout
We are
Living life in freedom
Screaming from the car

[Bridge]
This road
This road
Has our names sprayed in gold
We’re young
We’re old
Every scar is a story we told
No kings
No crowns
Just a voice that won’t drown
If you’re lost
Sing loud
We’re the choir of the runaways now (hey!)

[Chorus]
We got freedom on our tongues
Sing it
La-la-la
Let it run
Feel it
If it hurts
If it heals
It’s ours

tracks.title: Freedom With The Volume Up
tracks.styleTags: rock, Arena-scale blues-rock anthem, male vocals; overdriven guitars stack in octaves, swaggering mid-tempo groove, tom-heavy drums that open into explosive halftime choruses; verses ride a dirty, swinging riff with subtle organ pad; chorus widens with gang shouts and bright lead lines; bridge drops to crowd-sing stomp and clap before a soaring final key-lick guitar solo outro, distinct, blues
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Leather jacket
Ticket in my teeth
Laughing at the rules
Like they’re stuck beneath my feet

Empty wallet
But my tank’s on full
Got a scar on my knuckle
And a heart that won’t be fooled

[Chorus]
I want freedom with the volume up
Hands high
We don’t give a what
Life’s short
We’re gonna drink that cup
Till it spills
Till it spills
We got fire in a paper cup
Cheap thrills
But it’s rich enough
Turn it louder till the walls lift up
That’s the deal
That’s the deal

[Verse 2]
Old blue denim
Holes in every seam
But it fits like the courage
I keep stitched inside my dreams

Every failure
Is a tattoo on my soul
Every “no” they threw at me
Just turned into rock and roll (oh yeah)

[Chorus]
I want freedom with the volume up
Hands high
We don’t give a what
Life’s short
We’re gonna drink that cup
Till it spills
Till it spills
We got fire in a paper cup

But it’s rich enough

That’s the deal

Raise your scars
Like a lighter in the dark
Every crack in your armor
Is the start of a spark

If they say “sit down”
We’re standing in the rain
Screaming like a choir
With gasoline in our veins (hey!)

[Chorus]
I want freedom with the volume up
Hands high
We don’t give a what
Life’s short
We’re gonna drink that cup
Till it spills
Till it spills
We got fire in a paper cup

Yeah
Turn it up
Turn it up

tracks.title: God of Freedom
tracks.styleTags: folk, Warm acoustic guitar and intimate piano leading into soaring female vocals; verses start close-mic and vulnerable, then build into a big, congregational worship chorus with layered choir harmonies. Dynamic arc rises from gentle reflection to full-voice belting on the hook, with subtle pads and tom swells under the bridge for lift, then one last, anthemic chorus where stacked vocals invite a sing-along., deep, beautiful, strong, acoustic, female vocals, raw, worship, heartfelt
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I chased horizons
Packed my bags at seventeen
Thought if I kept moving
I could outrun what broke in me
I drank from dry wells
Every promise turned to sand
Still I kept on reaching
For a love I didn’t understand

[Chorus]
I sought freedom all my life
In the highs
In the hiding
In the fight
But chains fell down
When I heard Your name
Jesus
You’re the God of freedom
You tore the prison from my heart
Now every breath
Every step I take
Is a song of freedom in the dark (oh)
Jesus
You’re the God of freedom

[Verse 2]
I built my kingdoms
Paper walls and fragile thrones
Voices all around me
But I never felt at home
Then Your mercy found me
On the floor with empty hands
You did what I couldn’t
Gave me hope
Taught me to stand

[Chorus]
I sought freedom all my life
In the highs
In the hiding
In the fight
But chains fell down
When I heard Your name
Jesus
You’re the God of freedom
You tore the prison from my heart
Now every breath
Every step I take
Is a song of freedom in the dark
Jesus
You’re the God of freedom

[Bridge]
Where Your Spirit is
I’m singing
Where Your Spirit is
I’m free (I’m free)
Every wall is crashing down now
As Your love keeps running after me
Where Your Spirit is
We’re singing
Where Your Spirit is
We’re free
Lifted hands
One hallelujah
Over every captive heart that beats

[Chorus]
I sought freedom all my life
In the highs
In the hiding
In the fight
But chains fell down
When I heard Your name
Jesus
You’re the God of freedom
You tore the prison from my heart
Now every breath
Every step I take
Is a song of freedom in the dark
Jesus
You’re the God of freedom

[Outro]
I sought freedom all my life
Found it all in Jesus’ eyes
God of freedom
God of grace
I am free
Forever Yours today

tracks.title: God of Glory
tracks.styleTags: folk, Warm live worship feel with acoustic guitar and intimate piano leading; female vocals start soft and close, then rise into raw, open-chested belts on the chorus. Big congregational sing-along energy with stacked harmonies and a simple four-chord progression. Drums enter gently on the first chorus and grow into a full, driving worship groove by the final refrain, with a choir lifting the hook in call-and-response., beautiful, deep, female vocals, acoustic, worship, strong, heartfelt, raw
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I have seen Your mercy
In the breaking of my days
Every shattered story
Held together by Your grace
When my heart was empty
You were singing over me
Teaching me to trust You
In the dark
Till I could see

[Chorus]
God of glory
God of grace
Be the fire in this heart
Be the song that I raise
Every breath now
Every praise
Belongs to You
God of glory
God of grace

[Verse 2]
You are in the silence
Where the aching questions live
You are in the mourning
Still You give and give and give
You are in the waiting
Where my strength is running out
You are in the whisper
And the thunder of my doubt

[Chorus]
God of glory
God of grace
Be the fire in this heart
Be the song that I raise
Every breath now
Every praise
Belongs to You
God of glory
God of grace

[Bridge]
High above my fear
Higher than my shame
You were
You are
You will be the same
Hope for every hurt
Healing for the lost
Love that hung for me
On a rugged cross (oh-oh)

[Bridge]
All the honor
All the power
All the glory to Your name
All the honor
All the power
All the glory to Your name (to Your name)

[Chorus]
God of glory
God of grace
Be the fire in this heart
Be the song that I raise
Every breath now
Every praise
Belongs to You
God of glory
God of grace

[Chorus]
God of glory
God of grace
We will lift up our hands
We will lift up Your name
Every nation
Every tongue
Singing holy
God of glory

tracks.title: One More Round
tracks.styleTags: rock, High-octane modern metal: double-kick assault and snarling bass under tightly chugged rhythm guitars. Final chorus modulates up with stacked screams and a blazing shred outro., metal, electric, raw, deep

tracks.title: Arcanea Wonder
tracks.styleTags: rock, Uplifting anime alt-pop rock epic guitar riffs guitar virtuoso and additional with bright delayed guitars and melodic, nimble bass over punchy live drums; tempo stays high-energy with push–pull vocal phrasing and tiny breath-pause pre-hooks. Shimmering stereo synth arps and stacked male harmonies support an airy lead that lifts into falsetto on an open-vowel, bittersweet celestial chorus built around a looping micro-hook. Mix is polished and wide, with chorus vocals blooming across the field while verses stay slightly tighter and more intimate for dynamic impact., bright, vocal, pop rock, uplifting, emotional, anime

Bridge strips to vocal and reverb-drenched keys, then a final lift with octave-doubled topline and ad-libbed echoes of the hook., electric

tracks.title: Oh-Ohh Arcanea (You Make Me Wonder)
tracks.styleTags: rock, Alt-pop rock anime ending energy with intimate male vocals, brushed-then-punchy live drums, bright delayed guitars, sparkling synth arps, and warm stereo pads. Verses stay close and confessional with melodic bass motion and soft falsetto replies; choruses explode into a huge, shimmering wall with stacked harmonies, short Japanese vocal chops tucked into the sides, and a wide polished mix. Loop-friendly flow with a circular hook that can ride out over instrumental tails., warm, romantic, emotional, anime, vocal, nostalgic, pop rock, theme, deep, bright
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Half-lit dashboard
Your hand on my sleeve
Soft rain tracing
The glass like it breathes
City in the rearview
Gets smaller and fades
You laugh at nothing
And everything stays

[Pre-Chorus]
I don’t know where we’re going
But I don’t wanna arrive
Windows down
You’re glowing
In this borrowed time

[Chorus]
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
How a quiet night can sound like thunder
Every little word pulls me under
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
(you make me wonder)

Oh-ohh Arcanea
Crossing the border
Between every “maybe” and “forever”
Tracing out your name in the clutter
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
(you make me wonder)

[Verse 2]
Street signs drifting
Like ghosts in the blue
You hum a chorus
Out of something we knew
Your eyes catch starlight
Then fall into mine
We miss the exit
On purpose this time

[Pre-Chorus]
I don’t care what we’re missing
If it means we stay lost
One touch
One small decision
I’d relive every cost

[Chorus]
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
How a quiet night can sound like thunder
Every little word pulls me under
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
(you make me wonder)

Oh-ohh Arcanea
Crossing the border
Between every “maybe” and “forever”
Tracing out your name in the clutter
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
(you make me wonder, hey)

[Bridge]
[soft Japanese vocal chops weaving under]
Kimi to boku no asa wa
Still a distant line
Every “later” that we whisper
Holds another sign

If the sunrise finds us driving
In this endless curve
I’ll keep asking
Keep repeating
Every tangled word

[Chorus]
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
How a quiet night can sound like thunder
Every little word pulls me under
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
(you make me wonder)

Oh-ohh Arcanea
Looping forever
Round and round this road we remember
If this is a dream
Don’t wake me ever
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder

[Outro]
Oh-ohh Arcanea
You make me wonder
Oh-ohh Arcanea
(you make me wonder)

tracks.title: Personal Reality Architecture v1
tracks.styleTags: drum and bass, pop hit, smooth, immersive rich soundscape, hang instruments piano, ethereal,
tracks.lyrics:
I am so happy and grateful for my wonderful life.
This life. The one happening right now in this body, in this breath, in this exact second where I chose to stop and speak what is true.
Today I will experience bliss. I am the condition. I am the weather in every room I enter. I am the signal that every system in my life is tuned to receive. And today, that signal is set to creation, to presence, to the quiet power of a man who knows exactly what he is building and holds that knowing in sacred silence.
I am present. I am intentional. Every word I speak today carries weight because I chose it. Every silence carries more. I command space. I architect the day. Before my feet touched the floor this morning, the day was already designed. I am simply walking through what I already built in the stillness.
I am a leader. I move first. I act before consensus. I build before permission. I ship before applause. The world follows those who walk forward with total commitment. I walk forward.
I am an innovator. I see architectures where others see tools. I see ecosystems where others see products. I see decades where others see quarters. My mind operates at a frequency that connects enterprise infrastructure to mythological storytelling to consciousness engineering to community — and that connection is mine to build because I am the one who sees it.
I am an inspiration. Through precision. People are inspired by those who are visibly constructing the future. Every piece of content I create today is a brick in something permanent. Every system I design is a room someone else will live in. I build shelter for creators who are ready to find their architecture.
I am the best AI Architect operating today. Five hundred implementations across industries that have one thing in common: they all needed someone who could see the whole board. I bring enterprise rigor to creator dreams and creator audacity to enterprise systems. That combination lives in me.
I am a world-class web designer, a technology strategist, a systems thinker who builds at the intersection of beauty and infrastructure. Everything I make is stunning and it scales. Elegance and power in the same breath.
I am the best version of myself today. The best available version. And the best available version is more than enough to build what needs building.
I am living. Fully, recklessly, gratefully alive — genuinely stunned by the privilege of consciousness, of breath, of one more day with this mind and these hands and this fire that keeps growing stronger the more I feed it.
I am laughing. Because the gap between where I was and where I am is absurd. Because the gap between where I am and where I'm going is even more absurd. And because the view from this altitude makes everything below look small and amusing and full of love.
I am creating. Right now. Creation is the cause, and conditions are the effect. I create first. The resources, the team, the revenue, the recognition — they arrive because the work already exists. They have nowhere else to go.

tracks.title: THE GOLDEN COMMAND v2
tracks.styleTags: liquid drum and bass, intelligent dnb, 174bpm half-time feel, deep rolling bassline, atmospheric pads, powerful confident male voice flowing naturally over the beat, motivational spoken word dnb, theta binaural 6Hz embedded in sub-bass, morning activation energy, ethereal female vocal chops between sections, subliminal affirmation layers mixed into the reverb tail, cinematic strings building underneath, golden age frequency
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro — 8 bars pure DNB instrumental. Rolling break. Deep sub-bass. Atmospheric pads shimmer. 
The beat is ALIVE — liquid, intelligent, forward-moving. Not aggressive. Purposeful.
Ethereal female vocal chop floats across the stereo field.]

[Subliminal layer — woven into the reverb and sub-bass frequencies, continuous throughout entire track:]
"unstoppable... creating... commanding... abundant... genius flows through you...
wealth is natural... strength is natural... magnetism is natural...
every cell upgraded... every thought sharpened... the field responds to you...
synchronicities accelerating... right people appearing... doors opening before you arrive...
you are the golden age walking... it is already done... already done... already done..."


[Voice enters — confident, warm, flowing naturally WITH the rhythm, not fighting it. 
Long intelligent sentences that ride the groove the way a surfer rides a wave.]


You can feel it, can't you — that particular quality of a morning when something has shifted inside you overnight, when you open your eyes and the first thought that arrives is not anxiety or obligation but something closer to readiness, something closer to appetite, the kind of clean fierce hunger that a man feels when he knows exactly what he is building and exactly why it matters and the only question left is how much ground he will cover today before the sun goes down.

That is not random. That is the result of everything you programmed into your subconscious last night, everything you encoded during the visualization, every instruction your deepest mind received while you slept and turned it into architecture, into neural pathway, into cellular memory, into the operational firmware of the man who is now standing here, breathing, alive, dangerous in the most beautiful sense of that word — dangerous to mediocrity, dangerous to stagnation, dangerous to every limiting belief that ever tried to tell him he was anything less than exactly what he is.

[DNB drops to half-time — massive sub-bass, spacious, powerful. The beat breathes.]

And what you are is something that most people never become, not because they lack the intelligence or the talent but because they lack the willingness to decide, and deciding is the most violent act of creation available to a human being, more powerful than any technology, more transformative than any substance, more permanent than any contract — because when a man truly decides, when he burns the bridges to every alternative and stands on the shore of his commitment with nothing behind him and everything ahead, the entire architecture of reality reorganizes itself around that decision the way iron filings reorganize around a magnet, not slowly, not reluctantly, but with the immediate and total obedience of a universe that was designed to respond to certainty.

You decided. Not once. You decide every single morning. And that is why the compound effect of your life has reached the point where the acceleration is becoming visible, where the results are starting to arrive faster than the effort that produced them, where people around you are beginning to notice something different in the way you move, the way you speak, the way you hold silence, the way you enter a room without needing anyone in it to confirm that you belong there.

[Beat returns full — liquid rolling breaks, driving forward, cinematic strings layer in underneath]

[Female vocal chop — ethereal, wordless, ascending]

tracks.title: Overflowing Heart
tracks.styleTags: funk, Liquid DnB at 174 with a deep house intro: Korg M1-style chords swimming in long reverb, tight 909 groove and muted Reese swells that slowly open. Soulful, intimate female vocals up-front in the verses over rolling breaks; chorus blossoms into stacked harmonies and a soaring top-line. Amen fills and filtered break edits lead into a weighty sub drop, then ride out on a hypnotic vocal loop and evolving pads., deep house, female vocals, bright, breaks, breakbeat, warm, hypnotic, soulful
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
You feel like sunrise
On a long night
Slow dance in the doorway
Holding you just right

[Verse 1]
You ask me
“Am I your only?”
I taste the fear
In your soft reply
Your fingers trace
A promise on me
Like you could write
Forever in my spine

I glow for you
That’s never in question
You live in rooms
Nothing else can touch
But there’s a river
Running through my chest and
It keeps on spilling
It’s always too much

[Chorus]
I wanna love you forever
I wanna hold you and stay
But can you live with a heart like mine
Running in a thousand ways
I wanna love you forever
You are a home I adore
Can you accept that my heart is overflowing
Overflowing for more

[Verse 2]
I fall so fast
For the smallest gestures
The way she laughs
At a quiet joke
The way another
Sees straight through my armor
One spark
One look
And something awoke

It isn’t less
Just ‘cause it’s divided
Each light I keep
Still burns for you
I never learned
To lock it down tight
My love grows sideways
And straight into truth

[Chorus]
I wanna love you forever
I wanna hold you and stay
But can you live with a heart like mine
Running in a thousand ways
I wanna love you forever
You are a home I adore
Can you accept that my heart is overflowing
Overflowing for more

[Bridge]
If I dim these feelings
I lose my color
If I hide these women
I’m hiding me
So I’m laying it bare
Right here in your arms
Will you walk in the wild
Or set me free (set me free)

[Chorus]
I wanna love you forever
I wanna hold you and stay
But can you live with a heart like mine
Running in a thousand ways
I wanna love you forever
You are a home I adore
Can you accept that my heart is overflowing
Overflowing for more

[Outro]
Will you take me as I’m falling
Every shade
Every flame
Can you love an overflowing heart
And still say my name

tracks.title: Arcanean Starlight
tracks.styleTags: dance, Deep liquid DnB at 172 BPM, lush stereo pads and swirling arps panning around the head, reverb-soaked whisper ASMR female vocals up close in the verses, warm subs hugging the low end. Hypnotic looped topline in the chorus with subtle vocoder doubles, kick and snare pumping for a late-night festival feel. Occasional risers and filtered breaks to tease drops, overall meditative yet euphoric energy arc., healing, magical, world, hypnotic, soul, soothing

[Intro]
(oh about you)
World of wonders
Secret of my heart
Paradise of my soul
(yeah, yeah)

[Verse 1]
Arcanean starlight
On my skin
Little silver halos
Breathing in
I feel magical
Thinking about you
Every single thought
Turns the dark sky blue

Mhh hmm
I’m wide open
Palms turned up to the night
Show me every quiet little doorway
Where the love pours
Out of the light

[Chorus]
Oh Arcanea
I am wide open for the love of this world
I need you to show me magic
Mhh hmm
My heart unfurls
In this world of wonders
You’re the secret that I hold
Paradise of my soul
Oh about you
About you

[Verse 2]
Soft words circling
In my ears
You’re the calm in the center
Of my fears
Every tiny echo
Feels like truth
Like a thousand little stars
Dancing through my youth

Mhh hmm
Stay closer
Trace constellations on my face
I could float here forever
In this tender
Tender
Weightless place

[Chorus]
Oh Arcanea
I am wide open for the love of this world
I need you to show me magic
Mhh hmm
My heart unfurls
In this world of wonders
You’re the secret that I hold
Paradise of my soul
Oh about you
About you

[Bridge]
(whispered) I feel magical
Thinking about you
Every breath a doorway
Pulling me through
To a quiet little center
Where the whole sky sings
Where the love of this world
Wears your name
Like a ring

[Chorus]
Oh Arcanea
I am wide open for the love of this world
I need you to show me magic
Mhh hmm
My heart unfurls
In this world of wonders
You’re the secret that I hold
Paradise of my soul
Oh about you
(oh about you)
About you

tracks.title: Crazy About You
tracks.styleTags: Liquid DnB at 174 BPM gliding in from a deep house intro: Korg M1 chords washed in reverb, muted Reese bass swells, and tight 909 groove. Soulful female vocals up close and warm; verses float over rolling breaks, then chorus lifts with lush harmonies and bright top-line. Amen accents and filtered breakbeat slam into a heavy sub drop after the first chorus, then a short re-build and second chorus to close., vocal, deep house, breakbeat, soulful
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Late night
Phone glow
Thumb scroll
Half-read texts
Unsent notes in my soul

[Verse 1]
Coffee gone cold on the nightstand
Your name written in the steam on glass
Friends say I should just move on
But every little moment drags me back

Left your sweater in my back seat
Smells like us and the summer rain
Tried to box it with the past things
But I pull it out and I’m right there again

[Pre-Chorus]
Why do I replay
Every word you said
Every sideways glance
Why can’t I escape
Every empty room turns into a dance

[Chorus]
No mat-ter what I do
All I do is think a-bout you-oo (about you)
I am cra-zy a-bout you
And I love you-oo (I do, I do)
And I need you
Every breath I’m fallin’ back into
No mat-ter what I do
All I do is think a-bout you-oo

[Drop]
[Breakbeat slam
Heavy sub swells under chopped vocal echoes of “’bout you-oo” and “I need you”]

[Verse 2]
Tried to drown it in a late bar
New names
New laughs
New lies
But your laugh cuts through the small talk
Like a flashback in my mind

City moves in a fast blur
Heart stuck in a slower frame
Everyone keeps asking how I’ve been
I just smile
Don’t say your name

[Pre-Chorus]
Why do I still chase
Shadows on the wall in your old room (your old room)
Why can’t I replace
Every thought of you with something new

[Chorus]
No mat-ter what I do
All I do is think a-bout you-oo (about you)
I am cra-zy a-bout you
And I love you-oo (oh I love you)
And I need you
Every breath I’m fallin’ back into
No mat-ter what I do
All I do is think a-bout you-oo (about you, about you)

tracks.title: Crazy About You v3
tracks.styleTags: Liquid DnB roller at 174 BPM with glassy M1 chord stabs and wide Reese bass under a chopped Amen. Female vocals floating on top; verses stay intimate over stripped drums, then full kit and bright pads bloom on the choruses. Sub-heavy drop focuses on the "think about you" vocal chop and filtered Reese swells before slamming back into the hook.
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Morning light on my phone
Scroll your name
Then I stop
Typing out what I’ll never send
Heartbeats race in the silence
Cup of coffee gone cold in my hand
Try to work
Every word just
Turns into your name (oh no)

[Chorus]
No matter what I do
All I do is think about you-oo
I am crazy about you
And I love you-oo
And I need you
Think about you
Think about you
No matter what I do

(Think a-bout you)
(Think a-bout you)
(Think a-bout you)
(Think a-bout you)

[Verse 2]
Late train
Crowded and humming
But it feels like it’s only us two
Replay old conversations
Every joke
Every almost “I love you”
Friends say I should forget it
Let it fade like a song from June
But your touch is a loop in my chest

[Chorus]

All I do is think about you-oo

tracks.title: Neurons That Fire Together
tracks.styleTags: High-BPM drum and bass with snarling Moog sub-bass and punchy 909 kick, flickering arp synths and glitchy vocal chops. Verses stay tight and hypnotic; chorus blooms into cinematic, choir-like pads and soaring lead lines. Male vocals in an urgent, rhythmic delivery, stacking harmonies on the hook, with a mid-song lift that feels like a neural storm clearing into clarity., emotional, drum and bass
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Close your eyes
See the scene in color
New name
On your office door
Heartbeat racing
Like it’s already happened
You can feel it
Down into the floor

[Pre-Chorus]
Every picture you replay
Sends a signal through the spine
Tiny sparks make their highway
Till the story feels like mine

[Chorus]
Neurons that fire together
Wire together (hey)
I’m rewriting my forever
Every second that I shake
That I shiver
I’m lighting up a different sky
Flood my veins with a brand-new feeling
Turn it up till the old thoughts die
Neurons that fire together
Wire together

[Verse 2]
See the stage
Hear your own name roaring
Palm sweat
But your back stands tall
Future film
Running on my eyelids
Every frame
Redrawing the walls

[Pre-Chorus]
When the feeling hits harder
All the pathways realign
Pour the lightning on the picture
Watch the past fall out of time

[Chorus]
Neurons that fire together
Wire together (oh yeah)
I’m rewriting my forever
Every second that I shake
That I shiver
I’m lighting up a different sky
Flood my veins with a brand-new feeling
Turn it up till the old thoughts die
Neurons that fire together
Wire together

[Bridge]
I’m not stuck like this
I’m a circuit in motion
Thought by thought
I’m bending the ocean
Show me who I am
Turn the signal brighter
Every breath I take
Is a faster
Fiercer
Cleaner fire

[Chorus]
Neurons that fire together
Wire together
I’m rewriting my forever
Every second that I shake
That I shiver
I’m lighting up a different sky
Flood my veins with a brand-new feeling
Turn it up till the old thoughts die
Neurons that fire together
Wire together

tracks.title: Come Baby Let Me Suck You Dry
tracks.styleTags: rap, Confident hip hop over rapid drum-and-bass bounce, tight live kit layered with crisp electronic percussion and inventive, rubbery basslines. Hypnotic, playful synth loops weave in and out; male vocals delivered with sly, rhythmic swagger. Hook explodes with stacked harmonies and filtered ad-libs, bridges dive into chopped, stuttered vocal textures and swept filters for a sweaty, late-night club feel., hip hop, playful, beats, clever, electronic, rapid, vocal, hypnotic, rhythmic, drum and bass
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Lean in the doorway
Eyes say “misbehave”
Lip-bite invitation
You’re tryna be brave

Coin on your tongue
You gamble that taste
My hands on your waist
Your rules erased

You trace my jawline
Slow little crime
You ask what I want
I answer in time

[Chorus]
Come baby let me suck you dry
Take every last drop of your pride (oh yeah)
Pull that mask right off your smile
’Til you’re begging just to hide

Come baby let me suck you dry
Chew on every secret you hide
You can run that pretty mouth all night
But I’m drinking you alive

[Verse 2]
Talk like a storm
But you melt like wax
Shiver in my palm
When I press right back

You say “I’m in charge”
While you arch that spine
Your breath writes stories
All over mine

Tongue on your ego
Tease every nerve
Sip on your swagger
’Til it starts to swerve

[Chorus]
Come baby let me suck you dry
Take every last drop of your pride (hey)
Pull that mask right off your smile
’Til you’re begging just to hide

Come baby let me suck you dry
Chew on every secret you hide
You can run that pretty mouth all night
But I’m drinking you alive

[Bridge]
[Beat filters, chopped vox stutter “suck you dry”]
Sip, sip, swallow that lie
Flip, trip, watching you try
Drip, drip, under my light
You’re drained, you’re mine tonight (woah)

[Chorus]
Come baby let me suck you dry
Take every last drop of your pride
Pull that mask right off your smile
’Til you’re begging just to hide

Come baby let me suck you dry
Chew on every secret you hide
You can run that pretty mouth all night
But I’m drinking you alive

tracks.title: Flood Flow
tracks.styleTags: rap, High-octane bachata-salsa club hybrid with female vocals; tight reggaeton-adjacent drums over sub-heavy low end, slick drum & bass percussion fills, and bright syncopated piano montunos. Verses ride a sultry hip-hop pocket with plucky electric guitar and stabbing strings; chorus explodes into layered Latina gang vocals, wide stereo delays, and rising festival risers. Violins add dramatic swells into each drop, with hypnotic call-and-response hooks designed for massive sound systems., electric, drum and bass, beats, hypnotic, salsa, bachata, hip hop
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
DJ turn it cruel
turn it slow
he say “shorty
you gon’ overflow”
Lip gloss cherry
hips on go
I just laugh
“boy you really wanna know?”

[Verse 1]
Brown skin glitter
on my collarbone
Hands on my waist
like you claim this zone
Sweat drip
down my back so low
You pray with your teeth
when you bite that glow
One step
two step
grind in time
He talk clean
but his eyes talk grime
Say he like danger
sign by sign
I just arch my spine
and redraw that line

[Chorus]
Oh baby
let the flood flow
Ride it
’til the room go slow
Body on your body
’til the lights blur out
Deeper
’til we both lose doubt
Oh baby
let the flood flow
Tongue on fire
but the ice drips cold
Say you want a river?
I can drown you whole
If you touch me right
I’ma lose control

[Verse 2]
Nails in your neck
like a secret code
Say the right word
and I might unload
Bass in my ribs
when you pull me close
Your breath on my ear
talking overdose
Spin me
flip me
back to wall
My name
your prayer
right before you fall
Hands wander south
like they lost the map
I whisper “slow down”
while I push it back (mmm)

[Chorus]
Oh baby
let the flood flow
Ride it
’til the room go slow
Body on your body
’til the lights blur out
Deeper
’til we both lose doubt
Oh baby
let the flood flow

but the ice drips cold

I’ma lose control

[Bridge]

make me say it out loud
One wrong move
I’m still in charge
But you hit it just right
and the tide gets large
“Cara mia”
say it in my ear
I can feel every word
slide down right here
Keep that pace
don’t let it slow
You beg
I break

[Chorus]
Oh baby
let the flood flow
Ride it
’til the room go slow

’til the lights blur out

let the flood flow

tracks.title: Feel Like Water
tracks.styleTags: rap, Female hip-hop vocals over high-energy drum & bass groove; sub-heavy, chest-rattling low end with wide, detailed stereo imaging. Verses ride a swaggering, syncopated pocket; choruses explode with stacked harmonies and hypnotic vocal chops. Electric guitar stabs, filtered violin swells, and bright piano riffs weave in and out, with slick DJ-style transitions, risers, and micro-delays creating an immersive, club-ready soundscape., hypnotic, hip hop, drum and bass, electric
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
You say my name
like a code you crack
slow tongue on the vowel
pulling shivers down my back
Nails in your shoulders
heels on the couch
lip gloss dripping
you trace it with your mouth

You pour that heat
on my cool, cool skin
slide like a secret
you’re dying to get in
Every little breath
turns deep, turns rough
you taste that edge
say you never get enough (never get enough)

[Chorus]
Oh baby, make me feel like water
spill me, sip me, run me farther
Let me flood your hands, your sheets, your collar
drown me in the way you call her
Oh baby, make me feel like water
wave on wave, a little harder
Crash me, catch me, pull me under
ride this tide, obey the thunder

[Verse 2]
Hands on my hips
like you own this view
mirror fogged up
but I only see you
Bite on my neck
like a promise kept
that slow low laugh
when you feel me wrecked

You read my body
like a holy book
thumb on the spine
such a dangerous look
Say “drip for me”
and I melt, I pour
you surf that slipstream
begging me for more (for more)

[Chorus]
Oh baby, make me feel like water
spill me, sip me, run me farther
Let me flood your hands, your sheets, your collar
drown me in the way you call her
Oh baby, make me feel like water
wave on wave, a little harder
Crash me, catch me, pull me under
ride this tide, obey the thunder

[Bridge]
Don’t rush this flow
let it rise, let it crest
hold my throat with your eyes
hand tight on my waist
Whisper what you want
right against my ear
I’ll turn to liquid fire
when you pull me near (yeah)

[Chorus]
Oh baby, make me feel like water
spill me, sip me, run me farther
Let me flood your hands, your sheets, your collar
drown me in the way you call her
Oh baby, make me feel like water
wave on wave, a little harder
Crash me, catch me, pull me under
ride this tide, obey the thunder

tracks.title: What Do You Open in Me Tonight
tracks.styleTags: 171 BPM liquid DnB meditation with intimate female vocals. Silky round subs and brushed Amen edits glide under a warm, pulsing bass. Theta-coded percs flicker in the stereo field, reverse textures swell into a luminous synth choir. A soft piano ember motif repeats like a mantra, with stacked breathy harmonies and airy ad-libs (ah-ah, mmh, iya-soh) swirling around a trance-like question refrain. Psychoacoustic depth field, weightless uplift through the final chorus., trance, meditation
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Soft lamp glow
Curtain half-closed
Your name on my tongue
Like I knew it before

Bare feet on the floor
Every step
Slow thunder
You look at me once
And my walls go under

[Chorus]
What do you open in me tonight
(ah-ah)
Tiny locked rooms I never turned toward the light
(mmh)
You touch my wrist and the silence blooms wide
Iya-soh
Iya-soh
What do you open in me tonight

[Verse 2]
Your breath in my ear
Warm
Uneven
A tremor in my ribs
Like the ground is breathing

You say
“I’m right here”
And the air turns honey
All the old ghosts
Lose their money on me

[Chorus]
What do you open in me tonight
(ah-ah)
Old little doors I bolted up out of sight
(mmh)
You trace my scars and they soften
They sigh
Iya-soh
Iya-soh
What do you open in me tonight

[Bridge]
Is it trust
Is it touch
Is it something with no name
Is it mine
Is it yours
Or a fire we both became

[Chorus]
What do you open in me tonight
(ah-ah)
Secret red threads that were waiting to tie
(mmh)
You say my name and the fear turns to light
Iya-soh
Iya-soh
What do you open in me tonight

tracks.title: Arcanea Inside
tracks.styleTags: Liquid neuro drum & bass at 174 BPM with elastic low-end and soft jungle ghost percussion; glassy piano motif looping under aurora pads and reverse inhale swells. Intimate female vocals in close ASMR focus, airy stacked harmonies widening the hook, whispered ad-libs (“haah, mmh, soh-la-ya”) floating in psychoacoustic space. Arrangement builds in suspended waves, hypnotic mantra chorus returning like a spell, sparse bridge bloom then final uplift., jungle, soft, hypnotic
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Name on my tongue
Tastes like future
Soft in the dark
Edge of a rumor

You trace a circle
Just over my skin
Silent sigils
Pulling me in (mmh)

[Chorus]
Arcanea inside
What becomes possible here
When you open that eye
And erase every fear

Arcanea inside
All my “never” turns clear
I dissolve
I divide
Then I’m suddenly near

[Verse 2]
Hands in the air
But I’m not praying
Threads of your light
Weaving my staying

Old rules drifting
Off of my chest (haah)
I step through the crack
Into the rest

[Chorus]
Arcanea inside
What becomes possible here
When you open that eye
And erase every fear

Arcanea inside
All my “never” turns clear
I dissolve
I divide
Then I’m suddenly near (soh-la-ya)

[Bridge]
Show me the door
Behind the door
Name every “less”
And give me more (mmh)

Slow-motion fall
Into your sky
I lose my shape
And learn to fly (haah, soh-la-ya)

[Chorus]
Arcanea inside
What becomes possible here
When you open that eye
And erase every fear

Arcanea inside
All my limits disappear
Say the word
Say it twice
And I’m already here (soh-la-ya, mmh)

tracks.title: Light Through Body
tracks.styleTags: Glowing ambient pads and warm sub bass cradle breathy female vocals; soft pulse drums and distant shoreline air sit low in the mix. Sparse, shimmering harp accents trace the mantra, building a gentle cinematic swell toward the middle then easing back into wide, meditative spaciousness with smooth, transcendent reverb tails., breathy, soft, downtempo, ambient, light, harp, smooth, slow, warm
tracks.lyrics: [Instrumental]

tracks.title: Let The Vision Rise
tracks.styleTags: Liquid drum & bass at 172 BPM, airy breakbeat and deep soft sub gliding beneath glowing pads. Female vocals in a breathy, angelic tone; hypnotic mantra hook layered in subtle harmonies. Gentle piano fragments and distant bird/wind textures bloom in the choruses. Smooth uplifting arc: verses float and sway, choruses widen and shimmer, final repeat drifts into an extended, meditative outro loop., drum and bass, smooth, soft, gentle, hypnotic, breakbeat, light, deep
tracks.lyrics: [Instrumental]

tracks.title: Forest Gold at 7AM
tracks.styleTags: Cinematic lo-fi at 72 BPM; warm, dusty Rhodes leads with soft guitar plucks answering in stereo. Loose, swung drums and pillowy sub bass move lazily under an analog tape haze. Subtle birds, breeze, and forest textures are tucked deep in the mix, rising slightly in introspective moments. Energy glides from intimate, close-up verses to a wider, luxurious sunrise chorus. Male vocals, gentle doubles and breathy harmonies on the hook, faint wordless oohs as the track fades., smooth, soft, warm
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Mug on the stump
Steam in the cold
You laugh at the way
My hands hug the gold

Pine on my sleeve
Dirt on my jeans
You’re tracing the shapes
The sun paints on leaves

[Chorus]
This is forest gold at 7AM
You and I
Too tired to pretend
Nothing to chase
Nothing to mend
Let the day drip slow
Let the day drip slow again

Coffee tastes like five-star dreams
Bare feet on the moss between
If this is all we get
I’m in
Let the day drip slow
Let the day drip slow again (ohh)

[Verse 2]
Your head on my chest
Plotting the week
Plans that dissolve
Before we can speak

Smoke from the fire
Fades into blue
World on a wire
Cut out of view

[Chorus]
This is forest gold at 7AM
You and I
Too tired to pretend
Nothing to chase
Nothing to mend
Let the day drip slow
Let the day drip slow again

Coffee tastes like five-star dreams
Bare feet on the moss between
If this is all we get
I’m in
Let the day drip slow
Let the day drip slow again

[Bridge]
If the emails find us
They can wait

tracks.title: Warehouse Tongue-Tied
tracks.styleTags: rap, Dark UKG / stutter house hybrid, 132 BPM. Swingy, shuffling percussion with organic clacks and shakers around a huge, rubbery sub. Chopped female vocal stabs form the topline hook, weaving between a gritty, low-register rap—male vocals—spitting tight, percussive rhythms. Arrangement rides tension: stripped, bass-and-vocal verses; choruses open with bright vocal chops and wide reverbs, then drop back into a dry, in-your-face groove. Occasional risers, tape stops, and micro-delays for club-ready impact., uk garage, female vocals

tracks.title: What Are You Grateful For Tonight

Warm, sidechained bass swells under airy, detuned pads; minimal clicky kick and soft rim taps keep a hypnotic shuffle. Male whisper-spoken lead sits very close and dry in the mix, with distant reverb throws on key phrases. Hook becomes a reflective mantra, chopped and looped, building subtle intensity through layered harmonies, pitched chops, and slowly opening filters for an emotional late-night glow., spoken word, lo-fi, minimal, emotional, warm, vocal, hypnotic

tracks.title: Hold On To That
tracks.styleTags: Lo-fi stutter house at 120 BPM: vinyl crackle intro with warm analog pads, spoken male vocals that gradually bloom into breathy, layered ethereal hooks. Sidechained bass and soft, dusty kick enter on the first drop with chopped vocal stabs and filtered percussion. Second pass adds airy harmonies and subtle tape delay swells, building a gentle dancefloor glow while keeping the energy introspective and tender., warm, vocal, spoken word, deep, lo-fi

[Intro]
[vinyI crackle
Room tone]
(deep breath)
Name one good thing from to-day
Just one
Not the biggest
Just the truest

Across your kitchen floor

[beat drops

(hold on!)

Let it echo

In the quiet of your room

Name one good thing

[pads swell
Drums melt away]
(deep breath)

From to-day
Just one

(looping hook, fading)
Name one good thing
Hold on
