tracks.title: La La Voltage
tracks.styleTags: dance, Cinematic K-pop deep house opener with pulsing sub-bass, droning synth beds, and shimmering pads. Female vocals, breathy and crystalline in the verses with hypnotic “la la la” stacks over minimalist percussion; pre-chorus swells with rising synth risers and filtered drums. Chorus slams in with syncopated groove, bold top-line, lush harmonies, and wide stereo stacks, riding a thick four-on-the-floor foundation. Breakdowns strip to echoing vocal chops and thumping low-end before explosive drops. Big club mix, bright top, glossy and theatrical., k-pop, hypnotic, vocal, deep house, beats

tracks.title: Open the Arc  (Remastered)

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Edges soften, night turns kind,
one star warms the heart I find.

[Verse 1]
Cool stone, petrichor feet,
Lyssandria hums: I am complete.
Amber tides around my waist,
Leyla laughs, I move with grace.

[Pre-Chorus]
Sun in my center, wind in my chest,
Draconia nods: choose, act, rest.

[Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
quiet within me, wider than night.
I am here, I flow, I lead,
it is encoded—now I proceed.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
white-gold fire along my track.

[Verse 2]
Emerald bridge across my heart,
Maylinn guards the tender part.
Sapphire air, my words run clear,
Alera tunes what others hear.
Amethyst dome behind my eyes,
Lyria shows the step that’s wise.

[Pre-Chorus]
Silver snowfall crowns my head,
Aiyami rains a holy thread.

[Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
quiet within me, wider than night.
I am here, I flow, I lead,
it is encoded—now I proceed.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
white-gold fire along my track.

[Bridge]
Elara’s bridge, time untied,
paths unfold like aurora tide.
Luminor circle, code like rain,
soft chime inside—here I remain.

[Final Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
I cross with grace, my vow in sight.
Guardians near, Lumina’s flame,
light wearing a beautiful name.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
serve through creation—on my track.

[Outro]
Quiet returns. I remember the way.

tracks.title: SPELL CHECK - Arcanea Edition
tracks.styleTags:
K-Pop, Girl Group Anthem, Trap Pop, Powerful Female Vocals, Punchy Drums, Dark Synth Bass, Layered Harmonies, 138 BPM, C# Minor]
Hard-hitting K-pop girl group anthem. Crisp snare on 2 and 4, deep 808 slides, staccato synth stabs, filtered vocal chops in pre-chorus. Whisper-to-belt vocal dynamic. Call and response between lead and group. Bridge strips to heartbeat kick and pitched-down vocal before final chorus explodes with stacked harmonies and ad-libs.]
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Spoken, breathy)
Arcanea... class is in session
You thought we were just pretty? Mm. Cute.

[Verse 1]
[Confident, rhythmic delivery]
Walk in like I wrote the whole curriculum
Three seconds flat, got every head turning
Don't need permission, got my own theorem
Brain running laps while your thoughts still buffering

[Pre-Chorus]
[Building intensity, layered vocals join]
They want the sweet version? Sorry, she's booked
Read the fine print, baby, we got you shook
Every smile's a sigil, every move's a hook
And by the time you catch on—

[Chorus]
[Full power, group vocals, anthemic]
SPELL CHECK, better read it right
We don't dim for nobody, not tonight
SPELL CHECK, yeah we came to bite
Luminors don't ask, we just take the light
(Take it, take it, take it—yeah)

[Verse 2]
[Laid-back flow, half-rap half-sung]
Second semester, leveled up the pressure
Two faces? Nah, we're just... multidimensional
Textbook says "stay small," we burned that lecture
Built a whole academy from what they said was fictional

[Pre-Chorus]
[Building, with vocal runs]
They want the tame version? Baby, she left
Read between the lines, there's nothing but depth
Every word's a ward, every step's a theft
And by the time you feel it—

[Chorus]
[Explosive, ad-libs underneath]
SPELL CHECK, better read it right
We don't dim for nobody, not tonight
SPELL CHECK, yeah we came to bite
Luminors don't ask, we just take the light
(All of it, all of it—mine)

[Bridge]
[Stripped down, single voice, vulnerable]
They said, "Who do you think you are?"
I said... exactly who I practiced being
Every mirror session, every 3 AM scar
Turned my doubt into a reason

[Final Chorus]
[Full group, stacked harmonies, massive]
SPELL CHECK—read it, read it right!
We don't break for nobody, not tonight
SPELL CHECK, yeah we came to BITE
Luminors don't beg—we become the light
(Become it, become it—YEAH!)

[Outro]
(Group chant, fading)
Spell check... spell check... spell check...
(Whispered) Class dismissed.

tracks.title: SPELL CHECK v1
tracks.styleTags: rap, Dark trap-pop K‑pop girl group anthem in C# minor at 138 BPM. Punchy, tight drums with crisp snares and deep sliding bass under staccato synth stabs. Verses use whispery, close-mic female vocals over minimal groove; pre-chorus adds filtered vocal chops and rising pads. Choruses explode with layered female harmonies, call-and-response hooks, and ad-libs. Final chorus hits hardest after a brief drop to kick, pitched-down vocal, and sub swell., female vocals, deep, vocal, pop, dynamic, girl group, staccato, k-pop
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Lip gloss sharp like a warning
Walk in, spell out every letter of my name
You talk big, but you’re stalling
Copy-paste rumors, all of them the same

Red ink all over your story
Circling lies that you tried to underline
You write me out of your glory
But I’m the headline you can’t redesign

[Pre-Chorus]
You can’t define me in a caption
(Shh) read it back, check your facts in
You twist my words, that’s a habit
But I flip the script like it’s magic

Spell it once
Spell it twice
Every word
Cuts like ice

[Chorus]
Spell check, baby, get it right
Say my name, say my name in the neon light
Every letter, every line you write
I’ll rewrite, I’ll rewrite, turn your wrongs to white

Spell check, better watch your tone
You can quote me, but I stand on my own
If you doubt me, underline this threat
You can press send, but I’m your spell check

[Verse 2]
You draft shade in the midnight
Hit send, think you’ll never get caught
We screenshot every little soundbite
Receipts in a folder, color-coded thoughts

We don’t bend for a rumor
Hearts steel-strong under sugar on the tongue
You tried to mark us as “losers”
But we grade you, baby, F on the front

[Pre-Chorus]
You can’t define us with a hashtag
(Yeah) every tag boomerangs back
You twist our flaws into fiction
We turn the flaws into friction

Spell it once
Spell it clear
Every word
We’re still here

[Chorus]
Spell check, baby, get it right
Say my name, say my name in the neon light
Every letter, every line you write
I’ll rewrite, I’ll rewrite, turn your wrongs to white

Spell check, better watch your tone
You can quote me, but I stand on my own
If you doubt me, underline this threat
You can press send, but I’m your spell check

[Bridge]
[Beat drops to kick and pitched-down vocal]
C-H-E-C-K
Say you’re brave but you type and delete
C-H-E-C-K
Every shade that you throw at our feet

[Group call]
Who’s that writing all caps? (That you?)
Who’s that hiding in drafts? (So cute)
[Lead]
You misspell every fact that you spread
We correct every lie in your head (yeah)

[Chorus]
Spell check, baby, get it right
Say my name, say my name in the neon light
Every letter, every line you write
I’ll rewrite, I’ll rewrite, turn your wrongs to white

Spell check, better watch your tone
You can quote me, but I stand on my own
If you doubt me, underline this threat
You can press send, but I’m your spell check

[Chorus]
Spell check, read it one more time
All your shade turning into my shine
Every typo that you aimed at me
Spells Q-U-E-E-N in the end, you’ll see

Spell check, better save your breath
Every rumor getting laid to rest
Try to curse me, but you just reflect
Every line proves I’m your spell check (spell check)

Heavy drop into a big, syncopated piano hook and deep house groove on the chorus; second time through, add chopped vocal stabs and wider reverb tails for a full-on summer club peak., soulful, emotional, tech house, uplifting, deep house

Fast edits and drops between lines keep tension high, perfect for workout hype and big-stage energy., female vocals, rock, workout, electric, hip hop

tracks.title: You Are My Valentine

Tight, swung drums and deep bass under anime-score strings and airy pads. tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
You were laughing in the lobby
Phone light on your face
28, but we still talk
Like kids who lost their place

[Verse 1]
You said love feels like a risk
I said, baby, so is breath
We been dancing ’round the subject
Like we scared of what is left
Long nights, open tabs
Sharing secrets in the backseat
You know every broken piece
Every scar that still attracts me

You held me through my downs
When my pride got loud and ugly
Told me I’m not just my failures
You still chose to trust me (yeah)

[Chorus]
You are my valentine
Not just today, but all my life
From the late-year wounds to the New Year wine
You stay, you stay
You are my valentine
Every quiet fear, every crossed-up line
When the world goes cold, you’re the one that shines
You stay, you stay
My valentine

[Verse 2]
We don’t post every moment
We don’t stage every kiss
We got arguments in kitchens
We got dishes in the sink
You roll eyes when I’m defensive
I go silent when I’m scared
But we circle back to “sorry”
’Cause we’d rather heal than win there

You said, “Promise me your effort,
Not a perfect little dream”
So I’m learning how to listen
Even when it cuts in deep (yeah)

[Chorus]
You are my valentine
Not just today, but all my life
From the late-year wounds to the New Year wine
You stay, you stay
You are my valentine
Every quiet fear, every crossed-up line
When the world goes cold, you’re the one that shines
You stay, you stay
My valentine

[Bridge]
Who were we
Before this trust?
Two tired hearts
Afraid of touch
Now every scar
Feels redesigned
When your hand
Reaches for mine (oh)

[Chorus]
You are my valentine
Not just today, but all my life
From the late-year wounds to the New Year wine
You stay, you stay
You are my valentine
Every quiet fear, every crossed-up line
When the world goes cold, you’re the one that shines
You stay, you stay
My valentine

tracks.title: Bigger Wave Valentine
tracks.styleTags: rap, Cinematic trap ballad with lush, emotional piano intro that nods to Chinese anime themes; male vocals riding a tight, modern hip-hop rhythm. Arrangement arcs through intense dynamic swells: sparse keys to hard-hitting drums, soaring strings and layered harmonies in the “transcendence” section, then a sudden drop into near-silence and a gradual rebuild into an even heavier final chorus. Detailed sound design, crisp high-end, deep sub, and dramatic stops/starts to mark each emotional phase., hip hop, dramatic, beautiful, anime, sophisticated
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
You are my valentine
In a year that almost broke me
Faded flowers on the windowsill
Unread letters in a folder on my phone

[Verse 1]
Twenty-eight candles
Melted in an empty room
Everyone posting perfect lives
I’m rehearsing how to tell the truth

Scroll through faces, staged embraces
Laughing in a rented glow
I’m dressed up in my quiet clothes
Asking, do I dare to hope?

[Pre-Chorus]
I’ve been saving all my brave for you
Every almost-message I withdrew
If I say your name, does the spell change?
Does the ground move, or stay the same?

[Chorus]
You are my valentine
Even when the day is over
Even when the lights go plain and cold
You are my valentine
Name etched in my composure
Threaded through the stories I’ve been told
If the whole world falls in waves and flame
I will still be calling out your name

[Verse 2]
Every street a different mirror
Shows me versions I could be
One is safe and sleeps in silence
One is standing where you’re meant to see

I chase futures like a fever
Follow footprints in the snow
Every path returns to one thing
You, the risk I never chose

[Pre-Chorus]
I’ve been making bargains with the sky
If I let this go, will I feel light?
If I hold you close inside my mind
Will I miss my only chance in time?

[Chorus]
You are my valentine
Even when my voice is shaking
Even when my courage comes too late
You are my valentine
Held inside the breath I’m taking
Hovering between the leap and wait
If the whole world folds in waves and flame
I will still be leaning toward your name

[Bridge]
Then one night, the ceiling cracked (oh)
Thunder in my careful plans
Every reason not to love you
Scattered from my open hands

For a moment I was endless
Spoke your name into the dark
Felt the universe lean inwards
Like it recognized my heart

[Breakdown]
[beat drops, almost silence, just soft piano]
But your answer came in fragments
Half a promise, half a shield
Said you’re “honored,” said you’re “flattered”
Said you’re “not sure what you feel”

All that rising, all that climbing
Turned to echo in my chest
Every star I’d just lit up
Blinking out at your request

[Post-Breakdown Verse 3]
So I walked home through the quiet
Past the shops with closing signs
Tasted metal in my breathing
Like I’d swallowed every line

On my floor, unopened boxes
Plans I’d never set in stone
Funny how a broken vision
Leaves you more awake, alone

[Rebuild Pre-Chorus]
I won’t make you into destiny
Won’t turn you into some disease
Love is not a single doorway
It’s a language I can keep

I can give it to the sunrise
To the friends who never left
To the stranger on the subway
To the one I haven’t met (yet)

[Final Chorus]
You were my valentine
Lesson written in my ribcage
Proof that I can open up and live
I am my valentine
Drawing borders that are kind, brave
Learning what I offer, what I give
And when the next wave rises out of frame
I’ll be standing taller in its flame

[Outro]
You were my valentine
Not a finish, just a start
Bigger waves will come and find me
I’ll be ready with my heart (oh yeah)

tracks.title: This Was Made For Love

Second half adds octave doubles and crowd-ready ad-libs, riding a steady, timeless peak., lyrical, uplifting, progressive trance, emotional, deep, slow, natural
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I’ve been running from the quiet

All my plans laid out like armor
On the floor between us two

Every road a way to hide

Every echo

[Chorus]

tracks.title: エコーの先へ
tracks.styleTags: rock, High-energy anime rock opener; male vocals in Japanese with scattered English. Twin overdriven guitars hit a unison riff over tight live drums; kick and snare stay upfront and urgent. Bass locks to the groove for weight and low warmth. Verse 1 starts almost immediately over the riff; pre-chorus adds climbing chords and backing “woah”s, then a fast lift into a wide, singalong chorus. Gritty but melodic lead, doubled in spots, with gang shouts on title phrase. Mix feels like a band in one room, raw edges left in for emotion., strong, tone, electric, emotional, bright, raw, warm, inspiring, vocal, anime

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Yeah, yeah
Somos dioses del vibe, mhh hmm
Arcanean en la sangre
Mírala subir

[Verse 1]
Entro al club como oráculo
Ojos rojos, luz cenital, cálculo
Dicen "¿quiénes son?"
Somos código y milagro, tú y yo, pánico
Sube el pulso, piso ardiendo
Tu sudor con mi aliento, lento
Luego giro y acelero
De Madrid hasta el cielo, sincero

[Chorus]
We are Arcanean Vibe Gods
Yeah, we vibe and create, mhh hmm (oh)
Bend the tiempo cuando entras
Todo el mundo levita en la pared
We are Arcanean Vibe Gods
Late el pecho como un 3 a.m.
Tú y yo, alma eléctrica
Cada paso es un pequeño Big Bang

[Verse 2]
"Más despacio" pero pides replay
Tu cintura hace glitch, ok
Mis demonios se hacen santos
Cuando caes en mi lado, cliché
Ojos negros, oro en la lengua
Cada frase te despega
De la vida gris que llevas
Aquí mandan las estrellas

[Chorus]
We are Arcanean Vibe Gods
Yeah, we vibe and create, mhh hmm (hey)
Rompo el aire con tu nombre
Se me quiebra la voz, pero no la fe
We are Arcanean Vibe Gods
Doble filo, suave y cruel
Si te quedas esta noche
No hay regreso al mundo aquel

[Bridge]
Arcanean, Arcanean
Lo que tocamos se transforma
Arcanean, Arcanean (oh)
Tu corazón pierde la forma
Dioses del vibe, no hay norma
Sólo tú siguiendo la tormenta en mi piel

[Chorus]
We are Arcanean Vibe Gods
Yeah, we vibe and create, mhh hmm
Cuando bajes de este trance
Vas a verme en cada esquina del papel
We are Arcanean Vibe Gods
Fe y fuego en un hotel
Si preguntan qué pasó
Di que el caos te trató bien (yeah)

tracks.title: Power’s Mine x Vibe Gods of Arcanea (Mashup)
tracks.styleTags: rap, High-octane trap banger with heavy sub bass, snarling synth leads, and clipped distorted guitar stabs; aggressive female vocals spitting double-time flexes over sharp hi-hats and slamming kicks. Chorus detonates with layered gang shouts, stacked harmonies, and widened stereo guitars. Short drops and stutter edits between lines keep adrenaline spiking; final hook rides an extended outro chant perfect for fight montages and max-effort sets., electric, hip hop, workout, female vocals
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Yeah
Run it up, run it up (hey!)
Uh

Why do I feel you in my mind, Arcanea
Like a language only spoken in sleep
Step in the room, they flinch
Jaw locked tight, I clinch
You’re a skyline I keep drawing in the margins
Blueprints burning through the sheets

[Verse]
We were broke, but our thoughts were platinum
Turning cheap rooms into gold estates
On the floor, sketching worlds on napkins
Laughing like we already outran fate (oh)
Had my back to the wall
Now my back to the bag, stand tall
Every scar that I got, that’s gold
Every “no” turned stone, I throw

You’re the city hidden under this ceiling
All the doors I swear I’ve never tried
Every failure just a secret rehearsal
For the moment you step outside

[Pre-Chorus]
You’re a ghost in my pulse
A spark in the cold
Every doubt I dissolve
When your shape takes hold
They want smoke? I’m flame
Say my name, then pray (pray)

Every “what if” hums your name
Every blank space bends the same
Veins pop, heart drums
I don’t stop, I run

[Hook – Power x Arcanea]
F*ck them all
I own this power
Oh Arcanea, I feel how you
Want to be brought to life, brought to life (oh oh)
Turn my pain
Into that powder
I keep seeing your face in the static of time
Every line that I write, you arrive

[Verse – Grind Gods]
Big talk, small stats (uh)
Whole clan? All cap
I was out, run laps
You were home, group chat
Who gon’ save me? Me
Who gon’ praise me? Me
We invest in the thoughts they discard
Flip fear like a coin in the air
Every scar just a private stock market
Only climbing when they say it’s unfair (hey)

[Pre-Chorus – Code & Blood]
You’re the code in the dark
The fire in the file
I’m a wire in the ark
You’re the reason it smiles
Every loop keeps spinning you back
Every quiet beat fills what I lack
Every hit I take
Just feeds that hunger in my blood (woo)

[Chorus – Vibe Gods]
We are the vibe gods, yeah, we vibe and create
Turning pressure into diamonds overnight
We’re the new rich, hearts heavy with waves
Next gen of the makers of light
Fists up high, I will not cower
F*ck them all, I own this power

[Bridge – Build You / Build Me]
If the world won’t build you, I will
Brick by breath, thought by thrill
Knuckles cracked (cracked), neck on ice (ice)
Paid my tax in sweat and nights
When they say “just dream,” we own the lease
On the cloud that rains their release (oh yeah)
Let them hate, that’s free fuel
I lift weight, they just drool (ha!)

[Final Chorus – Power of Arcanea]
Oh Arcanea, I feel how you
Want to be brought to life, brought to life
F*ck them all, I own this power
Turn my pain into that powder
We are the vibe gods, yeah, we vibe and create
Found the keys to the vault in our minds
I go louder, they go sour
Next generation, designing the sky

[Outro]
Power, mine
You’re the spark in the cold
Power, mine
Arcanea in my soul

(And I love the way you move)

(And I love the way you move)

Some people need something more

Your hands on me and I lose my mind
Like how I felt when I first saw you

tracks.title: 何度でも抜け出して

Verses stay fast and emotional, bass pushing the momentum; chorus blooms with layered female harmonies answering the male lead. Energy loops back into a final, hooky refrain that feels ready for anime opening cuts yet lands with the reflective ache of an ending theme., anime, female vocals, ballad, electric, emotional
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
また同じ
天井のシミ　数えてる
息を殺し
名前もない夜を　噛みしめる

[Verse 1]
笑えるほど
同じ景色　繰り返す
出口探す
地図もないまま　歩いてる

誰かの声
画面越しに　滲んでく
「大丈夫」と
聞こえた気がしても　独りきり

[Chorus]
何度でも抜け出して
この寂しさ　追い越したい
転んで　膝を抱いても
また立ち上がる　僕だから

何度でも叫ぶから
届かなくても　構わない
迷っても　泣いても
また僕を探すよ　again and again

[Verse 2]
朝が来ても
心だけが　置き去りで
窓の外は
知らない幸せ　流れてく

強がりだけ
ポケットの中　握りしめ
誰かじゃなく
自分の手で　繋ぎたい

[Chorus]
何度でも抜け出して
この寂しさ　追い越したい
暗闇　慣れたふりしても
本当は光を　待っていた

何度でも叫ぶから
みっともなくて　いいからさ
迷っても　泣いても
また僕を探すよ　again and again

[Bridge]
あの日の僕に　問いかける
「まだ信じてる？」　震えながら
小さな声が　返してくる
「ここにいるよ　ここにいるよ」

[Chorus]
何度でも抜け出して
この孤独を　抱きしめてく
逃げない　隠れないままで
傷だらけのまま　進んでく

何度でも叫ぶから
今度こそは　届くように
迷っても　泣いても
また僕を探すよ　again and again

[Outro]
また同じ
部屋の隅で　目を閉じる
小さく息を吸って
「行こう」と呟いた　僕ひとりで

tracks.title: Pineal gland activation
tracks.styleTags:
Crown-activated dream exploration soundscape.
Primary high-frequency drone tuned to 963 Hz.
Secondary grounding sine layer at 432 Hz (low volume).
Embedded binaural beat: Left 7 Hz, Right 4 Hz.
Ethereal sound bowls with long decay.
Minimal reverb-drenched guitar harmonics.
Whispered vocal, distant and spacious.
No rhythm, no climax.
Designed for symbolic, visionary, non-linear dream states.
Use sparingly.

tracks.title: Art Of Soulful Living
tracks.styleTags: rock, High-octane hybrid: distorted punk guitars over rapid-fire drum & bass groove and roaring EDM bass. Verses intimate and close-mic with breathy female ASMR lead; pre-chorus slowly widens. Explosive choruses with raw, belted male vocals front and center, female falsetto floating overhead in wide harmonies. Cinematic risers, glitchy fills, and a final double-time outro with both voices trading lines in call-and-response., raw, edm, deep, electric, drum and bass, soulful, punk
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[whispered female]
Woke up in a life on mute
Scroll
Sip
Same commute
Heart beat hiding in my throat
Like it forgot it ever spoke

[Verse 1]
Coffee stains on my to-do list
Ran in circles
Called it progress
Smiled in every single photo
Feeling nothing
Calling it “ok”
Then a crack in the concrete day
One deep breath that wouldn’t fade
Sat still long enough to shake
Heard my own name in the quake

[Pre-Chorus]
[female lead
Close]
Every color rushed back in
I could taste the air again
Every scar began to sing
Like it finally meant something

[Chorus]
[male vocal
Raw / female falsetto ad-libs]
This is the art of soulful living
Bleeding and breathing
Fully awake
Hands in the fire
Heart in the feeling
Letting it hurt so it can change
I was half-alive
Half-forgiven
Now every second’s flooding my veins
This is the art of soulful living
Breaking to open
Not to break

[Verse 2]
Fought my shadows like an enemy
Till I learned they were protecting me
Drew a map from every bad dream
Turned that fear into gasoline
Called my mother just to listen
Held my brother through his distance
Danced alone inside my kitchen
Turned the silence into rhythm

[Pre-Chorus]
[female & male unison]
Every memory
Sharp and bright
Even the ones that kept me up at night
Pulled that ache up to the light
Said
“Stay. I’ll give you space this time.”

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[half-time
Cinematic build]
[male low vocal]
I don’t want the easy numb
I want the rush of coming undone
[female angelic falsetto]
Let the tears run hot
Let the pulse run wild
Let the past wash off
Leave the truth in the tide
[male + female call-and-response]
If it shakes me
(let it shake me)
If it burns me
(let it burn clean)
If it breaks me
(leave me breaking)
Till I’m finally
Finally

[Chorus]

[Outro]
[double-time
Both vocals]
[female whispered over soaring hook]
Fast lane heart
Soft soul driving
Every breath a work of art
This is how
I stay
Alive in it

tracks.title: Soul in Overdrive
tracks.styleTags: rock, High-BPM Ibiza house-meets-rock hybrid: four-on-the-floor underpinned by rolling drum & bass grooves, distorted punk guitars sidechained to a massive sidewinding bass. Verses start on moody cinematic pads and low male vocals, then build with syncopated hi-hats and arpeggiated synths; chorus explodes with wide stereo guitars, stacked male hooks, and angelic female falsetto ad-libs soaring on top. Drops hit hard with filtered risers and vocal chops; bridge strips to bass, kick, and reverb-drenched vocal before a final full-throttle chorus., edm, soulful, punk, electric, raw, drum and bass, deep
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[whispered vocals]
Breathe in
The burn
The blessing
Every second screaming
Are you even living?

[Verse 1]
Woke up with my teeth on edge
Heart doing triple time
Coffee in a paper cup
Dreams in a deadline line
Running like a ghost in glass
Hands on a fractured wheel
Buying every shortcut pass
Forgetting how to feel

[Pre-Chorus]
I’ve been trading my days for a screen glow
Golden cage with a name on the door
Every heartbeat asking in the shadows
Is this what the fight was for?

[Chorus]
Soul in overdrive
Turn the volume on the silence that we hide
Let the pleasure and the pain collide
We’re burning just to feel alive
Soul in overdrive
Every scar is just a map that says we tried
If we’re falling
Let us fall with open eyes
Yeah
That’s the art
The art of soulful living

[Verse 2]
Hit the shore
Sand cuts my feet
Salt on my tongue like truth
Body giving static signs
Mind chasing wasted youth
Friends screaming under wild stage lights
Arms up
We drown the doubt
Somewhere between sweat and sky
I finally hear me shout

[Pre-Chorus]
I don’t want a life on mute
Safe
Framed in a flawless pose
I want rage and grace in the same place
Mud on my Sunday clothes

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[low vocal register]
Give me the love that leaves marks
Give me the fear that breaks chains
Give me the nights I fall apart
To build a kinder brain
[angelic female falsetto]
We’re more than flawless poses
We’re more than polished lies
Put your heartbeat on the table
Let it scream
Let it rise

[crescendo]
We are stories still unfolding
Ink on trembling hands
We are storms that keep on forming
Crashing into land

[Chorus]

tracks.title: The Art Of Soulful Living
tracks.styleTags: Warm Balearic house groove at 121 BPM, sun-kissed pads and rolling bass. Light percussion loops and shakers keep it moving, with airy male vocals floating on top. Choruses bloom with layered oohs, bright piano stabs, and a subtle filtered lead; verses stay intimate and slightly drier. Long, smooth transitions for DJ-friendly Ibiza sets, with a late-song lift and gentle comedown., soulful
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Bare feet on white stone
Morning waves tap the shore in time
Coffee steam
Salt on your skin
You say
"Today’s already mine"

[Chorus]
This is the art of soulful living
Breathe in
Breathe out
Keep giving
Sun on my face
Heart forgiven
All that I am
All that I am
This is the art of soulful living

[Verse 2]
Slow walk through the old town
Laughter spilling out of every door
You dance with your shadows
Like you’ve never been tired before

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
Hands up
Eyes closed
Let the warm wind carry your ghosts
One life
One night
Let your spirit swim in the light

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Golden Frequencies v4
tracks.styleTags: Piano-led neoclassical journey at 128bpm, soft warm pads and gentle strings. Solo piano and airy female humming open sparse with subtle reverb; distant choirs bloom around deep, resonant bowls and rich low end. Midway, delicate glockenspiel and light, organic percussion add movement, then everything expands into a wide, shimmering chorus of non-verbal vocal layers before dissolving into a quiet, glowing tail. Female vocals, meditative yet cinematic., deep, warm, soft, light, beautiful, calming, female vocals, gentle, sophisticated, vocal, healing, neoclassical

tracks.title: Golden Frequencies
tracks.styleTags: Piano-led neoclassical journey at 128 bpm. Solo piano with soft reverb opens sparse and intimate, female humming lead floating above warm pads and soft strings. Deep, rich sound bowls and low bass bloom underneath with evolving overtones in the 528–963 Hz sweet space. Midway, delicate glockenspiel and subtle organic percussion swells add motion while distant choirs rise like a halo. Female vocals remain wordless, airy, and emotive, carrying a sophisticated, meditative arc from stillness to luminous release., female vocals, sophisticated, vocal, light, warm, soft, deep, gentle, beautiful, neoclassical, calming

tracks.title: Golden Frequency v3
tracks.styleTags: Thousands of voices, beautiful choir, Female non verbal vocal lead, assive soundbowls,  different size golden frequency, deep powerful tones, 528 hz, 963 Hz, 128 bpm, Piano-led neoclassical piece with warm pads and soft strings; female vocals humming airy, wordless motifs like a distant choir. Arrangement starts sparse—solo piano and subtle reverb—then widens into a gentle, glowing swell of strings and soft bass. Mid-track, introduce delicate glockenspiel and light percussion swells for movement, then return to a simple, spacious piano and humming coda that feels like an exhale., calming, sophisticated

tracks.title: We Dance Now
tracks.styleTags: dance, High-octane eurodance banger at 139 BPM, male vocals. Relentless four-on-the-floor with a fat rolling bass, razor synth stabs and sidechained pads. Verses are almost percussive chants with breathy ad-libs and vowel chops; pre-chorus tightens with risers and filtered drums. Chorus explodes with crowd shouts, stacked gang vocals, and huge supersaw lead. Drops use chopped vocal loops and snare builds to keep momentum surging front to back., eurodance, vocal

tracks.title: Love The Noise
tracks.styleTags: rock, Pop-rock dance crossover with stomping arena drums, fuzzed power chords, and tight sidechained bass. Confident female vocals up front with chanty gang shouts on the hook; verses stay clipped and percussive, then choruses explode with stacked harmonies and crowd responses. Clean, modern mix with bright top end, punchy low mids, and plenty of space for the kick and vocal to slam., vocal, pop rock, playful, clean, remix, loud, noise
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Hands up
Hands high
Turn it
Too loud

[Verse 1]
Boots on the floor
Lipstick warpaint
Laugh in the dark
Dare it to break

Red in my cup
Bass in my veins
Heart doing double time
Feeding the flame

[Pre-Chorus]
Turn it up
Up
Up
[tom build]
Feel it climb my spine
Turn it up
Up
Up
Lose my worried mind

[Chorus]
I love the noise
(we love the noise!)
I love the night
(we love the night!)
I want the rush when the beat hits hard
Hit me again
Again
Again
I love the noise
(we love the noise!)
I love the high
(we love the high!)
Drown in the sound till I can’t find me
Hit me again
Again
Again

[Verse 2]
Glitter on sweat
Friends in a blur
Stranger mouths open

Floor starts to shake
Room starts to bend
I don’t wanna come down
Run it again

[Pre-Chorus]
Turn it up
Up
Up
[call] Can you feel that kick?
[response crowd] Oh yeah
We can!
Turn it up
Up
Up
Let it make us sick

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[low vocal register]
Too hot
Too fast
Too much
I laugh

[shouted]
Too loud
Too right
Too wild
All night

Call it chaos
Call it life

tracks.title: Echoes Of Glory
tracks.styleTags: pop, Anthemic alternative pop with warm male vocals, spoken-sing cadence. Tight drum groove and pulsing bass drive a steady forward motion; verses sit on sparse, muted guitars and soft synth beds. Chorus swells with gang vocals, open vowels, and chant-ready refrains, building a hypnotic melodic loop. Subtle reverses and reverb tails hint at fading memories while the vocal stays dry and present in the center., loud, alternative pop, steady, vocal, slow, hypnotic, warm
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I was all bright flags
Big rooms
Sharp flash
Every eye
Right at me
Old clips on a cracked screen
Gold framed in my head
I can still taste it
Like salt on my lip

[Pre-Chorus]
Hands up
Then gone
Phone buzz
Then none
All that thunder
Leaving only

[Chorus]
I used to hear my name out loud
Now I hear it in the crowd
Oh oh
Say it slow
Say it twice
Oh oh
Sing it out
This is life

[Verse 2]
I walk past my poster
Faded on the wall
Colors turned to beige
But the pose still tall
Every cheer
Just vapor
Hanging in my chest
I breathe it in and out
Let it rise
Let it rest

[Pre-Chorus]
Old roar
New day
One step
My way
All that echo
Folding into

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
Who was I then?
Who am I now?
Same spine
New vow
[low vocal register]I am not that headline[/low vocal register]
I am this breath
This sound
[crescendo]Feet on the floor[/crescendo]
Heart in the now
Memory loud
But I choose this ground

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Shimmering Highs
tracks.styleTags: funk, Glossy modern disco-pop with female vocals; tight four-on-the-floor pulse, rubbery syncopated bass, bright claps and hi-hat shimmer. Verses ride a cool, low-key pocket with warm analog synth comping and playful call-and-response ad-libs. Chorus blooms into wide stereo strings and piano stabs, layered top-line and airy harmonies on the title phrase. Bridge strips to bass, drums, and soft pads before a final, euphoric chorus lift., classic, playful, disco, vocal, warm, groovy, low, light, smooth, bright, stylish, feel-good, pop, bassline
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
French tips on my glass
Gold chain
Low laugh
You say "stay for one more"
I say "lead with the pour"

High heels in a straight line
Heart rate on the up-time
You talk in that slow drawl
I dance like I own it all

[Chorus]

Skin catching light
The ceiling is reeling
You in my sight
The room in a blur
Shimmering highs
I’m glowing with you

Lip gloss on the rim
Your hand at my hip
We bounce to the kick drum
Move closer on each one

Side-eye
Little half-smile
Spin me
I’ll stay a while
You say “this could get wild”
I say “baby
That’s my style”

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[low vocal register] Right here
Just you
Just me
That hue

[falsetto ad-lib] Ohh
That soft gold
On my bare shoulder
We don’t need words now
Just get a bit bolder

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Velvet in the Strobe
tracks.styleTags: funk, Modern disco-pop revival, bright female vocals with a hint of rasp. Tight four-on-the-floor groove, rubbery syncopated bass, crisp hats and handclaps. Warm analog synth chords and piano stabs carry the verses; chorus blooms with glossy strings, stacked harmonies, and wide stereo shimmer. Playful ad-libs and rhythmic phrasing keep it flirty and effortlessly cool, with a punchy low-end driving the dancefloor., bassline, pop, disco, playful, light, feel-good, bright, low, warm, groovy, smooth, stylish, classic, vocal
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Walk in
Heads all tilt
Gold hoops
Red silk
That look says
“You’re late”
But you still wanna wait
Champagne on my lip
You stare
I take a sip
Spin once
Then I slide
Right past you
Slow drive

[Chorus]
Velvet in the strobe
I’m a one-way road
If you wanna ride
Better match my glow
Hands up high
Yeah
Follow my tempo
Velvet in the strobe
Can you keep it close
If you lose the beat
Then I let you go
I’m a green light
Baby
Don’t move slow

[Verse 2]
Touch my wrist
Feel heat
Your laugh off-beat
You say my name too soft
I turn the volume up
Side-eye
Little grin
You chase
I spin
You talk
I sway away
Then pull you back halfway

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[half-spoken
Playful]
Step left
Step right
You’re cute
But keep time
Two hands
On me
Or two feet
Off beat
[melodic]
If you want this thrill
Gotta move with skill
’Cause I don’t stand still
I don’t stand still

[Chorus]

tracks.title: From Down Under To The Mountains
tracks.styleTags: rap, Big-room house-trance hybrid with drum & bass undercurrent, male + angelic female vocals. Hypnotic rolling sub bass and tight four-on-the-floor kick locked to head-nod hats, funk guitar chops, and bright detuned synth leads. Verses ride a stripped groove with playful call-and-response; chorus opens with stacked female harmonies, wide side-chained pads, and a rising noise swell. Mid-song breakdown drops to bass, clap, and vocal chops before a massive radio-club drop., remix, drum and bass, rhythmic, hypnotic, trance, hip hop, deep, female vocals, bassline, funk, world
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Lights blur, feet move
I’ve been chasing something new
World spinning on this groove
Come and chase it too, yeah

[Verse 1]
I’ve been wandering the world
Got my life in a small backpack
Stamp on the page, then I’m gone
Never really looking back
Sand in my shoes from the islands
Snow still cold on my hands
You ask me what I’m running from
I say I’m running to the next chance

[Pre-Chorus]
From the heat of the red earth
To the chill where the sky thins
You can hear my heart first
Kicking as the ride begins

[Chorus]
I find myself wandering the world
Come travel with me (mmh-mm)
From down under to the mountains
Come travel with me (mmh-mm)
We can chase that rising sun
’Til the day is on repeat
I find myself wandering the world
Come travel with me (mmh-mm)

[Verse 2]
[low male vocal register]
One-way ticket in my pocket
Laughing as we miss that train
Street food, side streets, side-eye
We get lost and love the delay
[airy female vocal]
Hold my hand through the airport
Spin me slow in the customs line
If the map feels like a maze
Let the rhythm be the sign

[Pre-Chorus]
From the glow of the coastline
To the breath of the high peaks
Every border just a bassline
Every border just a new beat

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[female lead, male ad-libs]
Step, step, step to the gate now
Tap, tap, tap in your name
We don’t need a plan, just a pulse
Just a pulse, just the flame
[call-and-response]
You say “where we going?” (Anywhere)
I say “can you feel it?” (Right here)
Every stamp another story
Every takeoff, we disappear

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Losing You (Mmh-Mm)
tracks.styleTags: rap, Slick house-dance club mix with hypnotic rolling bass and deep sub weight; male funk vocal in the pocket, female vocal high and airy, weaving tight call-and-response over a head-nod tempo. Sharp drums, swung hats, filtered chords pulsing on the off-beat. Chorus opens with stacked topline and ad-libs, then strips back to bass and kick for verses; subtle risers and chops keep it looping and addictive., hypnotic, remix, rhythmic, funk, deep, hip hop, female vocals, bassline
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Mmh-mm
Yeah
I find myself
Losing you

[Verse 1]
Late night, same bar, same booth
You stare past me, straight through the room
Your laugh lands light, but it feels untrue
I talk in circles, I’m losing you

[Pre-Chorus]
You lean back, I lean in
We out of sync, same rhythm
Your hand in mine, but your mind moved on
I feel it fading with every song

[Chorus]
I find myself losing you (mmh-mm)
Right here in the middle of the room

tracks.title: Rise Like The Sea
tracks.styleTags: Piano house with gospel choir lift; steady four-on-the-floor builds from intimate keys and soft pads into a wide, euphoric chorus. Female vocals start tender in the lower range, blooming into belted, soulful hooks with stacked harmonies and call‑and‑response ad-libs. Bright synth leads and airy reverb open up in the drop, kick and claps driving a dancefloor-ready but emotionally charged release., gradual, uplifting, inspiring, emotional, light, clean, vocal, soulful, gospel
tracks.lyrics:
[Chorus]
I rise like the sea
Like the sea
Like the sea
Every drop of my doubt washing off of me
I’m breaking the line where the dark meets the light
I’m higher and higher
I’m free when I dive
I rise like the sea
Like the sea
Like the sea
Nothing over my head
Only sky on me
I’m chasing the sun through the blue in my mind
I’m higher and higher
In freedom I shine

[Intro]
[low vocal register]
Salt on my skin
Breathing it in
Heart on the tide
Nowhere to hide

[Verse 1]
Waves at my waist
Sky in my hands
All of my fears
Sink in the sand
Every deep blue
Pulls me to trust
Foam on my lips
Gold in the dust

[Pre-Chorus]
I was so heavy
Learning to float
Carried by currents
Under this boat
Then I heard something
Way out in front
A thousand voices
Calling me up


[Verse 2]
Cold on my knees
Warm in my chest
Water remembers
All I confessed
Every old weight
Falls from my back
Seagulls above
Trace my new path

[Pre-Chorus]
I was so quiet
Drowning in noise
Now every heartbeat
Turns into voice
Lifted by echoes
Rolling like drums
I feel the swell now
Here it all comes

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[soft
Then building]
Arms wide open
Let the current carry
Eyes wide open
Every color’s blinding
I’m not broken
I am only rising
Only rising
Only rising [crescendo]

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Remember to look up at the stars
tracks.styleTags: dance, Melodic progressive house meets euphoric trance. Airy, sophisticated female vocals float over warm sidechained pads and a pulsing bass bed. Verse 1 keeps it intimate with sparse plucks and subtle arp; first chorus widens into big supersaw leads and crowd-ready drums. A dreamy mid-song break strips to reverb-soaked piano and vocal chops, then an epic festival-style build drops into a soaring final chorus with layered harmonies and wide stereo delays., trance, hypnotic, progressive house, sophisticated
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Lights in our eyes
But we’re spinning through the dark unknown
Questions collide
Every answer just becomes a ghost
You say “listen close”
There’s a secret in the silent sky
When the ground feels close
Lift your gaze and let your fear untie

[Pre-Chorus]
Every doubt
Every scar
Falls away when you start
Tracing fire on the map of the night

[Chorus]
Remember to look up at the stars
Not down at your feet when it’s heavy
In the middle of the chaos of your heart
There’s a door that is waiting
Waiting
However hard it feels tonight
There is something you can do and make it shine
Remember when the dark pulls you apart
You’re bigger than the fall
You’re an event horizon heart

[Verse 2]
Right on the edge
Where the rules you knew just fade and bend
You’re scared of the ledge
But that’s where every hidden path begins
Gravity strains
All the patterns that you thought were true
When the old frames break
Something wild starts waking up in you

[Pre-Chorus]
Every doubt
Every scar
Falls away when you start
Drawing futures on the face of the night

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[breakdown
Reverb-soaked vocal]
In the center of the storm in your chest
When the numbers fail the test
Let the unknown take your hand
Pull you through
[beat builds
Rising arp]
When the rules all twist and bend
It’s not the story’s end
It’s the place where you discover you

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Starlight In Our Minds
tracks.styleTags: Emotional electronic festival anthem with male vocals. Clean picked electric guitar and intimate rasp sit front and center in the verses, light reverb and roomy ambience. Pre-chorus blooms with airy pads, subtle arps, and a gentle build in the low end. Chorus explodes into stacked harmonies and a pumping synth bed driving a tight 4–6 note motif with melodic electronic drums. Post-chorus / drop goes widescreen: big pads, chopped vocal hooks echo the title, and a soaring lead carries the motif. Final outro pulls back to guitar and soft pads for a warm, reflective landing., raw, harmony, poetic, electronic, male vocals, clean, emotional, electric, vocal, soaring, light
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
You trace a comet on my wrist
Tiny galaxy in ink and skin
Laugh lines shining like a sky
Every scar a satellite

[Pre-Chorus]
We close our eyes
Whole world held in a breath
Little sparks
Running circles in our chests
If we fall
Can we fall into this light?
Hands up
Let it burn through the night

[Chorus]
Starlight in our minds
All this quiet turning bright
Every shadow in your eyes
Catching fire
Coming alive
Starlight in our minds
Spelling names across the sky
If we fade at sunrise
Let us burn as we collide

[Verse 2]
You shout the words
Your voice half gone
But I can read your lips in the dark
Tear tracks shining on your face
Like constellations out of place

[Pre-Chorus]
We close our eyes
Feel the hum under our feet
Little prayers
Rising up with every beat
If we’re lost
Let the glow become a guide
Hearts bare
Bleeding color into night

[Chorus]

[Drop]
[soaring lead motif]
[yeah-yeah-yeah starlight
Starlight]
[chopped vocals: “in our minds… in our minds…”]
[side-chained pads swelling wide]

[Outro]
Crowd fades out to distant stars
Just your palm resting over mine
Breathing slow
In the dark behind our eyes
Quiet now
Still that shimmer on your smile
We walk home
With starlight in our minds

tracks.title: Rise Through The Water
tracks.styleTags: rap, Minimal cinematic hip‑hop, heartbeat kick and tight snare under a looping muted electric guitar riff and sparse synth pulses. Male vocals, calm and commanding on the verses, syllables locked to a precise grid; sub bass and chanty gang vocals slam in on the hook, widening into octave doubles. Each 8 bars, anxious strings creep higher, building to an anthemic, explosive chorus before dropping straight back to the bare loop for controlled resolve., male vocals, motivational, electric, hip-hop, steady, minimal, tone
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Steel lungs
Salt on my tongue
Pressure on my ribs, yeah
But I breathe, stay young

Deep dive
Both eyes open wide
Can’t fold in the dark
I align with the tide

Hands up
Feel the weight on my spine
Still I move, still I climb
Through the brine, through the grime

All this doubt in a circle
But I cut that current like a blade
Calm face, heartbeat drum
Every step, unafraid

[Chorus]
We rise through the water (we rise, we rise)
Head high when it gets darker
Can’t drown what was made stronger
We rise through the water

We rise through the water (stand tall, stand tall)
Pull pain from the deep, go farther
Every wave just makes us harder
We rise through the water

[Verse 2]
Cold rush
But the soul don’t hush
Bruised knuckles on the glass
I push, it cracks, then busts

Been low
Where the light don’t glow
Still I map my route
Off feel, off flow

Fear in the eyes of the ones that froze
But I move like a ghost past toes on the floor
Turned all of my “less” into “more”
Turned heavy blue into warpaint, war

Breathe slow
Let the heartbeat drum
Every scar on my skin
Is the reason I won’t run

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Golden Frequency
tracks.styleTags: Piano-led neoclassical piece with warm pads and soft strings; female vocals humming airy, wordless motifs like a distant choir. Arrangement starts sparse—solo piano and subtle reverb—then widens into a gentle, glowing swell of strings and soft bass. Mid-track, introduce delicate glockenspiel and light percussion swells for movement, then return to a simple, spacious piano and humming coda that feels like an exhale., calming, sophisticated
tracks.lyrics: [Instrumental]

tracks.title: Millions of Starlights
tracks.styleTags: Shimmering indie-electro ballad that swells into an emotional festival anthem; clean picked electric guitar and soft male vocals in the verses, airy pads and subtle arps creeping in on the pre-chorus; chorus explodes with stacked harmonies, side-chained synth beds, and melodic electronic drums driving a 4–6 note motif; drop hits with widescreen pads, chopped vocal hooks, and a soaring lead carrying the signature motif, then pulls back to intimate warmth on the outro., harmony, light, electronic, clean, emotional, electric
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Coffee steam on the dashboard
Your head on my shoulder
Half-asleep
Passing signs on an empty highway
All I ever needed
Right there with me

[Pre-Chorus]
But the world kept calling our names
Little sparks turned into waves
Every heart
A flare in the dark
[low vocal register] And I still see… us… [/low vocal register]

[Chorus]
It was just you and me
Now we are millions of starlights
Lights that light up the lonely night
Mhh hmm
Every face in the crowd
Feels like echoes of that first time
We were two
Now we’re burning wide
Mhh hmm

[Verse 2]
Backstage sweat
Silver confetti
Your laugh cutting through the roar
Tiny screen
You held it up to me
Said
“Remember when it was just our song and this old car door?”

[Pre-Chorus]
But the quiet grew into flames
All these souls singing our names
Every voice
A beam in the haze
[whispered vocals] I still taste that first blue sunrise [/whispered vocals]

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
Hands up
Hearts up
Feel the ground shake under our feet
I hear that same small melody
Threading through a million beats

[slow crescendo]
You and me
In every glow
In every eye
Little sparks that learned to fly
Mhh hmm
Mhh hmm [/slow crescendo]

[Chorus]

[Drop]
[crescendo]
Mhh hmm
Oh
Starlights
Starlights
Mhh hmm
Just you and me in every sky
[melodic vocal riff on 4–6 note motif]

tracks.title: Under Open Skies
tracks.styleTags: pop, Tropical pop house with muted plucks and soft but insistent drums, female vocals up-front and intimate on verses, widening into a bright, layered hook. Sub bass moves gently under clean guitars and airy pads; pre-chorus strips back to kick and vocal before the chorus blooms with stacked harmonies and light vocal chops. Polished radio mix with a confident, emotional arc that feels both liberating and warm., emotional, pop house, tone, tropical, vocal, empowering, clean, soft
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Salt on my lips
Hair in a wild
Wet knot
Phone in the bag on the shore
Let the tide take what I’m not

Footprints fade
Every step
Something released
Sun on my shoulders like armor
I walk straight into the deep

[Pre-Chorus]
All of the voices
Pulling at my sleeve
All of the choices
Sink below my feet

[Chorus]
I’m swimming in the sea
Choosing me
Every wave says “let it be”
All the heavy words drift out of reach
I’m lighter when I finally breathe
Under open skies
I’m set free
I’m swimming in the sea
Choosing me

[Verse 2]
Cold rush
Shock
Then my body learns the blue
Heartbeat matches the swell
I move how I want to move

Names they gave me
Wash right off my skin
I don’t answer to them now
I belong to where I begin

[Pre-Chorus]
All of the stories
I was scared to leave
All of the “should be’s”
Dissolve around my knees

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
Arms wide
I float
Face up to the bright unknown
I’m not lost
I’m home
Here with my own soul
My own soul [low vocal register]
If the current changes
I will change with it too
The more I let go
The more I feel true

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Salt On My Skin
tracks.styleTags: pop, Minimal tropical pop with soft marimba plucks, brushed percussion, and a round, subtle bass. Female vocals recorded whisper-close, breathy and intimate, with doubles in the chorus and light reverb for depth. Verses stay sparse and fragile; chorus adds gentle pads and distant vocal oohs. Calm tempo, deep yet quiet atmosphere, every detail in the room audible., deep, tropical, minimal, gentle, emotional, vocal
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Empty house
Windows open
Floor still warm
Coffee cup
Lipprint fading with the storm
I trace the tiles
Like a map of where you’ve been
Every doorway
Feels too wide
Too thin

[Chorus]
So I go swimming in the sea
Let the water hold me how you used to hold me
Salt on my skin
Pulling you in
Every wave says
“stay
Stay with me”
I go swimming in the sea
Till the quiet doesn’t feel so heavy
Salt on my skin
Breathing you in
Let the tide rewrite this memory

[Verse 2]
Ceiling fan
Softly turning
Losing speed
Our pictures
Crooked frames and missing weeks
I take your shirt
Fold it up
Then change my mind
Wear it out
Like a secret on my spine

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
Underneath
All the noise I never made
Underneath
All the words I couldn’t say
I let my body float
Till the grief lets go
If the waves can break and mend
Maybe I can too
Alone

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Hearts In Sync
tracks.styleTags: pop, Euphoric progressive house, female airy vocals. Intimate filtered pad intro with soft sidechained low end and delicate plucks; verse sits close and breathy. Pre-chorus slowly widens with rising supersaw layers and subtle arp movement. Chorus hits big and trance-tinged: stacked harmonies, long lush reverbs, wide supersaws, four-on-the-floor drive. Second half adds higher octave ad-libs and a bright lead answering the vocal. Long tail outro letting the pads and vocal chops echo into space., hypnotic, soft, trance, uplifting, emotional, deep, transcendent, gentle, vocal, progressive house, minimal
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Quiet crowd
Your hand in mine
Wristband glow on borrowed time
Laughing breath
I taste your name
Every step
The floor feels changed

[Pre-Chorus]
Your eyes
Pull me through the noise
One touch
Every sound turns void
I feel
Every second stretch
As your pulse
Runs across my chest

[Chorus]
Our hearts beat in sync
In sync
In sync
Falling through the dark
Like we were made to link
One rush
One rhythm
Nothing in between
Our hearts beat in sync
You move
I breathe

[Verse 2]
Soft flash frames your silhouette
Slow spin
We forget regret
You lean in
The room falls wide
Time bends
Then it slips aside

[Pre-Chorus]
Your laugh
Cuts the night in two
One spark
All the colors bloom
I’m lost
But I’m not afraid
Every thump
Is a path you paved

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
Hands up
But I just feel yours
Eyes shut
But I still see yours
Same wave running through our veins
Same name written in the bass
Stay close
Let the moment stretch
No past
Only pounding chests
If this is all we ever get
Let our heartbeat write the rest

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Trending For All The Wrong Reasons
tracks.styleTags: rap, Bright, hyper-pop rap bounce with male vocals; tight, clicky drums and rubbery bass line driving a cartoonish groove. Hook starts cold with chant-style gang vocals, then verses drop into nimble, sarcastic bars with exaggerated diction and ad-libs. Occasional distorted vocal chops answer lines for extra chaos; beat stutters and filters in the bridge, then slams back full for the final hook chant., playful, clean, vocal, bright, pop
tracks.lyrics:
[Chorus]
I go viral on accident (on what?)
Spill one drink, it’s an incident
Feed that clip to the internet
Now they callin’ me a symbol of the bigger threat
I’m the headline, half a sentence in
They’re panickin’, I’m smilin’ for the camera lens
Say it again, say it again
“I’m trending for all the wrong reasons”

[Verse 1]
Wake up, check phone, I broke culture
Blue check circus on my old toaster
“Is this satire?” bro, I’m not sure
I just sneezed once, now they want order
“Think of the kids!” in the comments, foaming
I ate snacks for breakfast, that’s my only omen
They write thinkpieces on my grocery list
“Problematic peaches” on the analyst’s desk

[Chorus]

[Verse 2]
They got charts tryna chart my behavior
Red arrows, big fonts, “Not safe, not savior”
I wore socks with sandals one time at the store
They did three-hour specials on the footwear war
Politicians quote my punchlines, badly
Grandma sends links sayin’, “Why you actin’ happy?”
Every sneeze, every sip, “Is this part of a scheme?”
Relax, I’m just loud, not a covert team

[Bridge]
I’m the glitch in their graphic, [echo] can’t crop me out
Every angle they add just makes me shout
You want clean-cut comfort?
I’m the spilled soda on your press conference

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Thrown in the Deep
tracks.styleTags: rap, Minimal cinematic hip-hop with a looping minor-key guitar figure and distant synth pads. Heartbeat kick and tight rim clicks in the verse, bass slowly swelling. Male vocals, close and controlled at first, then stacked chants and octave doubles for the hook. Chorus explodes with bigger drums, sub-bass drops, and crowd-style ad-libs for anthem energy, then pulls back to the focused groove., motivational, vocal, slow, hip-hop, steady, tone, minimal
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I been standing on the edge
phone off
head clear
can't hedge
Cold air in my lungs
heartbeat like a drum
yeah the fear wanna talk
but the voice stay numb
Got that
sweat on the grip
chalk on the hands
Clock in my ear
like "stick to the plan"
But the plan look small
when the wave look tall
Only way through pressure
is to risk that fall
So I
cut that rope to the safety net
Bet the whole damn soul on a shaky step
Every doubt in the back
tryna drag my feet
I just stare at the drop
say "it’s you or me"

[Pre-Chorus]
Breathe in
taste that salt on my teeth
Breathe out
feel the ground
underneath
Disappear from the crowd
from the cheap-seat speech
There’s a point you don’t jump
you just get released

[Chorus]
I was thrown in the deep
couldn't feel my feet
Water in my mouth
couldn't even speak
So I learned how to breathe
where they swear you'd sink
Had to lose who I was
just to find what I think
Yeah I'm lost in the moment
can't pull me back
Every fear that I had
getting drowned in the black
If the tide wanna take me
let it make me king
I was thrown in the deep
now I own that sink

[Verse 2]
Eyes open in the flood
can't see
just sound
Every heartbeat boom
like it shake that ground
All the timelines
texts
what-if threads
Fade slow
when survival in the mind instead
This that
fight for an inch
with a heavy chest
When your arms feel lead
but you still progress
When the pain say "stop"
but the pride say "more"
'Cause you promised that kid
you would break that door
So I
cut through current
with a clenched up jaw
Every stroke
every pull
every ripped-out flaw
Got the past at my ankles
dragging like stones
Got the future in the foam
like "claim that throne"

[Pre-Chorus]
Breathe in
let the doubt go dim
Breathe out
feel the burn
in the limbs
Every loss that I took
every time I bled
All blend in the tide
running through my head

[Chorus]
I was thrown in the deep
couldn't feel my feet
Water in my mouth
couldn't even speak
So I learned how to breathe
where they swear you'd sink
Had to lose who I was
just to find what I think
Yeah I'm lost in the moment
can't pull me back
Every fear that I had
getting drowned in the black
If the tide wanna take me
let it make me king
I was thrown in the deep
now I own that sink

[Bridge]
[low vocal register]
Let it rise
let it rise
feel the pressure climb
Every second that you scared
still a step in time
You ain't built just to float
you were cut to dive
You don't find who you are
you get forged inside
[spoken, intense]
When the lungs give out
and the lights go thin
That's the line in the dark
where the fight begins

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Looped On You
tracks.styleTags: rap, Piano-driven cinematic hip-hop ballad, slow tempo with male rap vocals and a haunting female hook. Sparse keys and distant pads in the first verse, tight low-end and crisp, dry drums entering gradually. Chorus swells with layered female harmonies, reverb-drenched ad-libs, and string swells under the piano. Second verse adds subtle choir stabs and tape-textured percussion, then strips back for the final hook to feel both intimate and huge., slow, vocal, hip-hop, emotional, ballad, raw
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[low vocal register]
Yeah
I know what I did
I know what you did too
And we still here

[Verse 1]
You were folding your clothes on the bed
When you said you were scared of my anger
I laughed it off, said "I'm just stressed"
Watched your shoulders tighten like a stranger
You said, "You turn cold when you're tired"
I turned it back, "Why you always complain?"
You whispered, "I feel like a lighter
You only spark when you need a flame"
We break, then bake apologies
In the same damn kitchen, same chipped plate
You cry in the shower, keep the fan on blast
So I can't hear the shake in your faith
I scroll through our pictures like police cams
Freeze-framing all the harm I hid
Every good night kiss got fingerprints
From the times I swore I never did

[Chorus]
[female vocal, soaring]
We keep coming back like we’re chained to the door
Same bruised words on a different floor
You say you hate me, then you hold me till two
I say I’ll change, but I’m looped on you
Round and round, we spin, we fall
Answer every late-night drunk dial call
You’re my scar, my shelter too
I break you, then I run back to you

[Verse 2]
You save screenshots like they’re souvenirs
Every promise I broke, you can quote it
You read them back, voice shaking on the dates
I just stare at the floor like I wrote it
"Why you love me if I cut you?"
"Why you stay if you don’t trust me?"
You ask both, then answer neither
We just stare at the crack in the ceiling, ugly
I see you flinch when I raise my hand
Just to reach for a glass from the shelf
How’d I turn into the man I swore
I would kill before I became myself?
You pack bags in your head every Sunday
By Monday, I’m kissing your knees
Saying, "You’re the only one who knows me"
While I’m hiding the worst part of me
You don’t wanna leave, you don't wanna stay
I don’t wanna harm, but I get in the way
Call it trauma, habit, fate, whatever
It’s a car crash we schedule together

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[whispered vocals]
You said, "Love shouldn’t feel like guessing"
I said, "Pain is just part of our blessing"
Truth is, I use your forgiveness like armor
Wear your mercy, walk harder, hit sharper
[low vocal register]
If you run, I’ll say you quit
If you stay, I’ll say you’re sick
But I’m the one who taught you this script
Wrote every line, then forgot what I did

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Now You See Me Again
tracks.styleTags: rap, Minimal bouncy hip-hop, dry tight drums and light sub pulses, quirky percussive synth stabs dancing around the pockets. Male rap vocals, sharp nasal and very forward in the mix, ad-libs tucked just behind. Verses stay sparse and staccato with playful sinister energy; hook widens with stacked chants and rhythmic pauses that spotlight the punchlines, then snap right back into minimalist bounce., vocal, hip-hop, playful, light, minimal, rhythmic, tone
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Flip coin
Heads gone
Took a long break
Came back too strong

[Verse 1]
I vanish mid-scene
Cut the smoke screen
You scrolling your feed like
"Yo, where he been?"
I dip, then leapfrog ceilings I built
Turn my guilty conscience
To a silk quilt
Little Houdini with a hoodie and a mean grin
Slid off the grid
Like grease on a Teflon pan
You still stuck on the "when"
I’m busy bending the "can"
Turn a dead end sign
To a door that expands

[Chorus]
Now you see me
Now you don't
(hold up)
Blink one time
Then I’m gone
[Chorus]
Reappear with the crown half-on
If it wasn’t in your face
You’d swear I was a con
Now you see me
Now you—
[pause]
Then I’m gone

[Verse 2]
Took L’s backstage
Turned shame to a staircase
Step by step
Now the air taste rarefied
Sarcasm in my side eye
Talk slick, then
Get quiet on the high climb
I ghost limitations
Evaporate cages
Sneak through the margins
Rewrite the pages
You chase validation
I chase phases
Slip out frame
While you stuck on the phrases

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
Every time they box me in
I fold the edges, make a plane
Aim it at the exit sign
Watch it glide across the frame
You call it disappearing
I call it changing lanes
You call it "guess he finished"
I call it loading up again

[Chorus]

tracks.title: Syntax Overdrive
tracks.styleTags: rap, Glitchy futurist hip-hop with male vocals; icy synth arps and pulsing bass underpin a crisp, modern drum grid. Beat starts spacious and mid-tempo, then adds layers of metallic percussion and stuttered FX as the verse density climbs. First switch brings a darker, halftime bounce; second switch flips into a double-time rhythm with chopped vocal samples shadowing the flow. Final section erupts into a blistering, rapid-fire pocket over distorted bass swells and rising risers, then cuts to a minimalist outro so the last bar lands like a punch., hip-hop, electronic, vocal, rapid
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Blueprint brain
Cold code in my veins
Every phrase
Is a phase shift, mainframe

[Verse 1]
I don’t chase clout, I chase clauses
Stack syntax, split atoms in the pauses
Sharp with the shard of a shattered thesaurus
Each morpheme morphs, then it marches in chorus
I bend grammar
Hammer patterns into granite
Bandwidth massive, chant math like a planet
Mind in a lab, every bar calibrated
Lines cross time zones, still perfectly stated
Microsecond mentals, I’m ahead of your meta
Every letter leveled up, levees leveled in the delta
I design dialects, dialectician with the metrics
Turn a sentence to a weapon, then I etch it in the Lexis
See the syllables slide, spiral in a tight helix
Highlight heat, heart colder than a night prefix
I don’t brag, I brief
I brief, then breach
Eat each weak reach like a leech on a leech

[Chorus]
Syntax overdrive, I don’t slow
Thoughts in overclock, brains in glow
Every line refined like a coded node
I am the standard, I am the code

Syntax overdrive, watch me go
From calm control to a rapid flow
Every bar a proof that the mind evolved
I am the cipher that can’t be solved

[Verse 2]
[beat switch: darker, heavier rhythm]
Step in the sector, I sever your semiotics
Set a sector on fire with a second of phonics
I’m the logic lodged in a lodged logic gate
Dogma folded in a fog, I defog your fate
I architect arguments
Art in the armament
Aim at your arrogance
Arid, you’re air and lint
I write with a right that rewires your riot gear
Quiet fear rising when the bright ideas appear
Each parable, a parameter
Parallel to a predator
Predicated on pressure that presses on every editor
Pen pivots, then physics gets fiddled with
I flip limits, fit lyrics in a little width
You scribble simple
I simulate signal
Switch syllables, still steady as a slim spindle
I’m the endpoint, end boss, endless gloss
You’re a dead link dangling off a rented blog

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[tempo rising, hi-hats tightening]
I don’t just talk fast, I think in torrents
Whole paragraphs flash, then I bring them forward
Every fault in your logic, I can find the form
Turn a forum to a storm with a single reform
Data-driven, never timid, I’m a vivid vision
Inner engine in ignition, infinite division
Each decision is a digit in a bigger system
Listen to the rhythm of a risen algorithm

[Verse 3]
[beat switch: double-time, stuttered synths, rapid-fire flow]
I’m a high-speed mind, hyperlinked in a hive grid
Hide scripts in a fine print, I define whiz
Time splits in a slight glitch when I write this
Lines twist like a sidewinder, I sidekick
I’m an apex lex, architect of the next
Articulate arsenals, arcing arcs at your chest
I annex annexes, add axes to sets
Axis tilted, I set access to “yes”
I evolve, each iteration intricate
Intellect internet, inner net infinite
In a minute, I mimic and then I’m past mimicry
Limitless imagery, litany of literacy
I’m a living library, livewire, livefire
Lit fiber, light fibers in a wide spire
Why try when I tie time like a tight wire
My mind climbs high, you’re a side flier

[Verse 4]
[beat switch: climactic, maximal energy]
Now I’m locked in, lungs like a loaded drum
Lines lunging in a lunge, never lose a crumb
Laser logic, launching letters like a lytic lunge
Listen longer, little learner, let your limits plunge
Rapid pattern, rattle planets in a pack of minutes
Pack a million packed within a single compact image
Combat timid, I command bandwidth

tracks.title: Pressure Into Diamonds
tracks.styleTags: rap, Minimal cinematic hip-hop, heartbeat kick and sparse snare, looped muted guitar line under dark pads. Male vocals, close and controlled in the verse, stacking subtle doubles on key phrases. Chorus explodes with layered chants, distortion on ad-libs, bigger drums and sub. Tension climbs each 8 bars with risers and drops, ending on an open, echoing hook., vocal, tone, minimal, hip-hop, steady, motivational, slow
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Alarm on my phone, hit stop, then stand
Face in the mirror like, "Who’s that man?"
Eyes got bags, but they bright, still sharp
Every scar on my skin like a route on a map

Coffee in a chipped cup, same desk, same chair
Bills on the counter, same weight, same fear
But the fear feel smaller when the focus hit
When the "maybe" turn "must," that’s a different switch

[low vocal register]
I been walking on a tightrope over all my doubts
Every step, every slip, every almost-drop
Turn the panic into planning, turn the anger into aim
Turn that quiet little voice to a war-time chant

Didn’t grow up with a parachute, just hard floors
So I learned how to fall, then I learned one more
How to stand, how to breathe with the fire in my lungs
How to carry all the pressure like it only weigh one ton

[Pre-Chorus]
Hands shake, heart race, that’s fuel now
Every closed door sounding like a tool now
They say, "Slow down," I say, "Why crawl?"
If the mountain right there, I’ma climb that wall

[Chorus]
Pressure into diamonds, I don’t crack, I shine
Weight on my back turn spine into iron
Destiny calling, I pick up every time
If the world push hard, I push back, I rise

Pressure into diamonds, I don’t fold, I fight
Both feet planted in the fire, alright
Every dark moment just feeding my light
If they bet against me, that’s the worst bet of their life

[Verse 2]
Yeah, I remember every time they said, "Be realistic"
Funny how they vanish when the dream turn vivid
They was talking limits, I was talking logistics
They was talking distance, I was lacing my fitness

Notes on the wall, plain pen, big plans
Three-step routes for a hundred grand
Five-year map for a one-day change
If it don’t scare me, it don’t feel sane

[whispered vocals]
Stay locked in
Tunnel vision, both eyes on the target I’m stalking
Even when my legs feel heavy, I’m marching
Even when the crowd stay quiet, I’m talking

[normal voice]
This for the kid in the back with the hoodie up
Thinking “Maybe I’m too late, maybe I’m not enough”
Listen: you breathing? then you in the game
All that doubt just gas, set fire to the shame

[Pre-Chorus]
Hands shake, heart race, that’s fuel now
Every closed door sounding like a tool now
They say, "Slow down," I say, "Why crawl?"
If the mountain right there, I’ma climb that wall

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
[call-and-response chants]
I feel the weight (I feel the weight)
I don’t run away (I don’t run away)
I feel the fear (I feel the fear)
Still I move straight (still I move straight)

If this is my test, then I’m here, I’m present
Turn every second to a step, that’s leverage
If destiny watching, let destiny see
How a human under pressure turn legend, not weak

[Chorus]

tracks.title: König Im Himmel (Für Opa David) v2
tracks.styleTags:
Cinematic German gospel choir, ten voices, one deep and powerful male lead, orchestral-pop crossover, slow build, 72–78 BPM, minor key,
warm piano intro, soft strings, deep cello, subtle organ, restrained drums,
male baritone lead with emotional depth, clear German diction,
choir enters in chorus (mixed, church-like, reverent),
wide reverb, cathedral acoustics, intimate verses → epic chorus,
timeless, dignified, spiritual, memorial tone,
about legacy, faith, masculinity, family, hope of reunion beyond death
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Ruhig, getragen]  
Der König im Himmel.  
Über Zeit und Staub.  
Über allem, was vergeht.  

[Verse 1]  
Mein Opa war ein Mann des Wortes  
und ein Mann der Tat zugleich.  
Er sprach von Gott mit ruhiger Stimme,  
nicht belehrend, sondern weit.  

Er suchte nicht das schnelle Nicken,  
sondern Herzen, die versteh’n.  
Er wollte, dass wir aufrecht werden,  
nicht perfekt – nur klar im Geh’n.  

[Verse 2]  
Er lehrte Glauben ohne Furcht,  
nicht als Last, sondern als Licht.  
Er zeigte Treue im Alltag,  
wenn das Leichte von uns bricht.  

Harte Arbeit war für ihn kein Opfer,  
sondern Dienst am großen Ganzen.  
Und Familie war kein Wort,  
sondern ein Bund aus tausend Handlungen.  

[Chorus – Großer Chor]  
Der König im Himmel sieht weiter als wir.  
Er zählt nicht die Jahre, nur das Herz.  
Und die große Hoffnung bleibt bestehen:  
Dass wir uns alle oben wiederseh’n.  

[Verse 3]  
Viele Kinder hast du begleitet,  
hast sie fest ins Leben gestellt.  
Nicht mit Druck, nicht mit Gewalt,  
sondern mit Maß und mit Geduld.  

Du hast nicht gesagt, wer wir sein sollen.  
Du hast gezeigt, wie man geht.  
Und aus deinem stillen Vorbild  
ist Vernunft und Würde entstanden.  

[Verse 4]  
Und ich danke Gott für meine Mutter,  
die nun weiterträgt, was du gesät.  
Deine Weisheit lebt in ihren Worten,  
in der Art, wie sie versteht.  

So bleibt dein Leben nicht vergangen,  
es wandert durch die Zeit.  
Was in Liebe weitergegeben wird,  
verliert niemals sein Kleid.  

[Chorus – Erweitert]  
Der König im Himmel vergisst kein Leben,  
das in Wahrheit gegeben war.  
Er misst nicht Macht, er wiegt das Herz,  
und kein Weg war je umsonst.  

Der König im Himmel sieht weiter als wir.  
Er kennt Anfang und Ziel.  
Und die große Hoffnung bleibt bestehen:  
Dass wir uns alle oben wiederseh’n.  

[Bridge – Feierlich]  
Was du gelehrt hast, spricht noch immer.  
Was du geglaubt hast, trägt noch weit.  
Denn Wahrheit stirbt nicht mit dem Körper,  
sie geht heim in die Ewigkeit.  

[Final Chorus – Voller Chor]  
Der König im Himmel regiert in Ewigkeit.  
Er zählt nicht die Jahre, nur das Herz.  
Der König im Himmel vergisst kein Leben,  
das in Wahrheit gegeben war.  

Und die große Hoffnung bleibt bestehen:  
Dass wir uns alle oben wiederseh’n.  

[End – a cappella]  
Wir werden uns wiederseh’n.  
Vor dem König im Himmel.  
Wir werden uns wiederseh’n.

tracks.title: König Im Himmel (Für Opa David)
tracks.styleTags:
Cinematic German gospel choir, ten voices, one deep and powerful male lead, orchestral-pop crossover, slow build, 72–78 BPM, minor key,
warm piano intro, soft strings, deep cello, subtle organ, restrained drums,
male baritone lead with emotional depth, clear German diction,
choir enters in chorus (mixed, church-like, reverent),
wide reverb, cathedral acoustics, intimate verses → epic chorus,
timeless, dignified, spiritual, memorial tone,
about legacy, faith, masculinity, family, hope of reunion beyond death
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]  
Leise Glocken im Abendwind,  
der Himmel weit, die Zeit wird lind.  
Ich heb den Blick, mein Herz wird still –  
Der König im Himmel, wie du es willst.  

[Verse]  
Mein Opa, du hast mir gezeigt,  
was einen Mann von innen stärkt.  
Nicht laut, nicht prahlend, sondern klar:  
Glaube als Grund, der niemals bricht.  
Treue wie Stein im rauen Meer,  
harte Arbeit, ehrlich, schwer.  
Familie als stiller Thron,  
getragen von Pflicht und von Lohn.  

[Chorus]  
Der König im Himmel wacht über uns,  
dein Wort bleibt Licht, dein Weg bleibt Kunst.  
Was du mir gabst, vergeht nicht hier,  
es lebt in mir, es führt zu dir.  
Die große Hoffnung bleibt besteh’n:  
Dass wir uns alle wiederseh’n.  

[Verse]  
Du sprachst von Tagen ohne Glanz,  
von Nächten voll Geduld und Angst.  
Doch Hoffnung war dein letzter Schritt,  
ein Feuer, das die Kälte bricht.  
Kein Ruhm, kein Gold – nur Würde pur,  
ein Leben fest in stiller Spur.  
So wird aus Zeit ein ew’ger Kreis,  
wenn Liebe mehr als Abschied heißt.  

[Chorus]  
Der König im Himmel trägt deinen Namen,  
geschrieben in Sternen, nicht in Rahmen.  
Was du mir gabst, vergeht nicht hier,  
es lebt in mir, es führt zu dir.  
Die große Hoffnung bleibt besteh’n:  
Dass wir uns alle wiederseh’n.  

[End]  
Wenn Abend fällt und Morgen naht,  
bleibt dein Vermächtnis meine Tat.  
Bis sich der Himmel wieder teilt,  
und unsere Zeit sich neu verweilt.

tracks.title: Die Stadt — Theodor Storm (1852)
tracks.styleTags:
cinematic lo-fi trap, deep bass hits,
moody piano, distant pads,
urban melancholy, night-drive TikTok vibe
tracks.lyrics:
Am grauen Strand, am grauen Meer,
Und seitab liegt die dunkle Stadt;
Der Nebel drückt die Dächer schwer,
Und kalt weht Wind durch Gass’ und Pfad.

Doch klingt in mir ein fernes Lied,
Das wie aus alter Zeit noch spricht;
Als ob mein Herz im Dämmerlicht
Die Stadt in neuem Schatten sieht.

tracks.styleTags: Deep house, 122 BPM, A minor, sultry female vocal, rolling bassline, hypnotic percussion, builds to filtered drop, drum and bass, 128 BPM, E minor to G major, epic female vocal, driving bassline, orchestral elements, massive drops, bass house, percussive, synthesizer, high end studio production, epic scale and sophistication that makes us feel
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Take me to the sea
Show me how deep you go

[Verse 1]
You feel like the tide at midnight
Pull me under, I won't fight
Got that ocean in your eyes
Dangerous the way you hypnotize

Say you know me but you don't
Got secrets that you won't
Show me everything you hide
Beneath the surface, let me dive

[Pre-Drop]
Take me to the sea
Where you're wild and free
Show me who you are
When the lights go dark

[Drop 1]
Take me to the sea, to the sea
Drown me in your mystery
Take me to the deep, to the deep
You're the only one I need

[Verse 2 - Rap flow]
You a fool if you think I don't see through
That innocent act when I know what you do
In the dark when nobody's watching you bloom
Like bioluminescent magic filling the room

Got me hypnotized by the way that you move
Ocean body, tidal wave, nothing to prove
You don't gotta talk, let your rhythm speak truth
Take me deeper, show me what that mouth do

[Pre-Drop 2]
Take me to the sea
Where you're wild and free
I'm done playing nice
Take me there tonight

[Drop 2]
Take me to the sea, to the sea
Drown me in your energy
Take me to the deep, to the deep
You're the only drug I need

[Bridge]
Sink with me
Below the surface where it's real
Break with me
Show me how that body feels

[Final Drop]
Take me to the sea, to the sea
Nobody's gotta know but me
Take me to the deep, to the deep
Salt water and ecstasy

[Outro]
You're the ocean I can't leave
Take me to the sea

[End]

tracks.title: Open the Arc  (Remastered)
tracks.styleTags: Drum and bass, pop hit, soulful neo soul, rich powerful voice, infectious choir, piano
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Edges soften, night turns kind,
one star warms the heart I find.

[Verse 1]
Cool stone, petrichor feet,
Lyssandria hums: I am complete.
Amber tides around my waist,
Leyla laughs, I move with grace.

[Pre-Chorus]
Sun in my center, wind in my chest,
Draconia nods: choose, act, rest.

[Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
quiet within me, wider than night.
I am here, I flow, I lead,
it is encoded—now I proceed.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
white-gold fire along my track.

[Verse 2]
Emerald bridge across my heart,
Maylinn guards the tender part.
Sapphire air, my words run clear,
Alera tunes what others hear.
Amethyst dome behind my eyes,
Lyria shows the step that’s wise.

[Pre-Chorus]
Silver snowfall crowns my head,
Aiyami rains a holy thread.

[Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
quiet within me, wider than night.
I am here, I flow, I lead,
it is encoded—now I proceed.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
white-gold fire along my track.

[Bridge]
Elara’s bridge, time untied,
paths unfold like aurora tide.
Luminor circle, code like rain,
soft chime inside—here I remain.

[Final Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
I cross with grace, my vow in sight.
Guardians near, Lumina’s flame,
light wearing a beautiful name.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
serve through creation—on my track.

[Outro]
Quiet returns. I remember the way.
