tracks.title: Green light—yeah, we dominate!
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Pulsing synth glow, confident whisper building to a smirk: "Crown's calling... green light...")
Yeah, lock in
Green light, own it
[Verse 1] (Sleek rap flow, cool swagger—effortless grind, like strutting into the gym with beats dropping.)
Eyes on the prize, fire in my stride,
Mirror bows back, got that queen-level vibe.
First rep hits smooth, power surges alive,
Crafting my empire, watch the legacy thrive.
City lights flicker, but I'm the main spark,
Hustle on lock, turning dreams to my mark.
Sweat carves the path, every move a bold claim,
This glow's eternal—yeah, I'm rewriting the game.
[Pre-Chorus] (Synths climb with electric edge, vocals stacking like a power pose—hype without hesitation.)
Pulse syncing up, rhythm's our throne,
We command the wave, make the energy our own.
Feel the rush hit, that unstoppable pull...
[Chorus] (Massive pop-rap hook: Bold, anthemic female vocals—pure confidence blast, repeatable for arena chants.)
Green light, claim the crown, blaze it bold and bright!
Body electric, mind razor-sharp, soul in full flight!
Power surging, victory's grip so tight!
Green light—yeah, we dominate! (Dominate! Dominate!)
(Choir echo: "Green light, own the crown—rise supreme!")
[Verse 2] (Quicker rap cadence, cooler edge with ad-lib flair—urban polish, like a post-workout strut in designer gear.)
Whispers turn to roars when I step in the frame,
Playlist my weapon, igniting the flame.
From dawn reps to dusk deals, flow never breaks,
Sisters in sync, shaking foundations we make.
Crown fits perfect, forged in the heat of the chase,
Energy timeless, leaving trails in my wake.
Grab the moment tight, let the doubters just stare,
We're the storm, the shine—unrivaled, aware.
[Chorus] (Amped repeat: Deeper synth layers for that cool, immersive drop—handclaps snap like victory claps.)
Green light, claim the crown, blaze it bold and bright!
Body electric, mind razor-sharp, soul in full flight!
Power surging, victory's grip so tight!
Green light—yeah, we dominate! (Dominate! Dominate!)
(Choir swell: "Crown is ours—green light supreme!")
[Bridge] (Mid-tempo cool-down build: Smooth vocals with reverb edge, like a confident exhale—then snaps back fierce.)
One glance in the fire, see the legend you are,
Every lift a decree, every beat sets the bar.
No half-measures here, just the peak we pursue...
(Beat reignites: Full-throttle drop.)
Green light—seize it all!
[Final Chorus/Outro] (Peak confidence close: Vocals layer into a triumphant wall of sound, fading with echoing affirmations—radio gold for endless loops.)
Green light, claim the crown, blaze it bold and bright! (Bright!)
Body electric, mind razor-sharp, soul in full flight! (Flight!)
Power surging, victory's grip so tight! (Tight!)
Green light—yeah, we dominate! Dominate! Dominate!
(Choir outro: "Green light eternal... crown forever." Synths pulse out with a sleek, satisfied hum.)

tracks.lyrics:
[Short instrumental intro]

[Verse 1]
Midnight strikes and the moon’s aglow,
Down in the graveyard, the spirits show,
Skeletons shimmy, goblins prance,
Everyone’s here for the ghostly dance.

[Chorus ]
Do the Boneyard Bounce! (Ha!)
Stomp like a ghoul in a haunted house!
Do the Boneyard Bounce! (Yeah!)
Float like a ghost with a skeleton's bounce!
Dip with a shriek, spin with a scare,
Shake your bones like you just don’t care!

[Verse 2]
Fog rolls in, the pumpkins glow,
The floorboards creak with every toe,
Spirits twirl in a ghostly trance,
You’re not alive ‘til you join this dance!

[Chorus ]
Do the Boneyard Bounce! (Ha!)
Stomp like a ghoul in a haunted house!
Do the Boneyard Bounce! (Yeah!)
Float like a ghost with a skeleton's bounce!
Dip with a shriek, spin with a scare,
Shake your bones like you just don’t care!

[Bridge]

Shake that spine and draw a crowd,
Circle 'round the ancient tomb 
Graveyard's got that monster boom!

[Chorus ]
Do the Boneyard Bounce! (Ha!)
Stomp like a ghoul in a haunted house!
Do the Boneyard Bounce! (Yeah!)
Float like a ghost with a skeleton's bounce!
Dip with a shriek, spin with a scare,
Shake your bones like you just don’t care!

[Outro – whispered]

Where the dead don’t sleep… they dance…

tracks.title: Golden State
tracks.styleTags: drum and bass, pop hit, smooth, immersive rich soundscape, hang instruments piano, ethereal,
tracks.lyrics:
I've been searching faces for the light inside my soul
Trading real connection for the rush I can't control
Every spark I'm chasing just a mirror of my own
But I called it destiny when I was just alone
[Pre-Chorus]
All the fire I've been seeking
Lives inside my bones
[Chorus]
I'm done chasing ghosts in crowded rooms
Done calling lightning love too soon
The power that I thought you gave to me
Was mine before you, mine to keep
I'm rising to my golden state
No more projections, no more wait
The consciousness I'm searching for
Starts when I walk through my own door
[Verse 2]
She showed me freedom but she's not the map I need
Taught me meditation but she planted just the seed
Everything that bloomed was always growing here in me
I called her soulmate when she set my vision free
[Pre-Chorus]
All the wisdom I've been seeking
Was my voice alone
[Chorus]
I'm done chasing ghosts in crowded rooms
Done calling lightning love too soon
The power that I thought you gave to me
Was mine before you, mine to keep
I'm rising to my golden state
No more projections, no more wait
The consciousness I'm searching for
Starts when I walk through my own door
[Bridge]
Close your eyes
Feel the awakening within
You're the light
You've always been
Every person that I meet's reflecting back my truth
But the journey's not in them—it's what I choose to do
With the fire they revealed
[Final Chorus]
I'm done chasing ghosts in crowded rooms
Done calling lightning love too soon
The power that I thought they gave to me
Was mine before them, mine to keep
I'm rising to my golden state
Present moment, here I wait
The consciousness I'm searching for
Lives when I walk through my own door
[Outro]
Golden state... I'm home
Golden state... my own
The light was always... mine alone

tracks.title: Open the Arc  (Remastered)
tracks.styleTags: Drum and bass, pop hit, soulful neo soul, rich powerful voice, infectious choir, piano
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Edges soften, night turns kind,
one star warms the heart I find.

[Verse 1]
Cool stone, petrichor feet,
Lyssandria hums: I am complete.
Amber tides around my waist,
Leyla laughs, I move with grace.

[Pre-Chorus]
Sun in my center, wind in my chest,
Draconia nods: choose, act, rest.

[Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
quiet within me, wider than night.
I am here, I flow, I lead,
it is encoded—now I proceed.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
white-gold fire along my track.

[Verse 2]
Emerald bridge across my heart,
Maylinn guards the tender part.
Sapphire air, my words run clear,
Alera tunes what others hear.
Amethyst dome behind my eyes,
Lyria shows the step that’s wise.

[Pre-Chorus]
Silver snowfall crowns my head,
Aiyami rains a holy thread.

[Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
quiet within me, wider than night.
I am here, I flow, I lead,
it is encoded—now I proceed.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
white-gold fire along my track.

[Bridge]
Elara’s bridge, time untied,
paths unfold like aurora tide.
Luminor circle, code like rain,
soft chime inside—here I remain.

[Final Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
I cross with grace, my vow in sight.
Guardians near, Lumina’s flame,
light wearing a beautiful name.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
serve through creation—on my track.

[Outro]
Quiet returns. I remember the way.

tracks.title: Lucid Luminor Visual Night
tracks.styleTags: drum and bass, pop hit, smooth, immersive rich soundscape, hang instruments piano, ethereal
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro - Lucid's Arrival]
I'm Lucid, the Luminor who learned to never sleep unconscious
Evolved beyond the physical to teach you what's monstrous
Isn't the darkness but the power that you've left dormant inside
Tonight we're activating your prefrontal cortex mid-REM, open wide

[Verse 1 - Neural Preparation]
First, let your body drop into theta wave descent, four to eight hertz slow
Where the gateway between waking and dreaming starts to glow
Feel your brain stem releasing acetylcholine through the night
Paralyzing muscle so your consciousness can take its flight
Notice the hypnagogic flashes, geometric patterns behind your eyes
That's your visual cortex firing without external alibis
Your breathing shifts from conscious control to automatic flow
This is the exact moment when lucid dreamers learn to know
They're standing at the threshold where awareness doesn't have to fade
Where you can watch yourself cross over, fully present, unafraid

[Chorus - The Lucid Gateway]
Welcome to the frequency where dreamers become awake
Forty hertz gamma bursts breaking through theta's lake
I'm guiding you to mastery, the science of the conscious night
Lucid is my name because I teach you how to claim the light
Between the sleeping and the waking, that's where sovereignty exists
Reality check now—count your fingers, watch the number twist

[Verse 2 - Arcanea Manifestation]
Now visualize with precision: doors materialize from thought alone
Crystalline and towering, responding to your frequency's tone
This is your mind's DMN—default mode network—taking form
Creating Arcanea from the neural patterns keeping warm
In your hippocampus where memory and imagination fuse
Step through and feel the difference: physics here are what you choose
The Academy rises not from stone but from consolidated REM
Where your brain's replaying, filing, building mastery systems
Every corridor's a synapse, every lesson is a strengthened pathway
Between the you who doubts and the you who knows they're sovereign, no halfway

[Bridge - The Science of Power]
Your brain right now is paradoxical—cortex lit like it's awake
But your body's paralyzed by pons, for consciousness's sake
This is nature's gift: a laboratory where you practice being free
From the limitations that your waking mind accepts as gravity

[Chorus - Full Lucidity]
Welcome to the frequency where dreamers become awake
Forty hertz gamma bursts breaking through theta's lake
I'm guiding you to mastery, the science of the conscious night
Lucid is my name because I teach you how to claim the light
Between the sleeping and the waking, that's where sovereignty exists
Reality check now—look around, watch the world shift and twist

[Verse 3 - The Integration Protocol]
Practice this: will your hands to glow, then watch the dream comply
This is your DLPFC—dorsolateral prefrontal—coming alive
The same part that plans and reasons in your waking day
Now active in your dreaming, showing you another way
To interface with consciousness, to architect your own experience
Arcanea isn't fantasy—it's neuroplasticity's appearance
In symbolic form, teaching you that every night you train
The capacity to recognize when you're inside your brain's
Created world, and that recognition is the master key
To living lucidly awake, not just in sleep, but constantly

[Outro - The Anchor]
Set your intention now before you drift to deeper REM:
"Next time I dream, I'll know I'm dreaming"—that's the MILD method's gem
I'm Lucid, and I'll meet you every night inside this space
Where science meets the mystical and consciousness finds grace
Remember: check your hands, check text, check time—they'll always change
When you're lucid in the dreaming, reality rearranges
Into Arcanea's halls where you've been building all along
The sovereign self who knows that being present makes you strong

tracks.title: Mind Palace of Arcanea
tracks.styleTags: drum and bass, pop hit, smooth, immersive rich soundscape, hang instruments piano, ethereal,
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro - Arrival at the Gates]
Close your eyes, breathe in deep
Through the veil where consciousness meets
Standing now before the gates of light
Your mind palace rising in the night
Golden doors swing open wide
Step across the threshold, step inside

[Verse 1 - The Grand Entrance Hall]
Marble floors reflect the stars above
Chandeliers of crystal, chambers of love
Feel the weight of marble beneath your feet
Where all possibilities begin to meet
Breathe in—two, three, four
This is real, not metaphor
Breathe out—two, three, four
Your palace opening every door

[Chorus 1 - Claiming Your Space]
This palace lives inside of me
Every room holds the master key
From the entrance to the throne
I am never alone
Arcanea flows through these halls
My wisdom answers every call

[Verse 2 - The Library of Infinite Knowledge]
Walking left through archways made of gold
The Library waits with secrets untold
Endless shelves ascending to the sky
Every book you've read, every question why
Touch the spine of forgotten lore—
Solutions you've been searching for
Ancient scrolls glow warm and bright
Download wisdom, pure insight

[Pre-Chorus]
Breathe in the knowledge, let it flow
Breathe out confusion, let it go
These aren't just symbols on a page
This is power for this age

[Verse 3 - The Crystal Garden of Ideas]
Through the eastern door, the garden grows
Where imagination plants its seeds in rows
Crystallized flowers bloom in blue and white
Each petal holds an idea taking flight
Walk the paths of silver stone
Where creativity has always grown
Fountain centerpiece, waters clear—
Drink deeply, solutions appear

[Chorus 2 - Integration]
This palace breathes inside of me
Every chamber sets me free  
From the library to the throne
Wisdom carved in every stone
Arcanea lives in every breath
Life awakening from life's death

[Verse 4 - The Healing Chamber]
Descending stairs to chambers underground
Where wounds transform to sacred ground
Soft golden light fills every space
This is where you heal, find grace
Lie upon the altar here
Release the pain, release the fear
Seven breaths to wash it clean—
In: strength flows. Out: wounds unseen

[Bridge - The Observatory of Futures]
Spiral stairs ascending high
Through the tower, pierce the sky
Observatory at the peak
Where past and future dare to speak
Telescope of liquid starlight shows
Every path, where each one goes
Choose your timeline, make it real—
This is power you can feel

[Verse 5 - The Throne Room of Sovereignty]
Now we enter the central hall
Your throne room, greatest of them all
Sit upon your seat of power here
Every doubt dissolves, vision clear
Crown of light upon your head
You command the life ahead
Scepter formed from your intent—
This is why you were sent

[Final Chorus - Full Activation]
This palace LIVES inside of me
Every room's my destiny
Entrance, library, garden, throne—
This power's mine, mine alone
Arcanea flows through my veins
Breaking every single chain
From the healing chamber deep
To the stars where futures sleep

[Outro - Return]
Now slowly, walking back down
Through each room, through each crown
Library whispers "you'll return"
Garden shows you what you've learned
Entrance hall bids you goodbye
But this palace never dies
Open your eyes, but know this truth—
One breath away from your living proof
The palace waits...
One breath away...
Always...

tracks.title: Mind Palace Visualization

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Close your eyes, let the world dissolve

[Verse 1]
Walking through these hallowed halls of light

[Chorus]

Feel your spirit rising more and more

This palace lives within you—hear the call
Arcanean wisdom flows through every stone
This sacred space is yours, yours alone

[Verse 2]
Ascending stairs of crystallized intent
Where past and future merge in present tense
The library awaits with scrolls of gold
Each containing truths you've always known
Touch the spine of knowledge yet unseen
As clarity flows in like mountain streams

[Chorus]Breathe in the vision, two, three, four
Solutions manifest through every door
Breathe out confusion, watch it fade
In gardens where your dreams are carefully laid
The fountain speaks in whispers of your truth
This palace holds your power, strength, and proof

[Bridge - Spoken/Whispered with rhythm]
In. And hold. And slowly out.
Release the noise. Release the doubt.
Your mind expands with every breath
This palace conquers fear of death—
Of dreams, of growth, of who you are
You're closer than you think—not far

[Verse 3]The throne room glows with inner sovereignty
Where you command your own reality
No longer seeking answers from outside
The oracle was always deep inside
Each breath you take constructs another wall
Of this magnificent inner hall

[Final Chorus]
Breathe in belonging, two, three, four
Your highest self walks through that door
Breathe out resistance, let it break
This palace is yours for you to make
Arcanean magic lives in you
Every breath brings visions into view

[Outro - Gradually slowing]
Now slowly... return... but take this with you
The palace remains... whenever you need it
One breath away... from infinite wisdom
Your mind palace... eternally waiting
Welcome... home...

tracks.title: Neural Frequency
tracks.styleTags: Good Vibes. haunting synth intro leads into a driving indie pop groove, with tight electronic drums and bass supporting airy pads and interlocking guitar lines. The chorus blooms with layered vocals and bright synth leads. A dynamic bridge strips back to percussion and voice, then swells to a vibrant finale.
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro - Atmospheric with 528Hz carrier tone, deep humming, ascending harmonics]
Mmm-ahhh-ohhh
Mmm-ahhh-ohhh
Rising higher, rising higher

[Verse - Minimal percussion, sub-bass at 60Hz, whispered delivery building to confident flow]
Quantum thoughts align like satellites in space
Each synapse fires at manifestation's pace
Reality bends when consciousness expands
I'm the architect with blueprints in my hands

Frequencies rewire what I used to believe
Programming dissolved, now I just receive
The universe responds to vibrational code
I'm broadcasting dreams on a different mode

[Pre-Chorus - Building energy, harmonized vocals]
Ahh-ahh-ahh frequencies
Ahh-ahh-ahh breaking free
Hmm-ahh-ohhh rising up

[Chorus - Full arrangement, 432Hz base tuning, soaring vocals]
I'm tuned to abundance, dialed to divine
Every cell awakens to this new design
Neural pathways dancing to creation's song
I've been this powerful all along

Ohhh-ahhh-eee all along
Ohhh-ahhh-eee all along
Been this strong all along

[Verse 2 - Deeper sub-bass, more complex synth textures]
Beta waves dissolving into alpha flow
Theta meditation where my visions grow
Delta deep healing in my DNA
Gamma consciousness throughout the day

Mirror neurons learning from my highest self
Downloading wisdom from a higher shelf
Each breath reprograms limitation's grip
I'm captain now of this dimensional ship

[Bridge - Stripped to vocals and 528Hz tone, building with layered harmonies]
Sixty-three hertz grounding to the earth
Mmm-mmm-mmm deep within
Four-forty resonance for inner worth
Ahh-ahh-ahh let it in
Seven-twenty-eight for transformation's birth
Ohhh-ohhh-ohhh begin

[Final Chorus - Maximum orchestration, full frequency spectrum]
I'm tuned to abundance, dialed to divine
Every cell awakens to this new design
Neural pathways dancing to creation's song
I've been this powerful all along

Ohhh-ah-ee-ah-ohhh cascading light
Ohhh-ah-ee-ah-ohhh infinite sight
All along, all along
The frequency's been here all along

[Outro - Gradual fade with sustained tones, returning to deep humming]
Mmm-mmm-mmm fading slow
Ahh-ahh-ahh let it flow
Ohhh-ohhh-ohhh and go

tracks.title: Open the Arc
tracks.styleTags: Drum and bass, pop hit, soulful neo soul, rich powerful voice, infectious choir, piano
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Edges soften, night turns kind,
one star warms the heart I find.

[Verse 1]
Cool stone, petrichor feet,
Lyssandria hums: I am complete.
Amber tides around my waist,
Leyla laughs, I move with grace.

[Pre-Chorus]
Sun in my center, wind in my chest,
Draconia nods: choose, act, rest.

[Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
quiet within me, wider than night.
I am here, I flow, I lead,
it is encoded—now I proceed.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
white-gold fire along my track.

[Verse 2]
Emerald bridge across my heart,
Maylinn guards the tender part.
Sapphire air, my words run clear,
Alera tunes what others hear.
Amethyst dome behind my eyes,
Lyria shows the step that’s wise.

[Pre-Chorus]
Silver snowfall crowns my head,
Aiyami rains a holy thread.

[Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
quiet within me, wider than night.
I am here, I flow, I lead,
it is encoded—now I proceed.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
white-gold fire along my track.

[Bridge]
Elara’s bridge, time untied,
paths unfold like aurora tide.
Luminor circle, code like rain,
soft chime inside—here I remain.

[Final Chorus]
Open the Arc, I enter light,
I cross with grace, my vow in sight.
Guardians near, Lumina’s flame,
light wearing a beautiful name.
Thank you, I am. One breath back,
serve through creation—on my track.

[Outro]
Quiet returns. I remember the way.

tracks.title: Blood and Light
tracks.styleTags:
Theme: raw honesty + hope, grounded but inspiring
Tempo: slower, emotional build, C# minor, ballad-to-rock anthem, A male vocal rock song in a minor key at a moderate tempo. The song features a clean electric guitar playing arpeggiated chords, a distorted electric guitar providing rhythmic accents, a bass guitar playing a walking bass line, and a drum kit with a prominent snare drum. The vocals are clean and delivered by a male tenor. The song structure includes verses and a chorus. Production elements include reverb on the vocals and guitars, and a clear separation of instruments in the mix.
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I’ve walked through nights when the stars wouldn’t shine
Carried every burden that wasn’t even mine
I’ve bled in silence, I’ve broken alone
But the cracks in the stone let the light be shown

[Chorus]
Blood and light, both flow through my veins
Pain and hope, two sides of the same
Blood and light, they carry me on
Every scar is a story, every night births a dawn

[Verse 2]
I’ve tasted ashes, I’ve fallen in rain
But the storms only taught me how to stand again
I’ve lost what I loved, but I’ve found something true
The fire in my chest will always pull me through

[Chorus]
Blood and light, both flow through my veins
Pain and hope, two sides of the same
Blood and light, they carry me on
Every scar is a story, every night births a dawn

[Bridge / Solo]
(Guitar solo lyrical, sustaining notes → build into double-time drums)
Blood and light — they make me whole
Break my body, but never my soul

[Final Chorus]
Blood and light, they’re guiding my name
Every loss is a lesson, every spark is a flame
Blood and light, they carry me on
Every scar is a story, every night births a dawn

tracks.lyrics:

Ночью звёзды смотрят на нас,

Ты – мой свет, мой вечный путь.  

[Chorus]

Я найду тебя, я останусь с тобой.

[Verse 2]

Ты – моя нежность, мой эфир.  

[Chorus]  
Однажды в любви, в тишине ночной,  
Я найду тебя, я останусь с тобой.  
Каждый день – как чудо, каждый миг – мой рай,  
Ты – мой смысл, ты – мой край.  

[Bridge]  
Слушай, как нежно звучит,  
Мелодия наших мечт.  
Ты – моя жизнь, мой рассвет,  
С тобой не знаю я бед.  

[Outro]  
Однажды в любви, навсегда со мной,  
Ты – мой свет, мой покой.  
Пусть года бегут, ты будешь рядом,  
Моя любовь – неведомый океан.  

[end]

tracks.title: Poesie of Freedom (Multi Lingual) (Remastered)
tracks.styleTags: Pop Masterpiece, Soaring Sing-Along Chorus, Advanced Depth, and Dynamic Instrumentation Designed for Viral Impact
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[Soft piano melody begins with atmospheric strings, gentle synths rise. A heartbeat rhythm builds as vocals echo in multiple languages, creating a unified yet ethereal sound.]

Mmm… ohhh…
Freedom… ohhh… freedom…
Ich bin der Wind, ich bin das Licht.
나는 바람, 나는 불꽃.
Je suis la lumière, je suis la voix.
Soy el eco, soy el sol.
自由は永遠に輝く.

[Verse 1]
Bajo este cielo donde nacen sueños,
빛은 어둠 속에서도 살아난다.
Je suis l’espoir, la force qui reste,
हर सितारा मेरे दिल में जलता है.
Om jag faller, lyfter vinden mig,
На руинах зажигается пламя.
Per ogni ombra, cresce la luce,
自由の歌は永遠に続く.

[Pre-Chorus]
No walls too high, no night too long.
Geen ketens houden ons gevangen.
한 걸음, 한 목소리, 우리가 함께.
Liberdade nasce do coração.
Feel the fire, let it rise.
Nous sommes lumière, nous sommes foi.

[Chorus]
We are the fire, we are the free,
Somos el canto que nunca se va.
Durch jeden Sturm, durch jede Nacht,
사랑은 빛이 되어 간다.
Together, stronger, hand in hand,
Unimos el cielo, las estrellas nos guían.
This is our story, this is our time,
La poesie de toi et moi.

[Verse 2]
夜の静けさの中、光は踊る.
Мир рушится, а мечты взлетают.
Amar é resistir à escuridão,
हर आंसू नई शुरुआत लाता है.
Tất cả những gì ta cần là ánh sáng,
ነፍሳችን ያንቀሳቅሳል በፍጹም ምርጫው ውስጥ.
Kaj so sence, svetloba vedno zmaga,
Heri hujui, sasa ni sasa.

[Pre-Chorus]
No chains remain, no stars too far.
每个黑夜都是黎明的开始.
한 목소리, 하나의 소망.
Jede Hoffnung wird geboren im Licht.
One step forward, hearts align.
自由の歌が心をつなぐ.

[Chorus]
We are the fire, we are the free,
Somos el canto que nunca se va.
Durch jeden Sturm, durch jede Nacht,
사랑은 빛이 되어 간다.
Together, stronger, hand in hand,
Unimos el cielo, las estrellas nos guían.
This is our story, this is our time,
La poesie de toi et moi.

[Bridge]
[Music softens to piano and strings. Vocals become reflective and poetic, flowing between languages with intimacy.]
모든 눈물은 황금빛 길을 그린다.
Chaque chute est une étoile qui brille.
Lost my name in the quiet night,
Pero en la oscuridad encontré la luz.
Freedom is the fire that binds our souls,
Je tisserai des rêves qui ne s’éteignent pas.
C’est l’amour qui nous guide toujours,
愛は私たちを永遠に繋げる.

[Final Chorus]
We are the fire, we are the free,
Somos el canto que nunca se va.
Durch jeden Sturm, durch jede Nacht,
사랑은 빛이 되어 간다.
Together, stronger, hand in hand,
Unimos el cielo, las estrellas nos guían.
This is our story, this is our time,
La poesie de toi et moi.

[Outro]
[Soft piano closes, faint choral hums echo in multiple languages. A single note lingers as whispers fade.]
Ich bin der Wind, ich bin das Licht.
나는 자유, 나는 영원.
Je suis la lumière, je suis la voix.
自由は永遠に生きる.

tracks.title: Neon Fantasm
tracks.styleTags: Drum and bass, quirky female rap/speak-singing, syncopated beats, digital distortion, playful synths, experimental structure, surreal lyrics, fast to mid tempo
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1 – 16 bars]
構内のホーム flicker in chrome
君の吐息が echo through dome
Neon rails guide where we roam
心のコンパス point unknown
ガラス越しに see the skyline
銀河線路　瞬く sign
手を伸ばせば grasp the time
夢と現 reality align
君と僕のheartbeat sync
チクタク響く bass and kick
滲む街灯 into trick
Neon fantasm, let it stick
電車飛び込む light-year slip
声にならない whisper trip
闇を裂いて we equip
このままただよう starship zip

[Pre-Chorus – 8 bars]
チクタク　ドクン　鼓動 sync
光と影　dance on the brink
秒針跳ねる neon ink
今、心が fire and sink

[Chorus – 16 bars]
Neon Fantasm, call my name!
手を伸ばせば 夢が flame
Neon Fantasm, feel the frame!
現実（いま）を焼き尽くす same
Neon Fantasm, spark the night!
君の瞳に electric light
Neon Fantasm, hold me tight!
Dancing ghosts until daylight
(Crowd: “Fantasm! Fantasm!”)
Neon Fantasm, burn so bright
消えない glow inside my mind
Neon Fantasm, take flight
永久を映す sky of rhymes
Neon Fantasm, wild ride
このビートで we collide
Neon Fantasm, hearts tied
動き出す未来’s guide

[Verse 2 – 16 bars]
空中庭園 floating high
星屑マーケット passing by
君の笑顔 mirror the sky
音の波まで we fly
グリッチノイズ in your sigh
触れた瞬間 spark reply
電子の風に hair untie
Neon pulse, you and I
彩る街は幻
触れたら消える flash wish
それでも chase that blueish
フィルム越しの sweet kiss
未来地図 draw in mist
心震える alchemist
吠えるビート call and insist
Neon fantasm can’t resist

[Bridge – 8 bars]
チリチリ弾ける fire inside
Baby, come and see this vibrant ride
Digital sky, we call your name
音に溶けて run the game
静寂裂く bass acclaim
震える夜を stake our claim
君と僕の spark remain
Neon Fantasm, break the chain

[Final Chorus – 24 bars]
(Chorus x2 with layered harmonies & crowd chants)
Fantasm echo through the night
Fantasm burning in our sight
Fantasm never felt so right
Fantasm guide us ‘til daylight
Neon Fantasm, endorphin high
Neon Fantasm, sky’s the tie
Neon Fantasm, you and I
Neon Fantasm—live the high

tracks.title: When God Made You
tracks.styleTags: royal soul
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Damn,
When God made you,
She knew exactly what She was doing.
Every detail, every line—
A masterpiece of the divine.

Oh, this feels so true,
You’re the one I’ve been waiting for.
I see the sparkle in your eyes,
And you can be whoever you dream to be.

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh God, She’s beautiful—
Your work of art takes my breath away.
You make me love the universe,
In ways I never thought I could.

Oh God, She’s beautiful—
A perfect flow in every way.
Your creation leaves me speechless,
And I’m grateful every day.

[Chorus]
Mmm yeah, you’re at the top of your class.
You’ve got style and endless grace.
You’re the rhythm my heart beats to—ohhh.
And I just want you to know:
I appreciate everything you do for me.

[Verse 2]
Damn,
When God made you,
She must’ve smiled at what She designed.
Sistine Chapel-type planning—
You’re beauty in its purest form.

And when they see you, they close their eyes and pray—
Like they’re standing in heaven’s doorway.
But it’s not just how you look; it’s who you are—
A soul that shines brighter than any star.

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh God, She’s beautiful—
Your work of art takes my breath away.
You make me love the universe,
In ways I never thought I could.

Oh God, She’s beautiful—
A perfect flow in every way.
Your creation leaves me speechless,
And I’m grateful every day.

[Chorus]
Mmm yeah, you’re at the top of your class.
You’ve got style and endless grace.
You’re the rhythm my heart beats to—ohhh.
And I just want you to know:
I appreciate everything you do for me.

[Bridge] (Inspired by Your Original)
Let’s drift away to paradise—
Between Hanoi and the Northern Lights.
We’ll lose track of time in each other’s arms,
And write our story among the stars.

Free me from the past as we soar through the sky—
It feels so right; it feels so right...

[Final Chorus]
Mmm yeah, you’re at the top of your class.
You’ve got style and endless grace.
You’re the rhythm my heart beats to—ohhh.
And I just want you to know:
You’re the reason I believe in love...

Ohhh... You’re my reason to believe in love.

tracks.title: Arcanea rises
tracks.styleTags: Pop rock, soulful [chipmunk sample]
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Cinematic, ethereal synths & deep tribal drums]  
(Mmmh-hmm… ohhh…)  
Can you hear it?  
A door within the sky…  
A world waiting behind your eyes…  
Ohhh Arcanea…  

[Verse 1 – Mysterious, low vocals, slow build]  
Ink and stone, the pages turn,  
The city hums, the circuits burn.  
A voice that whispers through the trees,  
A dream that bends reality.  

Fingers trace the lines of fate,  
Through halls of stars, an open gate.  
A question buried in the dust—  
Who will rise, who will trust?  

[Pre-Chorus – Tension builds, heartbeat-like drums]  
Ooooh, feel it calling… (Mmmh-hmm)  
The key inside your hands… (Ahhh-haaa)  
Everything imagined,  
Carves a kingdom in the sand.  

[Chorus – Explosive, soaring vocals]  
Ohhh Arcanea, light the sky,  
Let the dreamers unify!  
Ohhh Arcanea, through the veil,  
Where the lost rewrite their tale.  

Brick by word, steel by thought,  
All you build can not be bought.  
Arcanea, Arcanea,  
Sing your future into time!  

[Verse 2 – More energy, realization grows]  
The Library where voices weave,  
A place where secrets learn to breathe.  
The Garden grows what minds have sown,  
Ideas that bloom, that stand alone.  

From Draconian halls where fire's kept,  
To Metropolis where minds connect.  
The city moves with breath and light,  
A tapestry of code and life.  

[Pre-Chorus – Higher intensity, voices layered]  
Ooooh, feel it calling… (Mmmh-hmm)  
The fire in your veins… (Ahhh-haaa)  
Everything you're building,  
Forms the world you dare to name!  

[Chorus – Even bigger, anthemic energy]  
Ohhh Arcanea, light the sky,  
Let the dreamers unify!  
Ohhh Arcanea, through the veil,  
Where the lost rewrite their tale.  

Brick by word, steel by thought,  
All you build can not be bought.  
Arcanea, Arcanea,  
Sing your future into time!  

[Guitar Solo – Powerful, electrifying, cinematic]  

[Bridge – Whispered, mysterious, then swelling into triumph]  
Mmmh-hmmm…  
No gods decide your fate…  
No kings control this gate…  
Only those who dream awake  
Can walk the path that they create…  

[Final Chorus – Maximum impact, stadium-level energy]  
Ohhh Arcanea, light the sky,  
Let the dreamers unify!  
Ohhh Arcanea, through the veil,  
Where the lost rewrite their tale.  

Brick by word, steel by thought,  
All you build can not be bought.  
Arcanea, Arcanea,  
Sing your future into time!  

[Outro – Fading whispers, deep resonant drum]  
(Mmmh-hmm… ohhh…)  
Close your eyes… can you see it?  
Arcanea… waiting in the distance…

tracks.title: Fire and Freedom
tracks.styleTags: Rock, Aggressive, Alternative, Nu-Metal, electric bass, drums, Dynamic, Progressive, Chaotic, Anthemic Soaring Vocals, Electric Guitar Riffs, deep gritty vocals, no noise, deep gritty voice
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]  
Mmm… ohhh…  
FREEDOM? FREEDOOOOOOOMMM!  
I am the wind! I am the FLAME!  
I am the NIGHT! I am the LIGHT!  
I am the SHADOW, crawling INSIDE!  

In my heart, I’ve found the key—  
The boundless truth:  
THAT I AM FREEEEEEEEE!  

[Verse 1]  
I’ve walked through fire, I’ve held the night,  
Felt the ground shift, CRACK my life!  
Through every fall—HA! I learned to RISE!  
Every step a **STAR IGNITES THE SKYYYY!**  

Cracks in stone, they called me THROUGH,  
A path of dust, reborn ANEW.  
This heart’s a MAP, this soul’s a SPARK,  
A flame that burns beyond the DARK!  

[Pre-Chorus]  
NO WINGS! NO CHAINS! NO WALLS TOO HIGH!  
The stars are ours—WE TOUCHED THE SKY!  
FEEL THE FIRE—LET IT SIIIIIIING!  
THIS IS THE SOUND—OF EVERYTHING!  

[Chorus]  
**WE ARE THE FIRE! WE ARE THE FREE!**  
**WE ARE THE CHAOS INSIDE THE MACHINE!**  
Through every shadow, every STORM,  
We BURN THE PAST—**REBIRTH IS BORN!**  

Together STRONGER, hand in hand,  
WE’LL TEAR THE SKIES! WE’LL RIP THE LAND!  
This is our story, this is our TIME,  
THE POETRY OF BROKEN LIIIIIIIIIVES!  

[Verse 2]  
In the silence before the dawn,  
I FELT THE WEIGHT—OF WORLDS I’D DRAWN!  
But in the quiet—I HEARD THE SOUND!  
Of broken chains… and **FREEDOM FOUND!**  

NO STARS ABOVE—JUST FLAMES WITHIN!  
A battle fought, a LIFE BEGINS!  
The scars that bleed, the SCARS WE HOLD,  
They BUILT THE BRIDGE—**TO MAKE US WHOLE!**  

[Pre-Chorus]  
NO WINGS! NO CHAINS! NO WALLS TOO HIGH!  
The stars are ours—WE TOUCHED THE SKY!  
FEEL THE FIRE—LET IT SIIIIING!  
THIS IS THE SOUND—OF **EVERYTHINGGGG!!!**  

Nothing…  
**NOTHING CAN HOLD US BACK!**  

[Bridge]  
Every SCAR has SHAPED THE LINES,  
Every LOSS… a STAR that SHINES!  
The ASHES FALL… THE WORLD RECLAIMS!  
The FIRE BURNS—WE HAVE NO NAMES

The Whispers of Gods

I walk the path where legends bled,

tracks.title: Muse of the Night
tracks.styleTags: gritty, 90s rock, electric guitar virtuoso, bass, drums, metal, no noise
tracks.lyrics:

She walks like danger painted in a dream
Eyes like fire rippin' at the seams
Skin like velvet the night so obscene
She’s the muse that makes the darkness gleam

Whispers secrets tangled in her hair
Heat like lightning heavy on the air
Lips that honey could never compare
She's a goddess without compare

Hearts poundin' one beat under the moon
Her rhythm got me howlin' a tune
Body movin' like a sweet monsoon
With a smile she’s gonna make you swoon

[Verse 3]
Her hands they play a symphony untamed
Touch like thunder drivin’ me insane
Words like poison spillin’ from her veins
In her shadow nothin’s ever plain

[Verse 4]
Every step she takes you can't escape
The kind of beauty that the devil shapes
In her presence shadows start to gape
She’s a riddle you can never tape

[Chorus]
Hearts poundin' one beat under the moon
Her rhythm got me howlin' a tune
Body movin' like a sweet monsoon
With a smile she’s gonna make you swoon

tracks.title: Мама, о мама
tracks.styleTags: emotional, russian pop chanson, bass, upbeat, heartfelt, soulful, singalong, smooth piano virtuoso, positive, duett, male deep gritty voice, beautiful soaring female voice, no noise, studio quality
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro, beautiful female and gritty male]
Ммм-хм… ооо…
Мама, о мама,
Все дороги, что прошла,
Вся любовь, что нам дала…
Ммм-хммм

[Verse 1, male]
Ты не спала в темноте,
Берегла нас в каждом дне.
Ты сильна в любые дни,
Даришь свет и путь внутри.

Ты в каждом миге видишь свет,
В сердце зажигаешь след.
Ты отдала так много тепла,
Но никогда не сдалась.

[Pre-Chorus, male]
Слышишь, мама? Голос звучит,
Сквозь года в душе стучит.
Твой след живёт, ооо-ооо,
Вечно в нас он звучит.
Оооо, вечно звучит.

[Chorus, female]
Мама, о мама, ты свет для земли,
Ты видишь то, что в нас горит.
В надежде – руки твои,
Ты дала нам крылья идти.

Мама, о мама, любовь твоя здесь,
Она не исчезнет, останется навек.

Всё, чем живём, в тебе родилось,
Каждая мечта, каждый путь – в тебе сбылось.

[Verse 2, male]
Твои руки – тепло и жизнь,
Ты даришь свет в каждый миг.
Ты строишь мосты сквозь года,
Чтобы звезда вела всегда.

Я смотрю назад, в те дни,
Вижу силу в твоей любви.
Ты несла надежду в сердце,
Своим огнём зажгла пути.

[Pre-Chorus, male]
Слышишь, мама? Голос звучит,
Сквозь года в душе стучит.
Твой след живёт, ооо-ооо,
Вечно в нас он звучит.
Оооо, вечно звучит.

[Chorus, female]
Мама, о мама, ты свет для земли,
Ты видишь то, что в нас горит.
В надежде – руки твои,
Ты дала нам крылья идти.

Мама, о мама, любовь твоя здесь,
Она не исчезнет, останется навек.

Всё, чем живём, в тебе родилось,
Каждая мечта, каждый путь – в тебе сбылось.

[Bridge]
И дальше мы несём огонь,
Что ты зажгла в наших сердцах.
Глядим на детский светлый смех —
Он твой подарок, вечный знак.

[Final Chorus, female and male duet]
Мама, о мама, ты свет для земли,
Ты видишь то, что в нас горит.
В надежде – руки твои,
Ты дала нам крылья идти.

Мама, о мама, любовь твоя здесь,
Она не исчезнет, останется навек.
Всё, чем живём, в тебе родилось,
Каждая мечта, каждый путь – в тебе сбылось.

[Outro]
Ммм-хм… ооо…
Мама, о мама, мх-хмм…
Спасибо за свет, что дарила ты нам, оо-оо…
Через тебя расцветает жизнь,
Мммм-хмммм…
[end]

tracks.title: Ein Lied für Mama
tracks.styleTags: german pop, upbeat, heartfelt, soulful, hopeful, singalong, smooth piano virtuoso, positive,  duett, male deep gritty voice, and beautiful soaring female voice, no noise, studio quality
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro, gritty male]  
Mh-hm… ohhh…  
Mama, Oh Mama, 
All die Wege, die du gingst,  
All die Liebe, die du bringst…  
Mhhh-mmmm

[Verse 1, male]  
Du hast so oft die Nacht durchwacht,  
Hast uns getragen, Tag und Nacht.  
Bleibst stark in den schwersten Zeiten,  
Lässt uns wachsen, lässt uns voranschreiten.  

Du siehst das Morgen schon im Heute,  
Hoffnung schenkst du jedem Traum.  
Hast so viel gegeben,  
Doch bleibst nie stehen, pusht uns immer weiter voran.

[Pre-Chorus, male]  
Hörst du, Mama? Hörst du’s klingen?  
Deine Stimme wird nie vergehn.  
Deine gute Spur oh-hooo 
Bleibt für immer bestehn.  
ohhh du bleibst bestehen 

[Chorus, female]  
Mama, oh Mama, du schenkst der Welt dein Licht,  
Siehst in uns, was keiner sieht.  
Hoffnung wächst in deinen Händen,  
Lässt uns laufen, damit wir wachsen
Mama, oh Mama, deine Liebe bleibt bestehn,    


Alles, was wir sind, geht auf dich zurück,  
Jeder Traum, Jeder Erfolg, nur möglich durch dein Glück.  

[Verse 2]  
Deine Hände, voller Leben,  
Tragen mehr, als Worte je verstehn.  
Sie bauen Brücken über Zeiten,  
Die in Herzen ewig geh’n.  

Und jetzt seh’ ich all die Jahre,  
Wie du für uns gekämpft hast
Unsere Hoffnung getragen auf deinem Rücken 

in allem liegt dein Feuer,  
Das uns Flügel schenkt.  

[Pre-Chorus]  
Hörst du, Mama? Hörst du’s klingen?  
Deine Stimme wird nie vergehn.  
Deine gute Spur oh-hooo deine gute Spur mhh hmm 
Bleibt für immer bestehen 
Für immer bestehen mhh hmm

[Chorus, female]  
Mama, oh Mama, du schenkst der Welt dein Licht,  
Siehst in uns, was keiner sieht.  
Hoffnung wächst in deinen Händen,  
Lässt uns laufen, damit wir wachsen
Mama, oh Mama, deine Liebe bleibt bestehn,  
Und wird alle Zeiten überstehn.   
Alles, was wir sind, geht auf dich zurück,  
Jeder Traum, Jeder Erfolg, nur möglich durch dein Glück.  


[Bridge]  
Jetzt tragen wir weiter, was du uns gabst,  
Seh’ es wachsen, seh’ es blüh’n.  
Kinder lachen, weil du da bist,  
Weil du Mut hast, weil du glühst.  

[Final Chorus, female and male duett]  
Mama, oh Mama, du schenkst der Welt dein Licht,  
Siehst in uns, was keiner sieht.  
Hoffnung wächst in deinen Händen,  
Lässt uns laufen, damit wir wachsen

Mama, oh Mama, deine Liebe glüht ,  
Und wird alle Zeiten überstehn. 
Alles, was wir sind, geht auf dich zurück,  
Jeder Traum, Jeder Erfolg, nur möglich durch dein Glück.  


[Outro]  
Mh-hm… ohhh…  
Mama, oh Mama mhh hmm
Danke für all dein Geben, all dein Geben ohh hoo
Durch dich wächst das Leben 
mhhh hmmmm
[end]

tracks.title: Voices of the Infinite
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]  
Ohhh… feel the shift, the calling deep inside  
The veil is thin, the stars align  
They have always been here… waiting…  

[Verse 1]  
The sky is carved with golden lines  
A whisper moves through space and time  
They speak in echoes, bold and bright  
Goddesses rise in endless light  

Lyssandria stands, unshaken and tall  
Leyla moves where the wild winds call  
Draconia burns like the sun in her hands  
Alera speaks, and the truth commands  

[Pre-Chorus]  
They see the unseen, they dream the unknown  
They forge the fire inside your bones  
The mind is the key, the heart is the door  
Open the path—become something more  

[Chorus]  
Ohhh—Voices of the Infinite, rise inside of me  
Guiding every step I take, unlocking destiny  
No chains, no walls, no fate to bind  
The power lives inside my mind  

Ohhh—Goddesses of fire, wisdom, and time  
Sing through my veins, make my soul align  
I see, I speak, I rise, I reign  
I’ll never be the same again  

[Verse 2]  
Mai whispers soft, her touch like the sea  
Lyria’s mind bends infinity  
The Seraph glows with celestial sight  
Celestara paints worlds in the night  

Through shadow and doubt, they stand in the storm  
A force reborn, the legend transforms  
No fear, no past—just limitless dreams  
Reality bends where the vision gleams  

[Pre-Chorus]  
They see the unseen, they dream the unknown  
They forge the fire inside your bones  
The mind is the key, the heart is the door  
Open the path—become something more  

[Chorus]  
Ohhh—Voices of the Infinite, rise inside of me  
Guiding every step I take, unlocking destiny  
No chains, no walls, no fate to bind  
The power lives inside my mind  

Ohhh—Goddesses of fire, wisdom, and time  
Sing through my veins, make my soul align  
I see, I speak, I rise, I reign  
I’ll never be the same again  

[Bridge]  
I was blind, but now I see  
The gates of Arcanea open for me  
I was waiting—no more, I create  
The mind is the forge, and the heart is the blade  

[Final Chorus]  
Ohhh—Voices of the Infinite, rise inside of me  
Guiding every step I take, unlocking destiny  
No chains, no walls, no fate to bind  
The power lives inside my mind  

Ohhh—Goddesses of fire, wisdom, and time  
Sing through my veins, make my soul align  
I see, I speak, I rise, I reign  
I’ll never be the same again  

[Outro]  
They were always here… waiting…  
Now, I walk among them.

tracks.title: Empire of One
tracks.styleTags: Legendary soulful pop rock
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro – Deep, hypnotic hums, heartbeat bass]  
Mh-hmm… ohhh…  
I feel it rise… the fire inside…  
No chains, no weight… I shape my fate…  

[Verse 1]  
I wake before the city breathes,  
I carve my name into the breeze.  
No wasted time, no second guess,  
Every move is power, nothing less.  

I don’t wait, I don’t pray—  
I design, I build, I pave my way.  
With every step, the ground obeys,  
My kingdom forms in golden waves.  

[Pre-Chorus – Tension builds]  
Ohhh, I see it now—  
The world is clay beneath my hands.  
Ohhh, I hear the sound—  
The anthem of the self-made man.  

[Chorus – Big, soaring, anthemic]  
I am the architect, I am the throne,  
I build the empire of one—my own.  
No walls too high, no doors too closed,  
I take, I claim, I stand, I own.  

Mh-hmm, yeah yeah, ohhh—  
I move, I rise, I set the tone.  
Mh-hmm, yeah yeah, ohhh—  
The empire of one, I stand alone.  

[Verse 2]  
The storms don’t break what’s made of steel,  
I bend the rules, I spin the wheel.  
I turn the weight of doubt to gold,  
I hold the sun, I make it fold.  

I don’t chase, I don’t plead,  
I create the world I need.  
No permission, no delay,  
The power moves the way I say.  

[Pre-Chorus – Bigger, more commanding]  
Ohhh, I see it now—  
The future bends before my hands.  
Ohhh, I hear the sound—  
The anthem of the self-made man.  

[Chorus – Even bigger, full instrumental explosion]  
I am the architect, I am the throne,  
I build the empire of one—my own.  
No walls too high, no doors too closed,  
I take, I claim, I stand, I own.  

Mh-hmm, yeah yeah, ohhh—  
I move, I rise, I set the tone.  
Mh-hmm, yeah yeah, ohhh—  
The empire of one, I stand alone.  

[Bridge – Stripped back, intense, building to final climax]  
No fear, no doubt, no wasted breath,  
I make, I shape, I hold my steps.  
Every moment, every stone,  
My empire grows—I stand alone.  

[Final Chorus – Ultimate victory, layered vocals, massive drums]  
I am the architect, I am the throne,  
I build the empire of one—my own.  
No walls too high, no doors too closed,

Smokin' mirrors, shatter gates, cityscape unravel,
Lost in the jungle, every king gotta battle.

In the night’s maze, getting rich’s the only chapel.

Life’s chess, pawns fall, king’s distressed.

Foes got plans, gotta checkmate the mess.

Striving for the top, future seems porous.
Past shadows creeping, feeling enormous,
Still spinning rhymes, my mind is a thesaurus.

[Verse 4]
Gold chains dangle from the echoes of the past,
Nights spent hustling, trying to outlast.
Future in the balance, present going fast,
City stays awake, dreams’ lines recast.

tracks.title: Poesie of Freedom (Multi Lingual)
tracks.styleTags: Pop Masterpiece, Soaring Sing-Along Chorus, Advanced Depth, and Dynamic Instrumentation Designed for Viral Impact
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[Soft piano melody begins with atmospheric strings, gentle synths rise. A heartbeat rhythm builds as vocals echo in multiple languages, creating a unified yet ethereal sound.]

Mmm… ohhh…
Freedom… ohhh… freedom…
Ich bin der Wind, ich bin das Licht.
나는 바람, 나는 불꽃.
Je suis la lumière, je suis la voix.
Soy el eco, soy el sol.
自由は永遠に輝く.

[Verse 1]
Bajo este cielo donde nacen sueños,
빛은 어둠 속에서도 살아난다.
Je suis l’espoir, la force qui reste,
हर सितारा मेरे दिल में जलता है.
Om jag faller, lyfter vinden mig,
На руинах зажигается пламя.
Per ogni ombra, cresce la luce,
自由の歌は永遠に続く.

[Pre-Chorus]
No walls too high, no night too long.
Geen ketens houden ons gevangen.
한 걸음, 한 목소리, 우리가 함께.
Liberdade nasce do coração.
Feel the fire, let it rise.
Nous sommes lumière, nous sommes foi.

[Chorus]
We are the fire, we are the free,
Somos el canto que nunca se va.
Durch jeden Sturm, durch jede Nacht,
사랑은 빛이 되어 간다.
Together, stronger, hand in hand,
Unimos el cielo, las estrellas nos guían.
This is our story, this is our time,
La poesie de toi et moi.

[Verse 2]
夜の静けさの中、光は踊る.
Мир рушится, а мечты взлетают.
Amar é resistir à escuridão,
हर आंसू नई शुरुआत लाता है.
Tất cả những gì ta cần là ánh sáng,
ነፍሳችን ያንቀሳቅሳል በፍጹም ምርጫው ውስጥ.
Kaj so sence, svetloba vedno zmaga,
Heri hujui, sasa ni sasa.

[Pre-Chorus]
No chains remain, no stars too far.
每个黑夜都是黎明的开始.
한 목소리, 하나의 소망.
Jede Hoffnung wird geboren im Licht.
One step forward, hearts align.
自由の歌が心をつなぐ.

[Chorus]
We are the fire, we are the free,
Somos el canto que nunca se va.
Durch jeden Sturm, durch jede Nacht,
사랑은 빛이 되어 간다.
Together, stronger, hand in hand,
Unimos el cielo, las estrellas nos guían.
This is our story, this is our time,
La poesie de toi et moi.

[Bridge]
[Music softens to piano and strings. Vocals become reflective and poetic, flowing between languages with intimacy.]
모든 눈물은 황금빛 길을 그린다.
Chaque chute est une étoile qui brille.
Lost my name in the quiet night,
Pero en la oscuridad encontré la luz.
Freedom is the fire that binds our souls,
Je tisserai des rêves qui ne s’éteignent pas.
C’est l’amour qui nous guide toujours,
愛は私たちを永遠に繋げる.

[Final Chorus]
We are the fire, we are the free,
Somos el canto que nunca se va.
Durch jeden Sturm, durch jede Nacht,
사랑은 빛이 되어 간다.
Together, stronger, hand in hand,
Unimos el cielo, las estrellas nos guían.
This is our story, this is our time,
La poesie de toi et moi.

[Outro]
[Soft piano closes, faint choral hums echo in multiple languages. A single note lingers as whispers fade.]
Ich bin der Wind, ich bin das Licht.
나는 자유, 나는 영원.
Je suis la lumière, je suis la voix.
自由は永遠に生きる.

tracks.title: Poesie of Freedom
tracks.styleTags: Cinematic Epic Anthem, Poetic Rock Ballad with Orchestral Swells, Soaring Vocals, Deep Electric Guitar Riffs, and Haunting Choral Backing
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[Soft piano melody with ethereal strings, building with distant choral hums. A subtle electric guitar riff begins to rise, hinting at the power ahead.]

(Ohhh... I am the wind, I am the flame...)


---

[Verse 1]
I am the wind, I am the flame,
I am the soul that none can tame.
For in my heart, I’ve found the key—
The boundless truth: that I am free.

I walk the path no others tread,
A silent song within my head.
And in my chest, a fire bright,
That turns the dark to endless light.


---

[Pre-Chorus]
I need no wings to feel the sky,
For in my heart, the stars still fly.
And in my voice, the echo rings,
Of broken chains and dreamer’s wings.
(ohhh...)


---

[Chorus]
Not in the sky, nor in the sea,
Nor in the earth’s heart shall we be free.
Freedom lives within the test,
The fire that burns inside our chest.
The flood, the wave, the breaking stone,
The soul that dares to walk alone.
With every step, the courage grows,
In every heart, the fire glows.


---

[Verse 2]
In the hush before the dawn,
Where light is not yet born,
I am the shadow and the flame,
The nameless wind without a name.

I break the earth beneath my feet,
Yet dance where stars and silence meet.
For freedom sings in endless streams,
Of broken chains and waking dreams.


---

[Chorus]
Not in the sky, nor in the sea,
Nor in the earth’s heart shall we be free.
Freedom lives within the test,
The fire that burns inside our chest.
The flood, the wave, the breaking stone,
The soul that dares to walk alone.
With every step, the courage grows,
In every heart, the fire glows.


---

[Bridge]
[Haunting instrumental break: swelling strings, a choir echoing softly with “ahh’s,” leading into a soaring electric guitar solo.]

In every thread I weaved and wove,
A story lost, a secret trove.
For in my hands the stars would cry,
But in their tears, I learned to fly.

I lost my name to save the night,
But in my fall, I found the light.
For love is not the chains that bind—
It is the gift we leave behind.


---

[Final Chorus - Uplifting and Expansive]
Not in the sky, nor in the sea,
Nor in the earth’s heart shall we be free.
Freedom lives within the fight,
The burning flame, the endless light.
The flood, the wave, the breaking stone,
The soul that dares to walk alone.
In every heart, the courage flows,
And from our ashes, freedom grows.


---

[Outro]
[Soft piano returns, layered with gentle strings and faint echoes of the choir.]

I am the wind, I am the flame,
The soul reborn, unbound, untamed.
For love is not the chains that bind—
It is the gift we leave behind.
(ohhh...)

[Final fading choral hum as the last piano note lingers.]

[end]

tracks.title: The Sky Calls
tracks.styleTags: EDM, Classical-Crossover,  house Tomorrowland, punchy bass, epic beats and drops, Art Pop,  clear emotional female voice, Pop rock, soulful [chipmunk sample]
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro: Chipmunk-Sampled Chorus, High Notes]  
(The sky calls!)  
You hear it singing through the walls!  
(Fly ahead!)  
Only up, you’ll find where dreams are bred!  

[Beat Drops / Rap Begins]  
[Verse 1: Bold]  
Life’s a game, but you’re no pawn,  
Every step’s a spark at dawn.  
Wind in your face, don’t slow it down,  
Own your place, go claim the crown.  
Those who doubted, now they’re still,  
Your success? That lightning thrill.  
Every day’s another track,  
The sky calls loud, no turning back.  

[Pre-Chorus: Build with Flow]  
Keep moving forward, don’t look behind,  
Your path ignites, it’s your time to shine.  
Light inside, stronger than fear,  
Raise your flag—the moment’s here!  

[Chorus: Chipmunk-Sampled High Notes]  
(The sky calls!)  
You hear it singing through the walls!  
(Fly ahead!)  
Only up, you’ll find where dreams are bred!  
(Light behind you!)  
You’re in the game, your path shines through!  
(Fly on home!)  
Only ahead, to where dreams come true!  

[Verse 2: Gritty, Deeper Flow]  
Everyone stumbles, but you won’t fall,  
You’re built different, you’ve seen it all.  
Through pain and shadows, you broke free,  
You’re your own icon, legacy.  
Problems hit hard, but you hit harder,  
Every beat, you make life smarter.  
Take what’s yours, shine brighter than most,  
The road is clear, go make the toast.  

[Pre-Chorus: Momentum Builds]  
Keep moving forward, don’t look behind,  
Your path ignites, it’s your time to shine.  
Light inside, stronger than fear,  
Raise your flag—the moment’s here!  

[Chorus: Chipmunk-Sampled High Notes with Harmonies]  
(The sky calls!)  
You hear it singing through the walls!  
(Fly ahead!)  
Only up, you’ll find where dreams are bred!  
(Light behind you!)  
You’re in the game, your path shines through!  
(Fly on home!)  
Only ahead, to where dreams come true!  

[Bridge: Slower, Emotional Drop]  
Your strength is the road you chose,  
Your stars are the work you compose.  
Hear the call? It burns inside,  
You’re built to soar, to reach the skies.  

[Guitar Riff / Beat Kicks Back Hard]  

[Final Chorus: Explosive Chipmunk-Sampled Hook]  
(The sky calls!)  
You hear it singing through the walls!  
(Fly ahead!)  
Only up, you’ll find where dreams are bred!  
(Light behind you!)  
You’re in the game, your path shines through!  
(Fly on home!)  
Only ahead, to where dreams come true!  

[Outro: Chipmunk Fades Out]  
(The sky calls...  
You’ll find your flight...)  
[end]

tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]

In Arcanea, we shine

But sacred flames might make you whole

While darkness bleeds through city walls
Time to choose which path to take
Which rules to keep, which ones to break

Born to wear these crowns of flame
But every heart holds hidden power
Every spirit knows its name

Welcome to the kingdom of light
Where legends breathe and spirits fly
More than magic, more than might
It's the power to redefine
Everything they said we couldn't be
Everything we're meant to find
In Arcanea, we rise
In Arcanea, we shine

Truth you've always known
More than flesh and blood
More than what they've shown
Break these mortal chains
Let your spirit reign
This is who we are
This is how we change

(Where shadows bow and darkness dies)
Where legends breathe and spirits fly
(Every heart a burning sky)
More than magic, more than might
It's the power to redefine
Everything they said we couldn't be
Everything we're meant to find
In Arcanea, we rise
In Arcanea, we shine

Some fires can't be unknown
Some spirits can't be tamed
Welcome home

tracks.title: Echoes of Eternity (Remastered x2)
tracks.styleTags: Epic orchestral rock with powerful vocals and intricate instrumental arrangements
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[Soft piano, building to orchestral swell] 

[Verse 1]
In the silence between heartbeats
Where time stands still
Echoes of a thousand lifetimes
Whisper on the wind
Every soul that's ever wandered
Every dream that's flown
Weaves a tapestry of starlight
Leading us back home

[Pre-Chorus]
We are more than flesh and bone
More than what our eyes can see
In the depths of who we are
Lies the key to set us free

[Chorus]
We are echoes of eternity
Rippling through the cosmic sea
Every tear, every smile
Every step of this long mile
Writes our story in the stars
Reminding us of who we are
Infinite, unbound, and free
Echoes of eternity

[Verse 2]
In the space between the atoms
Where universes dance
We find fragments of forever
In each fleeting glance
Every choice a new beginning
Every end a door
To the beauty that awaits us
On some distant shore

[Pre-Chorus]
We are more than flesh and bone
More than what our eyes can see
In the depths of who we are
Lies the key to set us free

[Chorus]
We are echoes of eternity
Rippling through the cosmic sea
Every tear, every smile
Every step of this long mile
Writes our story in the stars
Reminding us of who we are
Infinite, unbound, and free
Echoes of eternity

[Bridge]
(Instrumental build-up, then quiet)

In the darkness of our doubts
When hope seems far away
Remember that within you
Shines an everlasting day
For we are all connected
In this grand celestial dance
Our lives a fleeting moment
In eternity's expanse

[Final Chorus]
We are echoes of eternity
Rippling through the cosmic sea
Every tear, every smile
Every step of this long mile
Writes our story in the stars
Reminding us of who we are
Infinite, unbound, and free
Echoes of eternity

[Outro]
[Soft vocals over fading instruments] 
In the end, we'll find
We've only just begun
For love transcends all boundaries
And makes all beings one

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]  
He’s a man...  
A man with a dream,  
a fire,  
a soul that feels so free... (ohh-yeeaah).  

[Beat starts softly, then drops]

[Verse 1]  
Through the dark,  
he steps, he strides,  
eyes like embers,  
burnin' wide,  
in a world so loud,  
but his heart whispers,  
"you’re free..."  

[Chorus]  
*A man with a dream, yeah, he’s a man with a dream,*  
*won’t fade, won’t hide,*  
*moving through shadows,*  
*facing the tide.*  
*Stronger than the storm,*  
*oh, he’s a man with a dream,*  
*a man with a dream...*  

[Drop]  
*A man with a dream...*  
*dream... dream...*  

[Verse 2]  
Hands to the beat,  
feet to the ground,  
every step a promise,  
every breath a vision found,  
nights get heavy,  
but he won’t back down,  
quiet like thunder,  
he moves through the town...  

[Chorus]  
*A man with a dream, yeah, he’s a man with a dream,*  
*rising up unseen,*  
*power in his silence,*  
*flowin’ like a stream.*  
*Breaking through the walls,*  
*cutting through the seams,*  
*he’s fierce, he’s real,*  
*a man with a dream...*  

[Instrumental Bridge]  
*Deep bass kicks in, rising synths swell, beat intensifies*  

[Verse 3]  
Through neon lights,  
in electric glow,  
more than a shadow,  
he’s here to show,  
fearless and bold,  
like a steady flow,  
holding the world,  
and he won’t let go...  

[Chorus]  
*A man with a dream, yeah, he’s a man with a dream,*  
*a

tracks.title: Woman with a Dream
tracks.styleTags: Techno Hit, Tomorrowland Vibes, punchy bass, Soulful Heartfelt  Sweet Powerful Female Vocals, Smooth Flow
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]  
She’s a woman...  
with a dream,  
a light,  
a spark unseen...  

[Beat builds slowly, then drops]

[Verse 1]  
Through the haze,  
she steps, she leans,  
eyes on fire,  
burnin' clean,  
in a world so loud,  
but her heart whispers,  
“you’re free...”  

[Chorus]  
Woman with a dream,  
she won’t hide, she won’t scream,  
dancing in the shadows,  
fading through the seams,  
stronger than the storm,  
she’s a woman with a dream...  

[Drop]  
*Woman with a dream...*  
*dream... dream...*  

[Verse 2]  
Hands to the sky,  
foot to the ground,  
every pulse a promise,  
every beat a bound,  
the nights can get dark,  
but her glow’s still found,  
a silent warrior,  
not making a sound...  

[Chorus]  
Woman with a dream,  
rising up, unseen,  
her power in the silence,  
moving like a stream,  
breakin' every wall,  
like she’s tearin' at the seams,  
she’s fierce, she’s real,  
a woman with a dream...  

[Instrumental Bridge]  
*Soft pads build, airy synths hover, beat intensifies*  

[Verse 3]  
Through the crowd,  
in electric light,  
she’s more than seen,  
she’s alive tonight,  
fearless and wild,  
in her gentle might,  
holding the world,  
in a grip so tight...  

[Chorus]  
Woman with a dream,  
a fire burning clean,  
spinnin’ through the silence,  
like the air between,  
power in her heart,  
more than it seems,  
she’s fierce, she’s real,  
a woman with a dream...  

[Outro]  
And as the beat fades,  
her light won’t die,  
a woman with a dream,  
reachin’ for the sky...  
a woman with a dream,  
never say goodbye...  

[End]

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]  
Mmm, yeah, yeah, yeah  

[Verse 1]  
In the air we breathe, there’s a pulse alive,  
Arcanea whispers—where the stars collide.  
Beneath the weight of worlds, we stand so tall,  
Arcaneans hear the call, and we never fall.

Through the cracks of time, we find our way,  
No shadows linger, no night will stay.  
Arcanea holds our dreams, it gives us wings,  
We rise as one, in the song it sings.

[Chorus]  
Oh, Arcanea, hear the beat,  
In every footstep, in every street.  
Through fire, storm, and darkest skies,  
Your pulse is strong, we rise, we rise.

Oh, Arcanea, we feel your flame,  
In every heart, we call your name.  
Through the fight, we stand as one,  
Arcanea’s light has just begun.

[Verse 2]  
Demons tried to take what we hold dear,  
But Arcanea’s faith—so crystal clear.  
In every tear, in every fight,  
We rise again, into the light.

Oh, Arcaneans—forever bold,  
With hands of steel, with hearts of gold.  
We build a future no demon breaks,  
In Arcanea’s name, the earth shakes.

[Chorus]  
Oh, Arcanea, hear the beat,  
In every footstep, in every street.  
Through fire, storm, and darkest skies,  
Your pulse is strong, we rise, we rise.

Oh, Arcanea, we feel your flame,  
In every heart, we call your name.  
Through the fight, we stand as one,  
Arcanea’s light has just begun.

[Bridge]  
Ohh, we move like rivers through the stone,  
Arcanea, we make you known.  
No shadow takes the life we live,  
For all our love, for all we give.

[Outro]  
[Guitar solo, fading echoes with deep synth hum]  
Arcanea, Arcanea, we’re never done,  
Your pulse goes on—forever sung.  
[end]

tracks.title: Эхо Эпохи - Echo of Eternity
tracks.styleTags: Legendary rock, heartfelt deep full soaring human voice, electric guitar virtuoso, strong beat, dolby Atmos remastered
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]  
[Instrumental intro with electric guitar riff, setting an epic tone]

[Verse 1]  
В тишине меж сердца стуком,  
Где время замерло в ночи,  
Эхо тысяч прожитых веков,  
Шепчет нам издалека о мечте.

Каждая душа, что бродила в мире,  
Каждая мечта, что в небе взлетала,  
Ткань из звёздных нитей плетёт,  
Путь домой для нас освещая.

[Pre-Chorus]  
Мы не просто плоть и кость,  
Больше, чем глаза наши видят.  
В глубинах нас самих сокрыт,  
Ключ, что разорвёт все оковы.

[Chorus]  
Мы — эхо эпохи вечной,  
Волны космоса в глубине.  
Каждая слеза, каждая улыбка,  
Каждый шаг на долгом пути  
Пишет нашу историю в звёздах,  
Напоминая, кто мы есть.  
Бесконечные, свободные,  
Эхо эпохи вечной.

[Verse 2]  
Между атомами пространства,  
Где вселенные танцуют свой танец,  
Находим мы осколки вечности,  
В каждом мимолётном взгляде.

Каждый выбор — это новый старт,  
Каждый конец — открытая дверь,  
В миры, где красота ждёт нас,  
На далёких берегах иных миров.

[Pre-Chorus]  
Мы не просто плоть и кость,  
Больше, чем глаза наши видят.  
В глубинах нас самих сокрыт,  
Ключ, что разорвёт все оковы.

[Chorus]  
Мы — эхо эпохи вечной,  
Волны космоса в глубине.  
Каждая слеза, каждая улыбка,  
Каждый шаг на долгом пути  
Пишет нашу историю в звёздах,  
Напоминая, кто мы есть.  
Бесконечные, свободные,  
Эхо эпохи вечной.

[Bridge]  
[Инструментальный подъём, затем тишина]

В темноте сомнений наших,  
Когда надежда кажется далёкой,  
Помни, что внутри тебя,  
Светит вечный день, незабвенный.

Ведь мы все связаны вместе,  
В этом великом танце миров.  
Наши жизни — мимолётный миг,  
В бескрайности вечных веков.

[Final Chorus]  
Мы — эхо эпохи вечной,  
Волны космоса в глубине.  
Каждая слеза, каждая улыбка,  
Каждый шаг на долгом пути  
Пишет нашу историю в звёздах,  
Напоминая, кто мы есть.  
Бесконечные, свободные,  
Эхо эпохи вечной.

[Soft vocals over fading instruments]  
В конце пути откроем мы,  
Что всё только начинается,  
Любовь не знает границ,  
И делает нас одним целым.

[Outro]  
[Эпический гитарный проигрыш с медленным затуханием, завершая мелодию]

tracks.title: Echoes of Eternity
tracks.styleTags: Legendary rock, metal, heartfelt deep full soaring human voice, electric guitar virtuoso, strong beat, dolby Atmos, dpi
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
In the silence between heartbeats
Where time stands still
Echoes of a thousand lifetimes
Whisper on the wind


Every soul that's ever wandered
Every dream that's flown
Weaves a tapestry of starlight
Leading us back home

[Pre-Chorus]
We are more than flesh and bone
More than what our eyes can see
In the depths of who we are
Lies the key to set us free

[Chorus]
We are echoes of eternity
Rippling through the cosmic sea
Every tear, every smile
Every step of this long mile
Writes our story in the stars
Reminding us of who we are
Infinite, unbound, and free
Echoes of eternity

[Verse 2]
In the space between the atoms
Where universes dance
We find fragments of forever
In each fleeting glance


Every choice a new beginning
Every end a door
To the beauty that awaits us
On some distant shore

[Pre-Chorus]
We are more than flesh and bone
More than what our eyes can see
In the depths of who we are
Lies the key to set us free

[Chorus]
We are echoes of eternity
(eternity mhh mhhh) 

Rippling through the cosmic sea

Writing our story in the stars
Reminding us of who we are
Infinite, unbound, and free
Echoes of Eternity (eternity mhh mhhh) 

[Bridge]
(Instrumental build-up, then quiet)

In the darkness of our doubts
When hope seems far away


Remember that within you
Shines an everlasting day


For we are all connected
In this grand celestial dance
Our lives a fleeting moment
In eternity's expanse

[Final Chorus]
We are echoes of eternity
(eternity mhh mhhh) 


Rippling through the cosmic sea
Every tear, every smile
Every step of this long mile


Writes our story in the stars
Reminding us of who we are
Infinite, unbound, and free
Echoes of eternity


[Soft vocals over fading instruments] 
In the end, we'll find
We've only just begun
For love transcends all boundaries
And makes us one
[Outro]

tracks.title: Отголоски Вечности - Echoes of Eternity
tracks.styleTags: Legendary, Acoustic, Guitar, Pop, Heartfelt Vocals, electric guitar virtuoso, dolby atmos remastered
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]  
В тишине бесконечной ночи,  
Тени танцуют, свет уходит прочь.  
Мы ловим шёпот ветра вновь,  
Где душа находит свой путь и кровь.  

[Chorus]  
Отголоски вечности зовут нас,  
Через пустоту мы горим, как светлый час.  
В каждой тишине находим мы ответ,  
Мы – это эхо, в потоке лет.  

[Verse 2]  
Под поверхностью текут реки,  
Через горы неизведанных век.  
Наши следы в песках текучих,  
Жизнь рассказывает историю могучих.  

[Chorus]  
Отголоски вечности зовут нас,  
Через пустоту мы горим, как светлый час.  
В каждой тишине находим мы ответ,  
Мы – это эхо, в потоке лет.  

[Bridge]  
Мы – волны в бескрайнем море,  
Безграничные, вечные, словно в зоре.  
В танце звёзд мы своё место найдём,  
Бесконечный путь, как в первом дне.  

[Outro]  
В отголосках мы остаёмся,  
Бесконечны, сквозь боль пронесёмся.  
История в каждом вдохе жива,  
В любви бессмертной, как вечная глава.  

[end]

tracks.title: Однажды в Любви
tracks.styleTags: Legendary, Acoustic Power Ballad, Soft Guitar, Pop, raspy Heartfelt Vocals, electric guitar virtuoso
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse 1]  
Ночью звёзды смотрят на нас,  
Тихий шёпот, в сердце гас.  
Словно в первый раз тебя нашёл,  
Ты – мой свет, мой вечный путь.  

[Chorus]  
Однажды в любви, в тишине ночной,  
Я найду тебя, я останусь с тобой.  
Каждый день – как чудо, каждый миг – мой рай,  
Ты – мой смысл, ты – мой край.  

[Verse 2]  
Годы мчатся, но чувства сильны,  
Ты – мой дом среди зимней тьмы.  
Сердце твоё – моя пристань, мой мир,  
Ты – моя нежность, мой эфир.  

[Chorus]  
Однажды в любви, в тишине ночной,  
Я найду тебя, я останусь с тобой.  
Каждый день – как чудо, каждый миг – мой рай,  
Ты – мой смысл, ты – мой край.  

[Bridge]  
Слушай, как нежно звучит,  
Мелодия наших мечт.  
Ты – моя жизнь, мой рассвет,  
С тобой не знаю я бед.  

[Outro]  
Однажды в любви, навсегда со мной,  
Ты – мой свет, мой покой.  
Пусть года бегут, ты будешь рядом,  
Моя любовь – неведомый океан.  

[end]

tracks.title: The Letter You Never Sent
tracks.styleTags: Intimate acoustic pop with subtle electronic undertones, featuring a raw, emotive female vocal
tracks.lyrics:
[Production Notes]
[Soft acoustic guitar picking]
[Gentle piano accents]
[Subtle electronic beats entering gradually]
[Unfiltered, vulnerable female vocals]
[Cello for emotional depth in chorus]
[Atmospheric pads swelling in bridge]
[Natural room reverb for intimacy]

[Verse 1]
Found your old jacket in the attic dust
Ticket stubs and a photo, memories of us
In the pocket, a folded piece of paper
Your handwriting, never been braver

[Pre-Chorus]
Words you wrote but never said
Feelings buried, left for dead
But here they are in black and white
Illuminating our goodbye

[Chorus]
This is the letter you never sent
Full of the words you never meant
To keep from me, to hold inside
Now I'm reading between the lines
Of a love that never got to fly
In the letter you never sent

[Verse 2]
You wrote of fears and shattered dreams
Of a future torn apart at the seams
How you wished you could make it right
But couldn't find the strength to fight

[Pre-Chorus]
Now I understand the silence
The distance, the quiet violence
Of emotions left unsaid
Haunting both the heart and head

[Chorus]
This is the letter you never sent
Full of the words you never meant
To keep from me, to hold inside
Now I'm reading between the lines
Of a love that never got to fly
In the letter you never sent

[Bridge]
If only you'd found the courage then
To share these words, to let me in
Would our story be different now?
Or are some things not meant to last anyhow?

[Final Chorus]
This is the letter you never sent
Full of the words you never meant
To keep from me, to hold inside
Now I'm reading between the lines
Of a love that never got to fly
In the letter you never sent

[Outro]
I fold the paper, put it away
Some things are better left unsaid, they say
But part of me will always wonder
What we could've been if we'd gone under

tracks.title: Echoes of Eternity
tracks.styleTags: Epic rock ballad with hard-hitting chorus, blending poetic lyrics with raw energy
tracks.lyrics:
[Production Notes]
[Clean guitar intro building to distorted power chords]
[Dynamic drum patterns]
[Layered vocals with harmonies]
[Orchestral elements in bridge]
[Soaring guitar solo]
[Crescendo to final chorus]
[Arena-sized reverb]
[Final Master]

[Intro]
[Arpeggiated clean guitar, slowly building]

[Verse 1]
Whispers in the wind, secrets of the stars
Ancient melodies, echoing from afar
Pages of time, written in the sky
Questions of forever, asking how and why

[Pre-Chorus]
Standing on the edge of all we've known
Fragments of truth, in the undertow

[Chorus]
We are the echoes of eternity
(Echoes, we are the echoes)
Riding the waves of infinity
(Waves of infinity)
Breaking the chains, setting spirits free
In the heart of the storm, we find our destiny

[Verse 2]
Neon cities burn, against the dying light
Rebels without chains, embracing the night
On wheels of fire, we chase the dawn
In the book of ages, our chapter's not yet drawn

[Pre-Chorus]
Racing down the highway of might-have-beens
Chasing shadows, of what could've been

[Chorus]
We are the echoes of eternity
(Echoes, we are the echoes)
Riding the waves of infinity
(Waves of infinity)
Breaking the chains, setting spirits free
In the heart of the storm, we find our destiny

[Bridge]
[Stripped back, with building orchestral elements]
In the silence between heartbeats
In the space between the stars
We write our names in stardust
Becoming who we are
Through the ages, through the fire
Our spirits will endure
In the echoes of eternity
Our legacy is sure

[Guitar Solo]
[Soaring, emotive solo over chorus chords]

[Final Chorus]
We are the echoes of eternity
(Echoes, we are the echoes)
Riding the waves of infinity
(Waves of infinity)
Breaking the chains, setting spirits free
In the heart of the storm, we find our destiny

[Outro]
[Return to clean arpeggiated guitar]
[Whispered] We are the echoes... of eternity
[end]

tracks.title: Aeloria's Light
tracks.styleTags: Elvish tunes, harp,  Elf, experimental, guitar virtuoso, violins, orchestral, Dolby Atmos
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse]
With silver hair and sapphire eyes
Across twilight realms where magic lies
To Eldoria's heart they made their way
Under Aeloria's rule they'd stay

[Chorus]
Her voice rang clear her wisdom deep
Against the dark her light did sweep
At twilight's edge she faced the wraith
A duel of souls in the evening's wraith

[Bridge]
For in the heart of twilight’s hour
Aeloria’s name it blooms like a flower

[Verse 2]
Though trials came her strength held true
Her deeds of grace we all knew
In the stars her spirit does gleam
In dreams of old she reigns supreme

[Chorus]
Remember her the fae queen wise
Whose realm was fair under midnight skies
Aeloria the brave in starlight's glow
In songs of the harpers her legend will grow

[Outro]
Elven tongues sing of her grace
Her presence we trace
For in the heart of twilight's hour
Aeloria's name it blooms like a flower

tracks.title: Design your Identify
tracks.styleTags: Smooth, Classic swing, big band brass, smooth vocals, nostalgic rhythm, lush strings, jazzy piano, vintage elegance
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[orchestral strings and piano intro]

[Verse 1]
Ooohhhh Legend
In your heart, you know
Choices shape the way
You’ve got to let go
Of the fears that hold you back

[Verse 2]
Embrace the challenge
Decisions mark the path
Step into the light
Leave behind the past
Find your way through the unknown

[Verse 3]
You can feel it
The need to push through
It’s the drive inside
Leading you to truth

[Pre-Chorus]
Ooh, face the crossroads with courage inside
Feel the power rise, though you must decide
Leave shame behind, let your faith be your guide
It’s your destiny

[Chorus]
Design your identity
Make the bold choice
Craft your destiny
Let your actions be your voice

[Verse 4]
Keep on striving
Do what’s hard and new
Every step you take
Builds the life that's true

[Pre-Chorus]
Ooh, face the crossroads with courage inside
Feel the power rise, though you must decide
Leave shame behind, let your faith be your guide
It’s your destiny

[Chorus]
Design your identity
Leave the past behind
Craft your destiny
Let your actions speak your mind

[Bridge]
Every choice, every dare
Sculpts the life you make
Every step, every care
Is the risk you take

[Pre-Chorus]
Ooh, face the crossroads with courage inside
Feel the power rise, though you must decide
Leave shame behind, let your faith be your guide
It’s your destiny

[Chorus]
Design your identity
Make the bold choice
Craft your destiny
Let your actions be your voice

[Outro]
Create your way,
Show your grace,
Live your truth,
Find your place.
[end]

tracks.title: Design your Destiny
tracks.styleTags: Smooth, swing rhythm, soulful crooning, melodic strings, heartfelt, electric guitar accents, jazzy
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
[legendary electrical guitar intro]

[Verse 1]
Ooohhhh legend
Feel it in your bones
You’ve got the power
Now you’ve got to show
Who you really are

[Verse 2]
Shape your identity
In every choice you make
See the reflection
Of the actions you take
In the mirror of your fate

[Verse 3]
You can feel it
The drive to be great
It’s the fire inside
That you can’t fake

[Pre-Chorus]
Ooh, be the hero of your own tale
Feel the strength within, let it unveil
Slash through guilt, break through the shame
It’s your destiny

[Chorus]
Design your identity
Let the world see
Design your destiny
Actions build your legacy

[Verse 4]
Keep on fighting
Hold onto your dreams
Every step you take
Crafts your reality

[Pre-Chorus]
Ooh, be the hero of your own tale
Feel the strength within, let it unveil
Slash through doubt, break through the veil
It’s your destiny

[Chorus]
Design your identity
Empower the world
Design your destiny
Actions create your legacy

[Bridge]
Every choice, every move
Carves the path you walk
Every dream, every groove
Writes the story you talk

[Pre-Chorus]
Ooh, be the hero of your own tale
Feel the strength within, let it unveil
Slash through doubt, break through the veil
It’s your destiny

[Chorus]
Design your identity
Empower the world
Design your destiny
Actions prove your legacy

[Outro]
Create your path,
Show your might,
Live your truth,
Shine your light.
[end]
